name: Heather G.
subject: Your supporter status enclosed >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Can you help us beat the September slump???
| Hi friend, my name is Heather and I help run the Voter Protection Project!

**I’m reaching out because I noticed that you have yet to confirm your supporter status to help us stop Trump and elect Democrats across the country.**

September is always the toughest for fundraising — and with our entire Democracy at stake, _we absolutely can’t afford to fall behind._

**There’s no better time to step up.** Trump is threatening to serve an unprecedented third term. MAGA Republicans are building their warchest to defeat Democrats in 2026. Grassroots support from Democrats like you is vital right now.

[So today, I hope you’ll help us get through September strong: Will you confirm your status as a top Democrat so we can take back the House and Senate from the MAGA majority and save our Democracy? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94036?t=6&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO) | [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94036?t=7&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO)
---
Thank you for all your help!

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21276%2E878179%2EFGkjDO)

name: Marina Jenkins, AOTL
subject: The Supreme Court case that could gut the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This is a fight we’re pushing on all fronts, but it’s only possible with your support.
|
---

Peter,
I wanted to update you on an extremely important case headed to the Supreme Court, and why our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is fighting — and what comes next.
You might remember that the Supreme Court did not issue a ruling in _Louisiana v. Callais_ in June. Instead, they’ve decided to rehear the case and consider whether to **gut the Voting Rights Act.** Specifically, they could strike down Section 2 of the law — a legal foundation that fair maps rest upon, which prohibits limiting voting rights based on race.
That’s why the entire fair maps movement is pulling every lever to save the Voting Rights Act and protect access to the ballot for all Americans, particularly communities of color who’ve historically been disenfranchised. But this fight takes enormous resources.
[**All On The Line is pushing on all fronts to halt the sudden and shocking Republican mid-decade gerrymandering effort in states across the country — and we need your help. We are responding across the country while also supporting and amplifying the work of our affiliates to stop the attempted gutting of the Voting Rights Act. Make a donation right now to fund all aspects of this critical work for our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115617009/570896594/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LAUpdate_email_20250920-AOTL-Tier1-LAUpdate-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250920-AOTL-Tier1-LAUpdate-MJ_&utm_campaign=LAUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YTAzY2VkLTdkOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j8x4DVGxEkJ5BYG3oty4_7WBtfGXJRr9bdIvyZt98Lk=)

This Louisiana case is a clear example of why the Voting Rights Act is so essential. The fair maps movement, led by the NRF, successfully challenged Louisiana's previously gerrymandered map that deprived Black voters of a congressional seat. Then, a conservative federal court struck down the new fair map.
Now, this map, along with the much larger issue of the future of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, is before the Supreme Court.
Recent attempts to redraw maps to favor one party at the expense of communities of color are clear proof of the need for strong laws like the Voting Rights Act — and that it’s more necessary than ever to stop politicians from silencing voters.
Justice Ginsburg famously remarked that we shouldn't gut the Voting Rights Act because it'd be like "throwing away your umbrella in a rainstorm because you are not getting wet." But it's raining cats and dogs these days. Just look at Texas: The state's new map explicitly dilutes the voting power of communities of color — exactly what the Voting Rights Act was passed to prevent.
**Make no mistake: If the Supreme Court strikes down Louisiana’s fair map, it would be a head-spinning reversal of decades of legal precedent. And it would leave millions of American voters without legal recourse to protect their constitutional rights.**
[**We’re waging this fight on all fronts. But it takes constant vigilance and tremendous resources. Step up with a donation today so AOTL can keep up the fight for fair maps, no matter where it takes us next.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115617016/570896601/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LAUpdate_email_20250920-AOTL-Tier1-LAUpdate-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250920-AOTL-Tier1-LAUpdate-MJ_&utm_campaign=LAUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YTAzY2VkLTdkOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=j8x4DVGxEkJ5BYG3oty4_7WBtfGXJRr9bdIvyZt98Lk=)
We’re so grateful that you have our backs in this critical moment.
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director, All On The Line

name: Powered by People
subject: What’s the worst thing about Ken Paxton?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

How well do you know Ken Paxton, the indicted and impeached Texas Attorney
General running for U.S. Senate?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/20250920-paxton/?source=em20250920-240365&t=1002&akid=240365%2E444211%2EotCOKI ]What’s the worst thing about Ken Paxton?

[3]( ) A: He’s forcing schools to put the Ten Commandments in their
classrooms while making a practice of violating them himself.
[4]( ) B: He was indicted — twice. Charges included securities fraud and
bribery.
[5]( ) C: Four whistleblowers who reported Ken Paxton to the FBI were
fired shortly thereafter. A judge this year awarded them $6.6 million.
[6]( ) D: He attacked Beto and Powered by People’s First Amendment right
and forced us to spend nearly $400,000 to defend ourselves in court and
fight his abuse of office.
[7]( ) E: All of the above

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/20250920-paxton/?source=em20250920-240365&t=1003&akid=240365%2E444211%2EotCOKI ]Take the Survey

More soon,

Team PxP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=240365%2E444211%2EotCOKI

subject: Dave Min is standing with Katie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40175%2E3422442%2EVkoQtW)
Peter,
Exciting news: Representative Dave Min endorsed Katie Porter’s campaign for governor!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250920_2_ak?refcode=em20250920-40175&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40175_3422442_VkoQtW&akid=40175%2E3422442%2EVkoQtW)
Katie and Dave worked closely to stand up to Donald Trump’s attacks on our state. He’s seen Katie’s leadership up close—standing up for working families, lowering costs, and taking on powerful special interests. That’s why he’s supporting our campaign.
This election is our chance to elect a governor who will be a real fighter for working people. Katie Porter is ready to take her progressive values to the governor’s office.
Representative Min and thousands of other Californians are standing with Katie. Now, she needs you to join this campaign.
**[Can you donate $5 to help us spread Katie’s winning message and elect a progressive champion as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250920_2_ak?refcode=em20250920-40175&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40175_3422442_VkoQtW&akid=40175%2E3422442%2EVkoQtW)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter for Governor

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250920-40175&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40175_3422442_VkoQtW&akid=40175%2E3422442%2EVkoQtW)**

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry
body:
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/RZ2zY_YJeonDvAKV5skdf1CAxnBiMRos3w4K4Y6rMrmJPQhERDvQ3FUrZ4KjYgOZqpui2sy8OMBqLtrT38kPWtKRT3lbL2Zv5nO0z_x2q8HW3ZGsiYCXq05mZEnDt42cRAMC2lyHUY7lf8viw_ah_yDwc6QBffo8Q2iDTvDMJhp7gIBh3uVhoEXXWwjEp0hEpxqd0yiOWWaK1qzDmJe73ltKc7PuW_zLLQFRdCL_OgwB6ms9sIFlZCRB2h8VMoOWJVWn46hSsNTUG62suDegHI3hOjGalmd78MtDJBCMhI4Ife9fu85Rjw7ia1Z08b0PtNmsMAre_YLULEPbYJjBRxGc3GUQN6gn_VN_gqQXF_9SbMnvjo64soBEg4xM4WpzTl2VXPDJbdDXIIa47jRNc50mGxLlZ67v3MRwhf9cy-yLvPjmMMsjchGIbuz9drcPrRGITErKKTV8hdpQ5adp-NuF-N1qh4sv091-0JdGFnRhEPCA7xpkYdDMKlfGBpbIYVcZIAz4FqfgCjMj2jtir20AEcpPiCmiVHIa0FlHbK0QJTrTlazH213Zib36dor416kx4DEinPLv2G8ozDGOjttDxEg0uv9hH1srV63hL7z0a-3rHyc9L68mtPGmHK4NKLHZ_yjzKoUm2ihfI3bKywkArZ7M2B52-wt4miuyzV3ENr5pONOpFkmjdrTwWAmGkfjp-67ZE4Z4BWbUTdoK3m26AgI47-Zd4mym6v1nZw2cJUwYABTK-jUr39SaIr-aPBlZ0ZSqgVaWwYBBIF3z66qlnRFVEquCVelAnftt69xcABx2JAGqMh2v_qG3StCW-lTH6jXOowOoBA7ZDCiY0C5aAIH7FfcnlpXmOTD25PXzfLly85AyYYBI8vD_oaAgBg/UZ9RzyeM7C5FWY__Ht2tRbT4NKPlYJ6x/13)
---
Peter, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/wmHg0N19iqANH4byCP2islBXGfIazO-yZE8nxNAkRKebXkUnsaSkC1zvZ_VV8FevO875-q4lCLO-uBrKDfS--aNClnsXXNMlnrD1s2isrStVn2F_Rcy5uSc8xNtq3me1iI1_WbBXbPfsxljL9SjtDSRZiBo4bMMGFa7pDlt8t7YsappPPP6nPAET9EBnH6ExU_KYn6muE_m2p1dtzT6UsOKeFJ5YiVQ9V_V5lT9lDx-5BrXGR0VFkp4-zcEDzWGMIDMoUfwzWNBljut16CkMRDj34Ghd7mHJwX-cTlV2N44KPkS7XGKmVf6mNCFvM8YKkWHBOAqVfqgu3Q1NVFLRlEN5pH1ioqhi5gBJ-DYocDxM0tjtTZ2sDftiNWkWnaXCtzceLGyc2iQw6GbqiPuMvCWO2D2rWPskXIKw30AtNU_cAHIH1d1pSiWAH-UTeGvV6xxTArouv6MRSeQNiBsPMw6sxSmz8F0g5q_C7z2NwjFeScHyLTXxlVk_Bawc9jbIbFAwzHJM5HPA0FIW7toS7AeVVUBhfO6f2pXapRiLOj7b2V34tshLQF7m-vkGFVWOc7QlAfvUAbsZrXHZ58N_TPJAp3-PPNCY_h_-eMxNErN62aASop5E9hCV1Jo17T7VSHaXeOS1sN5MNs29MZE7waffvKgBnUGyxc84aZE60qvVBxmyMHEPSuboox-3XT7bVKpdFRpNEFlo7hU7KOdeKXbmsgA5AgM_EbKXBo3IoVLH9s_Db4d16lH-q3cjbgFzkJbsCYu1ICIIfwy2od-QtfF3kv2RxFSDrw-v3GaxXMZh_S0qQWDIA9qfylhyszIKnHlSGSmkmTxH8K9vyLmsfJZ6GtOu6B8QYyPmbXQP91DwUoNFChHuNhyxekXnyM4hqA/E9ZIMSgKhiDp0LNDe6ZHPhMbmK_wSezK/13)

---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. And I want you to hear what comes next:**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=4dfe948e6ff446f4b586ba462523b1f2&_e=ZzyyJ8hulWborGlA3WMpihShsvUktOJheFFbUlZU1OcbgqqVHmKLL1sUxkMiXMQkl7QmKeG0RPQdbafw7sNHpw3OAPOf5uYUEpCMnjDlb9WhxNi9uI0YmhC0eIlAGHYhTz51cl4c3Xi9R-rxDLDI_-9MFUKH0zHDLtVgjpR_OrUbvYplm9i7_LYhK0Ss8ClYyWAgDb2QY5kfF3Ww_CR7PL4bmAqR4kPlQE7zrMEsW_1EGC0-76ynQUtKtwG8LrRQYahXt0vpgyktLfx2RyohSIi_U43VAVl-UOkIYHh_Yr4ZZ5KQuKyNCImOmblm0K8YE8xtbM6CMTynNq9aRg88uzJf56-LWsRbdsyGQLPRitfRP52xXuBzOhweZ6OeYRlyJe59XVtaCYQNPpE78PUxYyBFjG2_7AqLpL7nLT_vlExbI76GUg672lkRQC5RRhwtHrK4JZfe2EgMMVwPvM77Lzci53ZdFTmLPvNs0g7o60WOwPnMKCJtLmLZPH2l6F31hPPgtljEsMsnPE8OLDtTjD6-skGzwDJRJdRjSSLyYne3hbORIOVtn7qW2J1dnJWOXw3GNvJGeYF5GPrAZCgjDFe67lQIXukFkq0IErtELz1SbsSAxXA4a3kc4Keei8Q4G_gJoRManfGeFQ9MosSCUiOGyyiglZpTxcTu3uajv5X_OVYDXqkSR8K9Wt0juTkFCu9jhHeoQp3ZKpjBbPB3UA%3D%3D)

Peter ,
Most people in Pennsylvania don’t even know it’s happening, but this November, voters will decide whether three Democratic justices keep their seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
These same justices struck down a GOP gerrymander, protected ballot dropboxes, and upheld vote-by-mail. Without them, democracy itself could have looked very different.
But now, Republicans see their chance. The GOP has already pledged seven figures to tip the balance of the court. If they succeed, they’ll rewrite the rules of voting in the one state that could decide the next presidential election.
This is where we come in. GOTV PAC is already investing in turnout operations, but we need the resources to scale up fast. We can’t let an under-the-radar judicial race open the door to voter suppression in 2028.
Can you rush $20 today or more to power our fight in Pennsylvania and every battleground where Republicans are trying to rig the rules? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09202025&amount=25]

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

clean_body: [] Peter , Most people in Pennsylvania don’t even know it’s happening, but this November, voters will decide whether three Democratic justices keep their seats on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court. These same justices struck down a GOP gerrymander, protected ballot dropboxes, and upheld vote-by-mail. Without them, democracy itself could have looked very different. But now, Republicans see their chance. The GOP has already pledged seven figures to tip the balance of the court. If they succeed, they’ll rewrite the rules of voting in the one state that could decide the next presidential election. This is where we come in. GOTV PAC is already investing in turnout operations, but we need the resources to scale up fast. We can’t let an under-the-radar judicial race open the door to voter suppression in 2028. Can you rush $20 today or more to power our fight in Pennsylvania and every battleground where Republicans are trying to rig the rules? name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbm4vr36s8e6nph8ggochs5c04u7o88hq0av9bno_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjbtapklpen0jodpa51nv77seclhm8j4eb7jfcf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0qig2r8rfl6t6rgb2jr8rf74hc4fhbbh65t2d0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvfiovc78ks0r371suora23v43n1ito94rs8b9i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhvmferedu8iv2r7fauomd2n2qhihoao4klsipp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztfk3av0hq7cl8so72fjltnfc7q32qoc3v7m1jlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh9d3ltgd8r7m317c8sbmrhnhbdk0ef55aataofg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsf95n9andv0lug4gbi8ocr2v1tiqih4fu1k69to_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Hannah Henriksen
subject: Jonny did the right thing but he hasn’t been the same since
body:
A good deed shouldn’t destroy your life

| | | [View this email in your browser](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3j7gnkgbsrod42aq04vuark592en8a2tcupkn40_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmkbmjkdb0ubstr8u9sjemlq2ulpa12pnl1lc5rg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
Friend,

Have you ever had a good deed backfire on you? If so, then you might know what it’s like to be Jonny McCoy.

**Jonny McCoy is an insurance lawyer, a patriot, an upstanding citizen, and a good friend.**

When he got a late-night call from a lawyer buddy asking to be picked up at a bar – Jonny didn’t hesitate to help.

After making sure his friend's tab was settled, Jonny stepped out of the bar and saw that in those few minutes, his inebriated friend had dug himself a deeper hole and was in the process of being arrested on the sidewalk.

Jonny approached and asked the arresting officers which precinct they would be taking his friend to.

_**Big mistake!**_

The security camera footage shows that, _in less than 20 seconds_ after Jonny approached the police, with his hands up, and asked his question, **the officers put Jonny in handcuffs on the charge of interfering with an arrest** , and took him to jail.

The next two days would fundamentally alter the trajectory of his life...

Jonny’s story demonstrates the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness. That’s why I’m emailing you today.

At Respect America, we use our platform to highlight a particular type of human suffering that is often overlooked.

Through the use of real and up-close human experiences, Respect America will memorably demonstrate the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness, inspiring people to seek solutions that increase harmony and prosperity.

[Help Respect America share stories like Jonny McCoy’s to help create a better and freer world for all of us by donating below >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb5nng2m1c193a39v61pm94mlfk9716nomudbbao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq4n4rg8onjp3nma983dhc4qsetk61492fvrm30o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
For two days, Jonny sat in jail even though he had committed no crime.

Then his experience went from bad to worse.

**On his second night in jail, Jonny was subjected to an even greater horror. Another inmate hanged himself, committing suicide right in front of Jonny’s cell.**

As Jonny recalled, _“It was hours that this dude lay in front of our cell. Hours. I don't know how to explain it, really, but when you are restrained in a cinderblock room and the only window is pointing to a dead guy who took his life... I started banging my head against the wall... I lost it. That was it.**That was the end of the person I was before.** ”_ Though the city would eventually settle with Jonny over his wrongful arrest, there was a greater price to pay.

He had mental struggles that he kept quiet, worried it would get in the way of his career: “I was afraid that the bar would find out. I was afraid my clients would find out. So I kept it in until I attempted suicide.”

[You can watch the full version of Jonny’s story and support Respect America by clicking below. >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8s4tt1uc03ja52qb9h9nulb5c2ddkouedjhg1h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
[Hear Jonny's Story](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbunra2rg72rh27n9pqi1v0sv4d8u8pg2hcpkb08_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)
Stories like Jonny’s are all too common.

Sadly, these stores are often overlooked, buried, or disregarded.

This is why Respect America exists. We document these horrifying experiences of coercion, theft, and violence by the government through video testimonies and written articles that give the victims a voice.

_**Theft and violence always reduce happiness.**_

These powerful narratives put a name and a face to the human suffering caused by these intolerable mechanisms.

Our goal is to create a culture of respect and flourishing for a freer and happier America.

[You can help create a culture of Human Respect to build a flourishing and more harmonious America by donating today. >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs6r9v7gce55cvr5dkgg0lpkul3ll4u4s1eu61po_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9cb3rldp8heniesi7on2ouor0fqeqgj2mr1h7ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrq9qshni04c4n5qn3ql9gmn10qp7ahd8r6qj3rg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zumrpc1i28856c0j1a99uato4lj4vc2ircfl1r10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp997r42lvplrhbosq4n284k6ja43nontdb8cpf0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

Thank you,

Hannah Henriksen

**P.S. You might be wondering, “What happened to the arresting officers?”**

While their police incident report accused McCoy of grabbing an officer and getting in their faces – a claim easily disproven by the video of the event – they have faced no accountability.

_**None of these officers was reprimanded for their actions in 2009, and there is no reason to believe they would not qualify for taxpayer-funded pensions.**_

A local news station reported that nearly a year after the State Law Enforcement Division announced an investigation into the allegations of officer misconduct (_**during the McCoy case**_), there is no record that an investigation ever took place.

They didn’t even have to offer an apology...

** Can you believe it?!**

Respect America believes that everyone deserves Human Respect.

[If you agree, then please help us share stories like Jonny’s so others won’t have to endure the same degrading experiences by donating today. ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl4emjlkol2n1g2io3t1h4pli0cv4c9qqhklc8qg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o72chh2bs)

clean_body: A good deed shouldn’t destroy your life | | | | | Friend, Have you ever had a good deed backfire on you? If so, then you might know what it’s like to be Jonny McCoy. Jonny McCoy is an insurance lawyer, a patriot, an upstanding citizen, and a good friend. When he got a late-night call from a lawyer buddy asking to be picked up at a bar – Jonny didn’t hesitate to help. After making sure his friend's tab was settled, Jonny stepped out of the bar and saw that in those few minutes, his inebriated friend had dug himself a deeper hole and was in the process of being arrested on the sidewalk. Jonny approached and asked the arresting officers which precinct they would be taking his friend to. Big mistake! The security camera footage shows that, in less than 20 seconds after Jonny approached the police, with his hands up, and asked his question, the officers put Jonny in handcuffs on the charge of interfering with an arrest , and took him to jail. The next two days would fundamentally alter the trajectory of his life... Jonny’s story demonstrates the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness. That’s why I’m emailing you today. At Respect America, we use our platform to highlight a particular type of human suffering that is often overlooked. Through the use of real and up-close human experiences, Respect America will memorably demonstrate the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness, inspiring people to seek solutions that increase harmony and prosperity. For two days, Jonny sat in jail even though he had committed no crime. Then his experience went from bad to worse. On his second night in jail, Jonny was subjected to an even greater horror. Another inmate hanged himself, committing suicide right in front of Jonny’s cell. As Jonny recalled, “It was hours that this dude lay in front of our cell. Hours. I don't know how to explain it, really, but when you are restrained in a cinderblock room and the only window is pointing to a dead guy who took his life... I started banging my head against the wall... I lost it. That was it.That was the end of the person I was before. ” Though the city would eventually settle with Jonny over his wrongful arrest, there was a greater price to pay. He had mental struggles that he kept quiet, worried it would get in the way of his career: “I was afraid that the bar would find out. I was afraid my clients would find out. So I kept it in until I attempted suicide.” Stories like Jonny’s are all too common. Sadly, these stores are often overlooked, buried, or disregarded. This is why Respect America exists. We document these horrifying experiences of coercion, theft, and violence by the government through video testimonies and written articles that give the victims a voice. Theft and violence always reduce happiness. These powerful narratives put a name and a face to the human suffering caused by these intolerable mechanisms. Our goal is to create a culture of respect and flourishing for a freer and happier America. Thank you, Hannah Henriksen P.S. You might be wondering, “What happened to the arresting officers?” While their police incident report accused McCoy of grabbing an officer and getting in their faces – a claim easily disproven by the video of the event – they have faced no accountability. None of these officers was reprimanded for their actions in 2009, and there is no reason to believe they would not qualify for taxpayer-funded pensions. A local news station reported that nearly a year after the State Law Enforcement Division announced an investigation into the allegations of officer misconduct (during the McCoy case), there is no record that an investigation ever took place. They didn’t even have to offer an apology... Can you believe it?! Respect America believes that everyone deserves Human Respect. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Let’s Shame the Devil
body:
My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk’s death. America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant. With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk’s passing, “The Devil overplayed his hand.”

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmahci21oj6jn7otq7v49iqsvpspbjvfrhscjp9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs) [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7hmev49u5spqk9ca7ofdbb6irlrtumki90qojq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk's death.

America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant.

With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk's passing, "**The Devil overplayed his hand**."

Evil is exposed, out in the open, mocking us, and there is no better opportunity than now to Shame the Devil.

**In honor of Charlie Kirk, that 's exactly what we're going to do**. [**I ask that you join me in an unprecedented operation**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaqg07hvg1isj5310s58mp8l3qkmbhppfg269kf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs) to **expose the wicked, evil, depraved, and wrathful souls who are grooming our high school and college students with their agendas of hate**.

The students who debated Charlie with indignant intolerance were educated by teachers and professors who were too cowardly to stand in front of Charlie Kirk themselves.

It's time for America to see who these educators are.
**Through our non-profit, the Citizen Journalism Foundation, we 'll be giving hidden camera equipment to students across the nation and providing them with the training, legal and ethics training they will need to do their part to Shame the Devil.**
[**Please, donate to help cover the costs of this massive operation**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8jahqibr805ci8ejd3347m0u0j5ubos6vima4r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs).
Our staff is booking the largest facility we can find in Arizona to train and equip students for **the day after Charlie Kirk 's funeral**.

This is where we start, and [**I cannot do this without you**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8rk7vp5t51rv39ptanhgjusct0rmeok6hnqh0c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs).
Some may believe that the Devil does not exist, but I think the following quote from an old movie:
**" The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn't exist."**
The teachers, professors, and administrators we hope to expose are advancing an agenda that corrupts the minds of our youth, playing right into the Devil's hand.

This is our opportunity, "Shame the Devil" by exposing the playbook and the players behind it.

Millions of America's students are standing by. They want our direction. They want our guidance to do something that matters. **They want to do good**.

This is where I need to ask a favor of you. This campaign is going to conservatively cost $250,000 to get off the ground. We must equip, train, and prepare thousands of students for this to have the type of impact worthy of Charlie's legacy. [**I can 't do that without your help**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7vb9logqtr0t5vibce8n3m771o4naqu6806erb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs).

[**Let 's give them the direction, equipment, and training, and unleash these young lions of truth**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3es082g4ben4nog3960umhgibfnu98is2ihjj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm1o76cth2bs).

I appreciate anything you can do. Thank you for everything.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros.

| |
---
| | I'm writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8d855l6nfn7b16tj4fdld1vmaamqcq8bh4cat08_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message- will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zosgoeb283ltmaq2s50ungt46ges00t0crbtqnbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs) ** You're one of America's most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system. And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal. >> George Soros' push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York's horrible Letitia James who's now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants. It's their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros' native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the "Stop Soros Law." The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn't drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens. That's exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It's why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive - and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgd2p9a28pnp5e3iahfa8fruc4ratjltsivbtis0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf27i8go6s8micbk8p3b26jlmor7psb5q8rug8p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros' globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we! After the "Stop Soros Law" passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...** **...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. **_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsltbcofsogrkllsak9pq0a44s6trlhkbdoglivo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs) ** **My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's**** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. **[I'm writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z10dljoskpamdnl1uddnrlg10rqbl9p512m0eoqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs) ** If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ** **And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we'll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0es8bc3u215ho0ch29ultmu4lr2q5cl311ijdu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we're certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you're able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. **[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zogp2ubhgfdsjcgd6pq0lbsb1dgan85488it3r6o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs) ** Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi00lhfnrrah9uarfi5neje6jv2i70au0q1gfeco_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a "Stop Soros Law" and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu91ud5s9t2st22a4pjasidptj3c274a7jum6kko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9739qa5vdcdm05pbnjho1fhatb1vjuik1ccnl3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg3ol4upjab2dmlj56988rh6qltbehngekdvoee0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgor3sj3q42s1sfb036oaeec3m0jqmq6rrkc19gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr4cth2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---

His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system... ...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we're certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you're able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman AMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a "Stop Soros Law" and so can we! To do it, . Thank you for taking action when action is needed! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1, Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Let’s Shame the Devil
body:
My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk’s death. America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant. With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk’s passing, “The Devil overplayed his hand.”

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1lpcf4v80nh5728ua8mjs9vknekkq2peedal8og_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs) [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z311to0e6bfnfmr1g1cb3bp02p9eoho4rtj322no_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs) Dear Patriot,

My life has changed since watching Charlie Kirk's death.

America has changed. An awakening occurred in an instant.

With that, a bright line developed between good and evil. Pastor Signorelli wrote after Charlie Kirk's passing, "**The Devil overplayed his hand**."

Evil is exposed, out in the open, mocking us, and there is no better opportunity than now to Shame the Devil.

**In honor of Charlie Kirk, that 's exactly what we're going to do**. [**I ask that you join me in an unprecedented operation**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9if8a71lpaq6d55ar8vcrkhdqva6cnfsgdd8j1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs) to **expose the wicked, evil, depraved, and wrathful souls who are grooming our high school and college students with their agendas of hate**.

The students who debated Charlie with indignant intolerance were educated by teachers and professors who were too cowardly to stand in front of Charlie Kirk themselves.

It's time for America to see who these educators are.
**Through our non-profit, the Citizen Journalism Foundation, we 'll be giving hidden camera equipment to students across the nation and providing them with the training, legal and ethics training they will need to do their part to Shame the Devil.**
[**Please, donate to help cover the costs of this massive operation**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi21gd3glqsumfui12r8ctvrpquke3msiq1j53hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs).
Our staff is booking the largest facility we can find in Arizona to train and equip students for **the day after Charlie Kirk 's funeral**.

This is where we start, and [**I cannot do this without you**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbtvms0abnk1jolj90qoln0bot5s5qjacecjd448_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs).
Some may believe that the Devil does not exist, but I think the following quote from an old movie:
**" The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn't exist."**
The teachers, professors, and administrators we hope to expose are advancing an agenda that corrupts the minds of our youth, playing right into the Devil's hand.

This is our opportunity, "Shame the Devil" by exposing the playbook and the players behind it.

Millions of America's students are standing by. They want our direction. They want our guidance to do something that matters. **They want to do good**.

This is where I need to ask a favor of you. This campaign is going to conservatively cost $250,000 to get off the ground. We must equip, train, and prepare thousands of students for this to have the type of impact worthy of Charlie's legacy. [**I can 't do that without your help**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv9ddi2n4dd10bbtup5iuseg3khgjkic5sevoej0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs).

[**Let 's give them the direction, equipment, and training, and unleash these young lions of truth**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z24i0qd8l8om96vh5irl0f63ejemi9il2s9tihfo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5gm9pr0c3h2bs).

I appreciate anything you can do. Thank you for everything.

In Truth, James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztqrj86t1ll09psk70vrajl1b6urv0r9k6o045ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrh4afthkudujp4v5evtpcga2h8d2p9ub4dql4r0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi9rqa7e5isbqhgpe8e9p4t4p1gmksmdmj3gv0a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5vf9h0mcjccpjr9a83e8ide962jdmb5ouva94g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcnpk145gndh8p90g8kfb1h8r1gvqf1r5gq4rq7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1g9pfmp0d70fs968fi9fcjg2igpvf2h2jqctd8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh9le55n2a30372vd64dr3nqt5lpmdpnd1g6svj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqj514cfv8g2hqtpmaoh3bghv178gm5k20jku6t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z52bsucaf1m31o68sd5kcq3n6njbjm723rl70srg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z82665rn6erh9aepvjofrao9hutcbi0spvk3d81o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zht45ap7n8bhiosudtkbjgq4oah3di4s4gil55mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfnuv6n97fpcivo20kkqc5qh4uhc6q7coo793lk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl91l38ev9r0mgdomvob2gmvmslcrtcbg904l2bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6s7mgqhl9gn8ljngl5l5831kli6to1v25do6nrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
Patriot,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Patriot, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn7sho8v2s9o4t1qr8qs6lqap90c27bdi32etd4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Patriot...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhmv6vlv89ltgpdg1o4doq8kclfn3ho2p64ftlb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Patriot, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znfpmas2e7h1fhdna8bbnnija0na14ggf1u9hggg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5pcfjd2e8fqqifdm1svuuirf4mt7o5q7luo0p70_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0a3s9524glbjq074k1junvh1en6s1n15t31tov0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z09uu4366o2nv0it5eu2i4d8dd4q1qn98vmeq8p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7gahihtdfs0akmel3g8h61d3n5rlo6afhkaf6b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zua9dnrffucv61jipsl5g6fmhcd9rcm34cos5mb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zim8tvqa8bfcg3toasj2ta8o86ire973a1volnu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdb60pdlj6i9kf5gu3achs883d427ub51v7q08vo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)** Patriot, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Patriot, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh1krbo17mfoaf56ask53flmoku40f75nfr2qao0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Patriot.**God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgbrcanmic3idrtt403kfv0a3d8qfn022qvo6mb8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob4stgmaob246h22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdkiad8ekt5vaas353ltv4kbd94b0j8n9c6tg9s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn2p5ns7m52f2789ueoomkc6o5kbrgsdgcv926i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Hannah Henriksen
subject: Jonny did the right thing but he hasn’t been the same since
body:
A good deed shouldn’t destroy your life

| | | [View this email in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9c9k8efqe9p04ivas62aienoo94gdni1pd3u3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztnriq0odiqaej0d6k7phjt8pkfepnrl47ej4mmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
Friend,

Have you ever had a good deed backfire on you? If so, then you might know what it’s like to be Jonny McCoy.

**Jonny McCoy is an insurance lawyer, a patriot, an upstanding citizen, and a good friend.**

When he got a late-night call from a lawyer buddy asking to be picked up at a bar – Jonny didn’t hesitate to help.

After making sure his friend's tab was settled, Jonny stepped out of the bar and saw that in those few minutes, his inebriated friend had dug himself a deeper hole and was in the process of being arrested on the sidewalk.

Jonny approached and asked the arresting officers which precinct they would be taking his friend to.

_**Big mistake!**_

The security camera footage shows that, _in less than 20 seconds_ after Jonny approached the police, with his hands up, and asked his question, **the officers put Jonny in handcuffs on the charge of interfering with an arrest** , and took him to jail.

The next two days would fundamentally alter the trajectory of his life...

Jonny’s story demonstrates the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness. That’s why I’m emailing you today.

At Respect America, we use our platform to highlight a particular type of human suffering that is often overlooked.

Through the use of real and up-close human experiences, Respect America will memorably demonstrate the effects of coercion, theft, and violence on human happiness, inspiring people to seek solutions that increase harmony and prosperity.

[Help Respect America share stories like Jonny McCoy’s to help create a better and freer world for all of us by donating below >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9f5e4qm09lppdmon55t5jhtmbli640apkecvo28_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqjq3oj2r34fm8nq67l7klls68i39l7p0um1ga18_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
For two days, Jonny sat in jail even though he had committed no crime.

Then his experience went from bad to worse.

**On his second night in jail, Jonny was subjected to an even greater horror. Another inmate hanged himself, committing suicide right in front of Jonny’s cell.**

As Jonny recalled, _“It was hours that this dude lay in front of our cell. Hours. I don't know how to explain it, really, but when you are restrained in a cinderblock room and the only window is pointing to a dead guy who took his life... I started banging my head against the wall... I lost it. That was it.**That was the end of the person I was before.** ”_ Though the city would eventually settle with Jonny over his wrongful arrest, there was a greater price to pay.

He had mental struggles that he kept quiet, worried it would get in the way of his career: “I was afraid that the bar would find out. I was afraid my clients would find out. So I kept it in until I attempted suicide.”

[You can watch the full version of Jonny’s story and support Respect America by clicking below. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5tpoiikj61kgtjck77qt2kfbtm52qsrcpte48gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
[Hear Jonny's Story](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0rp779f9re9gqrto2o8cf67cbtet9d8p58et0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
Stories like Jonny’s are all too common.

Sadly, these stores are often overlooked, buried, or disregarded.

This is why Respect America exists. We document these horrifying experiences of coercion, theft, and violence by the government through video testimonies and written articles that give the victims a voice.

_**Theft and violence always reduce happiness.**_

These powerful narratives put a name and a face to the human suffering caused by these intolerable mechanisms.

Our goal is to create a culture of respect and flourishing for a freer and happier America.

[You can help create a culture of Human Respect to build a flourishing and more harmonious America by donating today. >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgf4jtnt049sdnus94pv2ebu1n8h6pjr3t7pm82o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9usn4h0qnph09e2csf74io3spi5ct9gdjv304o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z71oaab2i0ho5rlagfb4ggcg1ovjdtoicuqi8k30_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg99rfsk79m6l1ghu2ikuiuonsj2kdc09b9b1v0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdd99ukan9qd29rddlndla9sd2i52aq2oltgvf5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zse76efe44r74lt59s7psnng3bj2ajj5acmqal10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq3afgj4q1hmubjohvb3om5kh6625oqipemlukc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)

Thank you,

Hannah Henriksen

**P.S. You might be wondering, “What happened to the arresting officers?”**

While their police incident report accused McCoy of grabbing an officer and getting in their faces – a claim easily disproven by the video of the event – they have faced no accountability.

_**None of these officers was reprimanded for their actions in 2009, and there is no reason to believe they would not qualify for taxpayer-funded pensions.**_

A local news station reported that nearly a year after the State Law Enforcement Division announced an investigation into the allegations of officer misconduct (_**during the McCoy case**_), there is no record that an investigation ever took place.

They didn’t even have to offer an apology...

** Can you believe it?!**

Respect America believes that everyone deserves Human Respect.

[If you agree, then please help us share stories like Jonny’s so others won’t have to endure the same degrading experiences by donating today. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7qogpjap1jdk3pg2v5ci5a6gsaij03kt7u4r74o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmg00592sc7sjgvdnhgbg7pb0pmuadk3bh20n320_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs) _Respect America Foundation is a Section 501(c) (3) charitable organization. Our EIN is: 86-4617492. No goods or services were provided in exchange for your contribution._
---
| |
---
|
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4dejrqbd0672n7iirigosfq8ldn6k2j2n34rni0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cjjm2pb4c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj7iiualf8sirm4ad6ml0cumsviuk8nc3mqfa8lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocdpk87qbdnmm88t18af0iajibd568ffo6ft9so_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z331lu7kn74ek909ttg9aqpj0nku9r1c2o608hro_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zptgnp5vnrn2nv7acqa8dqna2qge0hhen9eusau8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdkrr2u4eo2f7pnvj9hcuutoedvule4j3mk63v8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqd4jm8qbpvori3jv6tbjodq6q4ftanl5dki6tjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7jl6seb5o5js29lqmek058emq79mqdju4aia1lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8s7bt5ckk3ctdon9v123hsec5njnnfeeprgvjao_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im4ob4c5h2bs)
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s weird to be on the other side of one of these messages.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-gwQlQqr4A)**I just want to say I'm sorry, Peter. You deserve better.**
You've probably already gotten 50 texts today from folks asking for your hard-earned dollar & the last thing you want to deal with is another politician looking for a handout.
I get it because I also get those on my phone and laptop. So being the sender this time feels a little awkward.
**This is Troy Downing. I'm a combat veteran, husband, father & conservative Congressman fighting to advance President Trump's agenda.**
Not in a million years did I ever expect to hold federal office.
But when I saw how things were being run in DC, I felt a responsibility to act.
_Now I'm bringing Montana values to the Beltway._
This midterm cycle isn't just another election. It's the key to who controls the House - continuing the MAGA agenda or succumbing to a radical liberal takeover.
Democrats have huge sums of cash slated to crush MAGA Republicans like me.
**__They've already funneled massive amounts into House races to wipe out every conservative standing in their way.__**
They can't stand a candidate with my profile – someone who's served our country & isn't afraid to shake up the status quo.
But no matter how hard they come after me, I won't back down.
**_Here's the bottom line:_ **_a win for someone like me will bring us one step closer to protecting our conservative majority._
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[ I hate to ask, but the fate of America's future is in your hands... Can you take a leap of faith with a combat vet & chip in to my campaign today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._xCUkrqQ68PCvcdTDALepA)[DONATE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Vg)If you can't contribute, I understand. Just know that your prayers mean the world to me.
Thank you and God bless,
Troy| |
---
