name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zli6vhr5jg7a6mpncmsfiomn11uupr5bfl8juh88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zs9iotagr252ush9nlupvtq12ae0ujh3onhrlr78_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c1h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znj4pi05h0mb105p7t5nlisjubeu3ie3hp920bj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c1h2bs)
---

__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgfkl10mn6uh327sk8lib43s2fss9edkmv1isqv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c1h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.

Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcfg8vmgo15kg7lvebp1cmj17q5ujr49refo2bu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdp8m0j31iqqa3vrbc3bapqtl5t9dtl56l5qglb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c9h2bs)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdk7p8vi6ldmjahg2oobqtglmfno2f2l8rbl4h58_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5imcpj2c9h2bs)

That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu017e2k9chaf8fqigss3v5l4pfo8t4gfrqfl4s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
Patriot,Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us.And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today.Patriot, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfa83gu0p2ku65cfjcm0hohc624lnv05a7b9doro_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️To give you perspective, Patriot...Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv11pj09tff3sfomef6t9kh2vv08p7i6ashfs8r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
He always believed this day would come.He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America.And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.And more beautiful than we can even describe.**Again, Patriot, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request.And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: **✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhojvue0j0r24pp2tsu6nv72r67s2q404trmu1v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhsdo42rps19uut75c0mh4vlhh0a22fmjb51dbdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znemgqt1pikcgavk959v016i615s7uve2oh3d4n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhhaf3ifuc7gplm9f2bbjup6p8cliig5t98kaa0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqn856o74hf2q2b77k5n32d380o5obhqahipcu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfi9d3108449ouhm4ndc7isim11a82a9m08s8dvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zug3126c4663c3cgi77idj1uihbe8t58rd31i0oo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
Also...**Here 's one more powerful thing you can do:**📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter...**Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7fp8p8a2mpmegue7na22cpggl5a0pe1g5v6qc88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)** Patriot, if you've already given... If you've already donated...If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week...If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...**Thank you.** We can never say it enough.If you've read this far, we want you to know this...**You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. **God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Patriot, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers.Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor...And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible.**Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4v7ikigd4gnpskp6us66vepil98ru0gl0htjcq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Patriot.**God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znhm88iarjq8085sdjtlsjc62iqkc7u6gp8qr9p0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62p77c5hm6oh1k8gn48n24hjmao71clhm0ob0c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ajtc10v8c4pu5pv7dj8pcd6rlqk5nv80r13rvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c1h2bs)_

name: Kendall Qualls
subject: Minnesota could flip red
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Kendall Qualls for Governor Committee | PO Box 235, Stillwater, MN 55082
body:
Here’s how we make it happen

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqt5848bae0ncjgns57hdbegl87uc1pocaiutq08_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
---
| | Friend,
I’m Kendall Qualls, a Conservative outsider running for governor of Minnesota to defeat far-left Democrat Tim Walz and stop his dangerous, radical agenda.
**[Before you read any further, I have to ask,**_will you chip in $25, $50, or anything you can today to help me win this critical race?_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo3vm8uufh2rindqf357f2e7jjtejhnh46074gl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)**

---
[CHIP IN NOW →](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrke3eddq009ah4ic8ttid6v2ur6744khimm0d98_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
| | Walz’s record is a warning for America: **higher taxes, bigger government, weaker public safety, and divisive social policies.**
If he wins again, Democrats will point to Minnesota as proof their radical playbook works, and copy it in other states.
**I know what real opportunity looks like because I’ve lived it.** From growing up in poverty to serving as a U.S. Army officer to leading in the private sector, I’ve never been part of the political establishment. _I’m ready to take it on._
This race isn’t just about Minnesota. **It’s about proving Conservative leadership can still win, even in a blue state.**
But to do that, I need a national wave of support right now.
**If Conservatives across America rally behind this campaign, we can shock the political class, flip Minnesota red, and send a message the left will never forget.**
**_[Will you chip in a donation to support our campaign today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0eqe53amji7v5ek9p9cbu2447hd945dagke70lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)_**

---
[DONATE $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zevshvo5prn7qaonr47gn337fm5anamvvm84p7ng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
[DONATE $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp39bf91kt4ak0krrueu6g61g5kt94i1p8e7svuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
[DONATE $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsj0gegk0r02sdoh665lm1k847vcaivcr1sp42i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
[DONATE ANY AMOUNT](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8lc3cvod4qt17mtr98moi1pfriaqktgjeupugio_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
| | Thank you for standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely, Kendall Qualls
Candidate for Governor of Minnesota

---
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjmqk394tl8e1p6vi371q1fqrqvaifu0jrgriut0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
---

My name is Kendall Qualls. I wasn’t born into privilege or power. I was raised in Harlem, New York, in the 1960s; a child of divorce and one of several siblings living in public housing. Before I reached middle school, I moved to a trailer park in Oklahoma to live with my father. Neither of my parents finished high school.
I didn’t take shortcuts. I worked full-time to put myself through college. I used student loans and paid them back in full. I served as an officer in the United States Army. I earned an MBA from the University of Michigan. Then, I spent 30 years leading teams and driving innovation in the healthcare industry — rising to become Global Vice President of an $850 million business unit.
Now, I’m running for Governor of Minnesota to make sure that the principles that lifted me - hard work, faith, family, personal responsibility, and the free enterprise system - are preserved, defended, and passed on to the next generation.
We don’t need more government. We need more opportunities.
That’s what I’m fighting for, and I need your help. [Can I count on your support today?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkps1gj6ak10pv3m64fl9qne53nkhof03sa6nnng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
With gratitude,Kendall Qualls

[DONATE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgjo32i03v5losp80nn0l6hin3eh1lanb826cfl0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhivgof6nde8lfhmq16neum0063gjg2veghh7m3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)
---
| | **The fight to take back Minnesota is on, and every day counts.**
_[Shop the official Kendall Qualls Store today and wear your support with pride.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmlrmi334v1u3tjhdpdihlqic7gbm6g4nncmdftg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)_
When you get your gear, you’re making a statement that goes far beyond what you wear. It’s a message to Tim Walz that Minnesotans are ready for new leadership, safer communities, and a restored American Dream. Your support helps fuel Kendall’s campaign and spreads his vision of conservative leadership everywhere you go.
Join the movement. Show your pride. Let’s win this together.

---
[SHOP THE STORE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zis963orsatd2k3tvjoouc26135tisve3dhp84lg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o36cdh2bs)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z439rfbi47r46uo2jt3ln5n2vv5odimkonkropj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6rbs2959ouej5vir4akgo1gq232kbj18c2fi3c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zts3325upamrm5ipg28qeuf218a89oscq3ggiefg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6i7qu4v7brjeq1d9hlpd7vnq6296gu4ja60aqo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze97ph5i5npioknk0qikulplf4aicsgc0njgcp98_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv2022el9r64is319ihgmu7ivp5d2avr7f5vsbe0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0s5im6o31c9h2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Benedict Arnold](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGupCAUxvGnwQ4DKCoFxTZ2s-2WBuEwng3CBE7G9e03c3Pf4Na_5PuS_5_H9nCYMD9_uxMsxbJluFoCIqjb23mPGWKCf7hjQrp9SQmesCmhNBeGK7kFh-nexi7YCKBg6MDKWS_jaKSYusNKNy77FJ2fpInROwlS7zpo5xa1m7B0aD9rwigphdBC92aYZzUYr4YoxTQBGwUEpFL7vwUzHRDTXd5Qe1_OLtmD6NXY8Iuplan1uq7-wEal3h9naqUDGw_u5pj5tzC17pAhoCfuai4pcF_OE6lxquBayV214XVhStimmY3ieTpMX4f0o0pvq_4HAAD__yVqfeg) plotted to hand over West Point to the British in exchange for money and a high position in the British army. ## Panel Backs Softer Vaccine Guidance
A Centers for Disease Control and Prevention advisory panel [declined](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdF6NxwaeC4o0dC9tSuRnD7uTNfbKjCD79xFRlB9Ic6urc3Xuj8_lM3Dmcv8eNppkrUuhc88kQm05QoxcaM30i784s7xjzZnutCBgr8FrNEsKnN-L69K0EiHZjiYz9h_OeQND95iM_QhuBDRoRxedI1wHvxKYuJrozNjxdNHAozEAPfQ3b8cRrY9oVwPDQMoBJZbabj8rF3nQmt_1oHaLdevy9BB57cp-UzgrnM_zvL1qZuFYr4LC-TJSOF8rCmfwCmdzxZNKofTe9V9PHdLBO7VdH1VIS9WNtnqQ_sqhPEl0o1i3jUoKwrVoeQTRNSdqOmzUOIay6zuJDjrWg5M2_h8aoB-tBd-1Kb1Ozpn3YVQO7lvg_EdE_uv9Y8LfAQAA__-zjpjM) to specifically recommend COVID-19 vaccines, saying the shot should be a matter of personal choice. The panel also voted to recommend delaying the use of the combined measles, mumps, rubella, and chickenpox vaccine, [favoring](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdDzZY2MehYs0dJs2JfIbj_FEA0ZgvQ1_H22UP9j6SvfonF8fy0dk4X39GTcKLddlp89LqDU6l3dE5J2y0B9-sXC7sYrQSgtoGHo99WCWFFnuxXUpZCIg21Ew4_B0bjLadyU4eE0YjUd4DU9H2Y2Y0-Q9ZBqfqE3H4etNT2CM1oMeHpMdR7ATgs1Ge0_KaUrc6vn4XXlvhbLc9U3nA-vWSSitHZeyPxTMCuZWqLDI16ZgPqow3grmQlFawXiSgnkYjLXW9xH56E_Cum20p6vHwpJKran_b95jiftKl4K5O0M6PlmELz8qp9ct8j9K176V7R3gbwAAAP__A5uBVw) two separate vaccines instead. The panel's recommendations will go to CDC administrators for their review. Earlier this year, U.S. Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. replaced all of the previous members of the panel as part of the Trump administration's HHS reforms.
## Trump Seeks $100K Per Visa
President Trump signed a proclamation that aims to require companies to [pay](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urTAQhJ8GOqP18ndduLgN3UmbEhmzPmxkbGQ7kPP2ESnyAplyRhrNfO-P-WHYc3i-mZ10cXEOdGVPpVCaT2MtB3Kevnhhz-Vlo_f0pBkBewFKoJxXw_41d_WqHRFSW5OWY_-v65SEod70OsCwkFMKRmuUVUjoYFAOQFlr27FmfbeBQikBeugb1Y4jtspi6yQMA1Ud0MolpuYjcigbOf-KJ6XGxr32eivlyFX7v8Kpwum6riYs9n5x5xVOR_Rc2OYKp5I-90OYdefAuSRTOIZfOxnOlIUjEpuQizg5mywk3BLJBoMt9tjXSa_Hxd5zHsaqg-du2P9MKX_id2r8DgAA___jIYQ1) a yearly $100,000 fee for each H-1B visa worker they employ. H-1B visas enable skilled workers from overseas to temporarily work in the U.S., and currently carry an annual fee of between $1,700 and $4,500. Last year, Amazon was the [leading recipient](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ_GdKD1Yv64cPE1dPe1KZGx18dGC5zAgdzbR-QVMtVII81ofh-P8eFZeH3-9wu5nLZxpesQypn28fQh8EpJ6JsnFs7vsInQk0YEbEqwJeoxepb3aIroEhFSXZDTXdMbYzW0xey0NbY2hnqIfZyavoHWBkgGaYLY-1Cwu9vAotYADTSVrbsOaxuwThralpQBipy3vfrceM0zJXlvJ-1V2JZC3Jzz61D1P4WDwuG6ripMx_3izhUOt1U45P1reZWznsqTD19OLFJquFUmIoVDsbv4uliEj7ZTBp6LZ_ndyH8Cczr8CQAA___IyHVW) of H-1B visas with more than 10,000 granted, followed by Tata Consultancy, Microsoft, Apple, and Google. Tech companies overall bring in about [85,000 foreign workers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp8GOkfjwfy4cLENXbbdEhl7nMxqwAgccvP2V9xXuPWRvqPv_LtPd8_C6-OvX8iVlKeV3odQKbRPpw-BV0pCXzyzcPmELEIPmhCwVWAV6il6ls9k6ugSEVJTk9N9OxhjNXT10xnAOZmZ-i6kOQ0pAUEThyH4HtoBTc3uWgOLWgO00N5s0_fY2IBN0tB1VBmgyCXvt_-Z1_KkJJ980n4LeanFPUvZjqr5U-FY4ei368CFKhyFT6pwjHn1ElXZX8umLqxeW_SFDmWVturS17uL25tF-Oj6ysBj8Sw_gvKrKqfD7wAAAP__MQx1Ww) each year.
## Farmers' Almanacs Give Fall Forecasts
_The Old Farmer's Almanac_ calls for [a warm, dry fall](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1yhCAURp8GOx24-EdBkcZu06Z0WLzoTa7gIFmzb5_ZvEL6b75z5nzc5psjpri-ux1tCWmOeJ2MpWCeH857ihgYf-hOTOXpEzOuOIOErpamBjUvjvg5t9ViAyKgrtCqoRvb1ijZV5uVZuydCnLo7yNK7TtvujGgDndUix6hIvt6kwaUkrKTXWP0MIA2HnRQsu9RtBIXKik3n4li2TDwMz0wNz7tFdutlOMU-k3AJGC6rqtZU1q29H3iF-JBcX0NBUxMAQVMrh9MB2bUAqbg8o75rB3vLjpfB8dcHxkX8oVSrF9mAqYq2-W4iJnOfhCtXHdH_Icv_2r2sPAbAAD__wL7fyY) for much of the U.S. A separate publication, _The Farmers' Almanac_ , offers its own forecast. You can find its 2025 Autumn Outlook map [here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTQAeyx8ZA4eI16fLaLdHEjJNZDXZkrBBuv8peYftfX_F_XZcrsnC6_8eNfI15SXTsQrVSWV4YAieKQm--sXA9QxahOy2gYOjU3IFeVmQ5F9uuPhIBmZa8HofJ2lkr1z78aGdnkOxEY3BmgptRk3HoFA3TTbuhZf_R1AxaKzWooZ_NOIKZA5iolXPUWEUr11z678ypPijKmV9U-pC3Vvyj1ufemH8NXBq4HMfRRywblR1lw4ThkzVwiSjS0btSWmntYi4UcK9t8evzYBHe3dhYdd-Q5Reuf7rx8vATAAD__10kc4M). Fall officially [arrives](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAUhZ8Gb47g4p8wMHTxlq4dLQKX-FY3kBgSJ29fpVXVB-h6jnR0vu_jMB8cMaXTuzujrTHPCbfCWCuu8915Twkj44OOxFSfPjPjCWeQ0LfStKDm4Iifc9cEGxEBdYNWjf2-64ySQ7NYddTHsB9G5bXq3T6iHkIM2kgA6GXnGrKvNWlAKSl72e-MHkfQxoOOSg4Dik5ioJrX3WemVBeM_Mx3XHc-nxu2S62XIvSbgEnAtKGry08nYCqeMHn8y1t8XNhRwrUImF6sAqZfGmXa6JhbvN4o5Ud7vWGplFNpXSobrhia1YbLRsxUhlF08nR2xN8_6r_k3S18BQAA__-4moNV) on Monday with the autumnal equinox, when the axis of the Earth aligns so that neither hemisphere leans toward or away from the Sun. _The Old Farmer's Almanac_ uses metrics from solar science, climatology, and meteorology for its predictions, claiming [an 80% accuracy rate](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQBU8jdRSWS33MgkUad06bUlhTS4vBSjQoxoxvHzjIDVK_hxlgPi7zhaLE_fZOG7sS0rxzPYRL4Tw_yPu4cxD-jtcosTx9EuEbzwg4KLAK9bxQlOfct4sLzMimZaen4dT3VsPYrk4jnKyZesOgNUIYOFgCvHoKPJnr0Eb3ooFFrQEGGDprpgmN9WiChnHkpgdeYkm5-0xxLysHeaYH586nrRW3lnI_GvPW4LnBc621I9loJ__aGzyvqSry_itTYZVkUYHyxvlQf7dDVaayclYhZfZ0lDa75V6jSDzGqenhtlGUX1v5V6KHw58AAAD__5d9e8A).

**Whatever happened to Telephone Books?** There was a time in America when households were sure to have at least one telephone book, and probably two: White Pages for residential and Yellow Pages for businesses.

Today, you’d be hard-pressed to find a phone book anywhere, and [technology is only partly to blame](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAURp8Gd4zgYrApKNK427QpLX6uxzeLYWTIOH77aPcVUn-fjo7Or4_1w1Om8vzpD3R9q2vBq2XsHc_17WOkglvGvxQoU79jzRmfuIIAzYXlINfkKd_rOCS3IQKqAZ2c9DyOVgoz7G7zClDaEGLCgF7hbEwAGYw0CgKEgdwXTViQUggt9MOqaQJlI6hNCmOQjQIT9Xo-flcqfcct3_WN5yPWY8hu7_3VmPrBYGGwXNf1uPr-PTJY_NkpZmSwHLXgzWAJfxoVbI3BEuvx8oWw8duXTx7rmfiJjRKWTj7z114L8lDr59dbK8lt0KOetOezxsRHTInPyc7c-gknZY1JIIfTpddFOVMzExvF8_CUv137fwV-O_gXAAD__1Fzji0).

In the 1990s, the Yellow Pages were an $11 billion ad medium. The business grew until 2007, when an invention arrived that would change the world: the iPhone.

Within five years, U.S. smartphone ownership was approaching half of the population. As landlines faded and internet searches grew, the value of phone books dwindled. Additionally, privacy expectations led many to stop listing phone numbers and addresses, and the cost and waste of printing and delivering so many directories grew exorbitant.

What’s left today are niche/opt-in directories (often for rural areas or seniors), plus online “yellow pages” sites. For most, our “phone book” is searching for contacts on our smartphones. _Do you miss phone books at all? Do you still have any old ones? Let us know by replying to this email._

Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie Kirk: A life of faith. A legacy that endures.
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69954&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69954]

Friend,

Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life...

He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with
truth.

With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a
generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above
all, to point people back to God.

And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._

No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he
started.

Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind
— _and the calling that now belongs to us._

WE MADE THIS TRIBUTE TO HONOR THE MAN WHO GAVE EVERYTHING... AND TO
REMIND THE WORLD THAT HIS MISSION WILL PRESS ON:

# Sunday, September 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1931, actor [Larry Hagman](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SgyAURp8GOx24AZWCYhu7bLulg3JVJvxk4G5M3n4neYVtv-I7Z87Pdb5aH3zav21EQ88tzwnPGpAIy1zJOv8bo71hfmBZcwi445bzDBxUy3ULYnbWh9csG2cW7rRo0IhBjVJBr6A5zMoV9KOQTuvlAuvY90q7xY0aBnnhy9h48z7jGoQQXArejZtYNehhE6pXXK5McnSecunoQMKnrVt4vX26NccmmIPoXtnli8HEYDrPs6N62JyCT9jlsjOYDpvckvONwYSJisf6GfdoUxtsKa822kI-NcW4--lD8LUfmOR7tD58MPS_OA8DfwEAAP__8Fh5hg) was born in Fort Worth. ## State Leads Nation In Job Growth
A [report](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ywyAQxfHToM4MbEAfBUUadU6bkgGxkpgsxgPYsm-fUa6QC_zmvf_31V5dpHjbvlxC015rtjc8KmFrWGxtLsRHSu4H8xPLkolwwzVnCwL0RUwXkDa4SG-rumC8CJPs0MhBj0pDr6HbjfcjBOG9kh7Q44C97t2iRhgwgNehi-bExARSSqGk4OMqlwmmYZW610ItTAkMseXC244NX66u9D738CWnjsze2r2yj08GM4P5OA7uqfItPxnM5xlekNBVZDCTe1R-K4LvLXXFhPsRiWLtB6bEllykP7L9L8TTwG8AAAD__55fctc) from the Bureau of Labor Statistics showed Texas led the nation in job gains over the previous 12 months, adding 195,600 nonfarm payroll jobs. Gov. Greg Abbott [celebrated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2SozAQhJ9GZKKkscRPoOASMl96ITWgEehWIBeaxfbbb-FX2Li7vvq6_93HO8YU9-UvbuT4FfK407MkYqZjLIw-fm8bflE-6ZhzSrRQyHkEBVaqXoIePcb0Hk3l3aR8rytyurWdsdBYqFYXAk7tzd6M1wCdBW_mZpoabCdA3RmqortgqgettTJa1V3Qcw99G7RtrDKzMIp85HzUvBLTC0tI78unnvNWJbcyP4q4_REwCBiWfNafUr3kU8BwzREwPHJhAcMnkYnQF4kpycLIVGTIh_yfpyIXjDt5edFlwsJSg9zyzmupDucfz5hSLE0rjFo2jOljwL_77XTwEwAA___S5oOC) the gains while noting his appointment of a director for the Texas Regulatory Efficiency Office. The office aims to help keep the job growth going by slashing regulations and increasing state agencies' efficiency. In August, Texas [added](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SnDAQRk8jMlGtX0SgwAnZOnVI6afFyCvQlpCHndu7mCts_Kpfvf7-fKwfLpd8bL_djrZ_p7oeeJ0Fe8e2nt3F_G_f3SfWJ7ZQS8ENU60rB64ozJSzNbpcXqscovUQZzagZZMyUnGt-PCwnmltosGIXkwBBHNMMA8hJS84CjNke8tg5owxkAxGk1iY-TwlprQCGYgEjLnXNvYHdvx2Zyqvu2cMdR-KffT-dRLxi_CF8OW6rvEz4NGfNyZ8ca3nUJDw5f6M8KXU4MoNvK-907eRNgy1RVqcr42m2gJSd0T6t3q6uXzcdwqAaikcMK0oU1FSKXygBiFSM6mkkBunFQzNxq8rl5JPPREJ2-5yebf2ny38tPx_AAAA__-Gc42b) 17,600 nonfarm jobs—the most of any state—and reported its labor force grew to 15.9 million. You can read the full employment report [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ywyAQxfHToM4MbEAfBUUadU6bkgGxkpgsxgPYsm-fUa6QC_zmvf_31V5dpHjbvlxC015rtjc8KmFrWGxtLsRHSu4H8xPLkolwwzVnCwL0RUwXkDa4SG-rumC8CJPs0MhBj0pDr6HbjfcjBOG9kh7Q44C97t2iRhgwgNehi-bExARSSqGk4OMqlwmmYZW610ItTAkMseXC244NX66u9D738CWnjsze2r2yj08GM4P5OA7uqfItPxnM5xlekNBVZDCTe1R-K4LvLXXFhPsRiWLtB6bEllykP7L9L8TTwG8AAAD__55fctc).
## Colleges Among Best for Entrepreneurs
Two Texas universities rank in the top 100 schools in the world for entrepreneurs, with the University of Texas at Austin in the top 10, according to a [Pitchbook study](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2TgyAU_DXYmQECGguKa-xy7ZUMwkPfBCUDLx_--xtTXX_FVruzXz9Xe3WYcJu_3QqG3jHbDV41AREUW8kFfKyru0F-QvE5JZgh5mwll7rlQyuFDQ7TblUTzMTDIBowotcXpWWnZbMY1UUX4qS7fuKBf3DuwhlguIDyXjdoDjM-SCEEV4KfLlH4QQ59FLrTXHmmOASkXE60AMHb1Zj2o8_J57VJZiG6V3b-YnJkcrwj-WXK-XawTI7HHCZHVwh9gvpX0T42fEKpSHtb3HbDba5NMeH-wpSwdj1TfF4dpk8Q_e-ep5G_AQAA__9o9nwV). The University of Texas at Austin ranks No. 8 and Texas A&M at No. 76 in the report that analyzed colleges for the amount of venture capital raised by their alumni. In the past decade, the University of Texas has produced 850 graduates who have helped launch 774 venture capital-backed companies, raising a combined $24 billion from investors. Texas A&M has graduated 253 students involved in 233 companies, raising $5.8 billion. You can see the full report and rankings [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2TgyAU_DXYmQECGguKa-xy7ZUMwkPfBCUDLx_--xtTXX_FVruzXz9Xe3WYcJu_3QqG3jHbDV41AREUW8kFfKyru0F-QvE5JZgh5mwll7rlQyuFDQ7TblUTzMTDIBowotcXpWWnZbMY1UUX4qS7fuKBf3DuwhlguIDyXjdoDjM-SCEEV4KfLlH4QQ59FLrTXHmmOASkXE60AMHb1Zj2o8_J57VJZiG6V3b-YnJkcrwj-WXK-XawTI7HHCZHVwh9gvpX0T42fEKpSHtb3HbDba5NMeH-wpSwdj1TfF4dpk8Q_e-ep5G_AQAA__9o9nwV).
## $140M Cotton Bowl Upgrades Await Fairgoers
After 18 months of construction and $140 million in upgrades, the newly renovated Cotton Bowl will [take center stage](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-O4yAQx_GnwR0WTMB_Copr3OXaKy0M4xgdZiJ7NiRvv_K-wtZfafSZ37_7fPcpp_L463d0_F5pLljPjMx4zCf7mL723f9HeuERKGd84Eo0gwIr1ShBz9Gn_JlNE92i4qgbdLq3g7HQWWg2d-s6tHFRuu_9EpQFVHpAHYbV9B2AapK7jqkRtNbKaNUOqw4jjP2qbWeVCcIojInpaHlDxrc_1_y5PG2gvcluY36e4vZHwCRgqrW2ZQlxrVcWMF3_CJgyBZ-vvnk-ZcEqU5G8oQy0PzMyRqmN2mUgZipyoZrlgYVenhMVAdPtEoIWMDWHi8-ack5n1wujHrtP-QfDv5vw5eA7AAD__xuPhOc) when the State Fair of Texas opens on Friday at Fair Park in Dallas. A [ribbon-cutting ceremony](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuuozAQhp_GdCB7wFwKF9vQZdstkbHHibWGiewJJG9_RF7h1L_-2_fvttxsTHG__7UbGn4HWnY8S0JmzEth6-Nr2-x_pAOzo5TwjoFoAQm6llMNavE2ps_SVd6s0k-qQqMGPXYaeg3Vw_RWTWFs11brAfpVuzb4afBq0BLG0PZVNFeYnEApJTslmzEoN8E0BKV7LTsnOok-MuWGH8j4tiWkz7WncbRVyTyYn0W0fwTMAubzPBu3luvFpQuYvxYB8xE9koDZETPt9UpnqjPudFiOtJc644E2oa9pr4vlV_b2I2CusvHPM6YUSz-ITt43G9O3mn8H7DDwEwAA___vjoD-) took place on Saturday, with local leaders upbeat about the prospects of attracting more top-level events throughout the year. The largest renovation in the venue's 95 years included doubling the size of the main concourse, adding 14 escalators, expanding restrooms, and redesigning concession stands. Stadium visitors can also expect [improved Wi-Fi](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGS4yAMBuCnwR0ZoZgkFBTbuNtrr_QQEInusMkgHO--_Y3vFbZRpfm_f_7fn_Nn4MLr41dYyPevXOeVdinUO7VZeki8LUv4S_VNLdZS6EG51hkBrQan0cwpcPmexyH5OyRnBvLmam-jxYvF4ekx3WKEe0owWhuvZwfoMmZr4pkAgQb2Rxg4NMbAaOB0yyY6dNds7MXCGNUIlLjXdupP6vQVJJfvo88p1mUo_tn7S9T5Q-GkcNr3_SSv2rrcN-GVRP7Ura2hHN8Kp4_WORYShdPhKpzAKZzMcWLtva76Xvci2oyw6IN5hq1oXl6NREg0rzpzk67fTDuvD4XT0Hx67VwKy-WqRngsgf97Q__Zpm-P_wIAAP__6QyMHA) during their visits.

Perhaps you had to wait a few weeks or even months... But what if there was no appointment to be found? No doctors to treat you, and no healing possible? Sadly, this is the reality for many in the world:
* Globally, 5 billion people lack access to surgical care
* In sub-Saharan Africa, there is only one surgeon for every 200,000 people

For 45 years, Mercy Ships has been [meeting this need](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM3O2yAQRZ8G7z6LwWCbBYtIiXepKkVVu7MIHmxUMBaQH7995bRv0O0dzZkz9-d1vGrn3Tp_0wFVeds4rvjKHkvBNOaiJ_cIQf_G-MRkovc4o41xZJSJLyq_GIyTdn4feTWpO50kVKigEz0XrBWsWtT93lNK-xaBTbrjUgprgUsLlBkBuq2cOmBUMgCgHGjdWzCSyc6CaAXlhnCKkysx1WXBgm-drd8Pn9rEUHm1lLJl0pwIGwgbNp3KiqkOmMyeF7flOqb5M5iRsOHH7fJLnAAEaYZHCWOOj2SQNOfhL5Sw9ogDHp-T5nwJ2vl_odFh025eSXP-nlzQab9tcc0xHXeqpKbt5bx3ue0Ip_Ox-FEs_1fsU7E_AQAA__95L45m). With state-of-the-art hospital ships, they provide safe surgery to children and adults living with treatable conditions—and it’s completely free of charge. One of those children is Umu, who was born with a dangerous tumor on her neck. As she grew, eating became more difficult. Her mother, Yei, worried that soon breathing would get harder. As Umu's family searched for help, the tumor continued to grow. Surgery felt unreachable—until hope arrived! **[See Umu's transformation and learn how you can partner with Mercy Ships to help transform someone's life today.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM3O2yAQRZ8G7z6LwWCbBYtIiXepKkVVu7MIHmxUMBaQH7995bRv0O0dzZkz9-d1vGrn3Tp_0wFVeds4rvjKHkvBNOaiJ_cIQf_G-MRkovc4o41xZJSJLyq_GIyTdn4feTWpO50kVKigEz0XrBWsWtT93lNK-xaBTbrjUgprgUsLlBkBuq2cOmBUMgCgHGjdWzCSyc6CaAXlhnCKkysx1WXBgm-drd8Pn9rEUHm1lLJl0pwIGwgbNp3KiqkOmMyeF7flOqb5M5iRsOHH7fJLnAAEaYZHCWOOj2SQNOfhL5Sw9ogDHp-T5nwJ2vl_odFh025eSXP-nlzQab9tcc0xHXeqpKbt5bx3ue0Ip_Ox-FEs_1fsU7E_AQAA__95L45m)**

name: Tim Burchett
subject: We’ll miss you, Charlie.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
| | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
Friend, As thousands gather in Phoenix today to remember Charlie Kirk, I can’t help but feel the weight of this loss.
The last time I talked to him was the night we passed President Trump’s Big, Beautiful Bill. We laughed, talked strategy, and said we’d get together soon.
I never imagined that would be our last conversation.
My heart breaks for his wife and young kids—no family should have to carry this kind of burden, and Kelly and I will continue to pray for their peace and comfort.
Charlie’s legacy will live on, not only through Turning Point but also in the faith and patriotism he inspired us to carry forward.
Rest in paradise with our Lord and savior, Charlie. We will miss you every day.
God Bless,
Tim Burchett
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Friend, As thousands gather in Phoenix today to remember Charlie Kirk, I can’t help but feel the weight of this loss. The last time I talked to him was the night we passed President Trump’s Big, Beautiful Bill. We laughed, talked strategy, and said we’d get together soon. I never imagined that would be our last conversation. My heart breaks for his wife and young kids—no family should have to carry this kind of burden, and Kelly and I will continue to pray for their peace and comfort. Charlie’s legacy will live on, not only through Turning Point but also in the faith and patriotism he inspired us to carry forward. Rest in paradise with our Lord and savior, Charlie. We will miss you every day. God Bless, Tim Burchett | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|--- | | |

body:
We are 44 days out from this election and MAGA has already been spending millions on TV buys, canvassing, and mail. And the millions they’ve spent is only the beginning
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMC2IBdDgp7alc_sG_ZXBR_SfwOgSBvS0wQ1hdI6ej_08GZBWf8vP3yZD1WLQfT8YrImYGEKYD_QcxJBA-KKWXmrVFBjGAu2K9sKn6I_P-ncxpvjUIkynFdHoE4CwlwJoPq7zIcmGYlNk44sOVKgoJeDH9P4oMhX8dar7h7fwWY_JhIfltBhHLljjPUszoH-piw2hhNbulg27iK20H4PTgvtSPFTeL8hYqVkRArmTyw=&c=Oyaq80Y-1K3_K2y_CDXguYOquooT3v5Gfq74vx-3OWD9nEBVB8pOZg==&ch=9_UtVCdPjO9Fqwvb6erJb5VeaMEJw3Z1giV0FfhuxaRsYMFqJGB_Bg==)

| Peter,
All summer we have warned about this and now what we've feared is coming to fruition.
While Democrats have been asleep at the wheel, MAGA has been laser focused on the November 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election. An obscure race which if Democrats lose, will ensure that we never hold power here again - Pennsylvania and its 19 electoral college votes, gone for good.
Now MAGA is opening up the gates of hell in the lead up to election day.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FMC2IBdDgp7alc_sG_ZXBR_SfwOgSBvS0wQ1hdI6ej_08GZBWf8vP3yZD1WLQfT8YrImYGEKYD_QcxJBA-KKWXmrVFBjGAu2K9sKn6I_P-ncxpvjUIkynFdHoE4CwlwJoPq7zIcmGYlNk44sOVKgoJeDH9P4oMhX8dar7h7fwWY_JhIfltBhHLljjPUszoH-piw2hhNbulg27iK20H4PTqGdmA2XK1OU3PubXaW0npg=&c=Oyaq80Y-1K3_K2y_CDXguYOquooT3v5Gfq74vx-3OWD9nEBVB8pOZg==&ch=9_UtVCdPjO9Fqwvb6erJb5VeaMEJw3Z1giV0FfhuxaRsYMFqJGB_Bg==)

| | | | We are 44 days out from this election and MAGA has already been spending millions on TV buys, canvassing, and mail. And the millions they've spent so far are but a trickle compared to how bad it's going to get in the coming weeks...
Expect Presidential election type money to be spent here. $100 million+ in GOP spending is not outside of the realm of possibility.
This is MAGA's most important objective this year and we need to do everything we can to prevent them from winning this.
Defend Our Courts is spearheading the defense of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court and we are mounting a desperate counteroffensive against the absolute onslaught that MAGA is throwing at us.
[We are preparing for nothing short of a tidal wave. We need your help to brace for impact and ensure we aren't washed away. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: Charlie always believed this day would come
body:
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s2v4d2c589f)
---
Patriot, Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s3k1b3d60bb)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Patriot... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They weren’t recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s0q5d85d80c)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It’s happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Patriot, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your children’s or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t be a small task._ But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here’s how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s2o6e14dd0a)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s6v13a9085d)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s0j8d460b06)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s1r863a776a)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s5t8d30fafe)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/s7nfaa4205e)
---
Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie’s vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._t3w/scu89de77ce)
---
Also... **Here’s one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e350945/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHB1c2FzdHVkZW50cy5jb20vc3RhcnRhY2hhcHRlcg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MjE/LbmNsWWx2dTNFQQ/qP19ubGlkPU1XNnhHRm5lZlEmX25oaWRzPW5jV0dRdTdLeVV6M2tLbHM/gaM_t3w/s4u2ddd8ad4)** Patriot, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated... If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this... **You’re the reason Charlie’s mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Patriot, if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all you can give today, _we’re grateful._ But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
