name: Laura Gillen Update
subject: don’t share this please...
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and why your support is more crucial than ever.

| _Laura asked us to send a memo to our top supporters detailing the state of our race and our path to victory. Please take a moment to read it and then_ [_**contribute what you can today, so we can stay competitive in this toss-up race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115643556/570990421/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-09-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NkYWNmMi1mNDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idlI78S5cbjzkoZtPcO5ELmFqm8CvNWpnkd7NAZAAew=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115643557/570990422/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-09-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NkYWNmMi1mNDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idlI78S5cbjzkoZtPcO5ELmFqm8CvNWpnkd7NAZAAew=)
To: Laura Gillen’s Top Supporters
From: Laura Gillen Campaign Team
Subject: Our path to victory and what we need to stay competitive

Peter,

We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and [_**why your support is more crucial than ever.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115643558/570990423/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-09-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2NkYWNmMi1mNDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idlI78S5cbjzkoZtPcO5ELmFqm8CvNWpnkd7NAZAAew=)

NY-04 is one of the most competitive in the country. We flipped it blue in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are already targeting us with attack ads and throwing money into this race to take it back.

With Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and the White House, this race is about more than just one seat. It’s about retaking the House so Democrats have the power to block harmful policies, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption, and go on offense again.

Here’s the reality:
* The Cook Political Report rates this district as the only toss-up in New York
* Republicans are raising unprecedented sums, including Trump’s $1.5 billion war chest, to keep control
* For the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised
* Attack ads from Republican super PACs are already running in this district
* If we don’t meet our September FEC fundraising goal, we risk looking weak and giving a well-funded Republican challenger an advantage

_Laura’s campaign needs funding to stay competitive. It’s that simple._

Every dollar you contribute helps:
* Counter the GOP attacks and get Laura’s record in front of voters
* Build the infrastructure we need to mobilize voters and stay ahead in this race
* Ensure we have the resources to get out the vote and defend this district

clean_body: We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and why your support is more crucial than ever. | Laura asked us to send a memo to our top supporters detailing the state of our race and our path to victory. Please take a moment to read it and then = = To: Laura Gillen’s Top Supporters From: Laura Gillen Campaign Team Subject: Our path to victory and what we need to stay competitive Peter, We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and = NY-04 is one of the most competitive in the country. We flipped it blue in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are already targeting us with attack ads and throwing money into this race to take it back. With Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and the White House, this race is about more than just one seat. It’s about retaking the House so Democrats have the power to block harmful policies, hold hearings, shine a light on corruption, and go on offense again. Here’s the reality: The Cook Political Report rates this district as the only toss-up in New York Republicans are raising unprecedented sums, including Trump’s $1.5 billion war chest, to keep control For the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised Attack ads from Republican super PACs are already running in this district If we don’t meet our September FEC fundraising goal, we risk looking weak and giving a well-funded Republican challenger an advantage Laura’s campaign needs funding to stay competitive. It’s that simple. Every dollar you contribute helps: Counter the GOP attacks and get Laura’s record in front of voters Build the infrastructure we need to mobilize voters and stay ahead in this race Ensure we have the resources to get out the vote and defend this district = | | | = | = | = | = | = P.S. We know this is going to be a tight race, but with your support, we can stay competitive. This district is pivotal and we can’t afford to fall short of our September FEC goal. = | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

| | Hey Reader, I got you a gift for you... Something to help protect you and your family while you’re on the road. And you’re going to want this, especially if you travel with your CCW. Because you don’t want to go to court with nothing but a story... you need solid, indisputable evidence...
**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21987/6374453/aa32fc8fd8e48dd9e229b39d623813afba21056b/73a3f9ee5da3355a2d39349289c1dd450034dfd1)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... [We’re only giving away 500 Dash Eagles for 80% OFF...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21987/6374453/aa32fc8fd8e48dd9e229b39d623813afba21056b/73a3f9ee5da3355a2d39349289c1dd450034dfd1) And it’s first come, first served... Oh yeah, did I mention that I’m giving you free shipping? I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out...

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Add Your Name: Endorse the Election Rigging Response Act in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Thank you for making your voice heard.

**[Can you please add your name to say you support Proposition 50 - The Election Rigging Response Act - in California? We're hoping for a huge number of signatures today.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-endorse-prop-50/?t=1&akid=2571%2E4767699%2EbcU-Q_)**
* * *

First and foremost, let me thank you for bearing with the increased number of fundraising emails lately. It's not something I love to do, but it's something we have to do if we're going to win this election.
But today, I have a different ask.
As you read this, volunteers across California are talking with voters and asking them one simple question:
Can we count on you to vote in favor of Proposition 50 - the Election Rigging Response Act?
Today, I want to ask you to do the same:
**[I am asking you to add your name to say you support the Election Rigging Response Act. It's a small and simple act, but it will speak volumes about the strength of this movement:](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-endorse-prop-50/?t=2&akid=2571%2E4767699%2EbcU-Q_)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-endorse-prop-50/?t=3&akid=2571%2E4767699%2EbcU-Q_)
If Donald Trump and Republicans in states across the country want to try and rig the next election, then it's important that we show a strong grassroots opposition from as many people as we can.
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Gavin Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2571%2E4767699%2EbcU-Q_).
Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee. Committee Top Funders: HMP for Prop 50, California Teachers Association, Newsom for California – Governor 2022.

name: Mamdani Turnout Operation via Our Revolution
subject: We're hitting the phones + the streets to elect Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1011&refcode=email-20250921_v&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

As election day rapidly approaches, Mamdani’s road to becoming Mayor of
NYC could get more difficult:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?source=email-20250921&t=1061&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]Headline: Eric Adams hints to business leaders he is open to quitting
Mayor's race

This is just what Trump wants — to bully candidates out of the race and
consolidate the field against Zohran.

When other candidates drop out and the field narrows to Cuomo and Mamdani,
polls show it’s a much tighter race. Which is why we cannot let up for a
SECOND.

Right now, the big money machine is flooding the airwaves to smear Mamdani
— and from what our volunteers are hearing on the phones, it’s working.
And so our team is RAPIDLY scaling up our operation to make sure as many
voters as possible hear from us.

Our Revolution is turning out grassroots volunteers from across the
country every Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday to make calls and have real
conversations with voters. Our field organizers are gearing up to do what
we did in the primary – hit all five boroughs and the subways to talk to
as many people as possible, day after day.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250921nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]We are NOT going to let billionaire dollars have the final say. We can
out-organize them, neighbor by neighbor, call by call – but it’s going to
take resources to do it. Will you chip in right now to power our work to
make every call, knock every door, and give voters the facts?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?source=email-20250921&t=1060&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]Mamdani Phone Bank graphic

If we’re going to stop Trump and his billionaire backers from deciding
this election, the fact is that real, in-depth phone conversations work.
And so we’re knocking on doors, dialing, texting, answering urgent
questions, and sharing the truth about this election.

We’re ready to reach hundreds of thousands of voters. But this work takes
resources — and right now we’re running up against hard limits. More
volunteers are ready, but we need urgent funds to run and staff phone
banks and expand our ground game to new neighborhoods.

The path to victory is talking to every voter and REFUSING to let
billionaire-funded noise drown us out. Otherwise we risk reliving what
happened to Bernie Sanders, India Walton, and Nina Turner – when corporate
money turned the tide and silenced the grassroots.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32989?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250921nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9404%2E5885482%2E2so4Ws ]We won’t let history repeat itself, but we need you with us. Can you make
a donation right now to fuel our phone banks and ground game and help
elect Zohran Mamdani? Every dollar keeps us dialing and knocking.

Thank you for powering the real grassroots movement. Together, we win this
fight — one conversation at a time.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Andy Kim
subject: Paid family leave should be a right, not a luxury
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
If we’re going to win this fight, we need to show that we’re united and demanding action.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115644328/570993131/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA3OTA3Ni1mNzk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=idlxfb24UR0TJ0K1dbxNB4tAHusiSMv_zmBCpW4iP18=&emci=e7067c48-9b94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0d079076-f796-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | No one should ever have to choose between caring for their family and keeping their job. But right now, millions of workers across our country face exactly that impossible choice. **Paid family leave should be a right, not a luxury.** Parents deserve time to bond with a newborn. Families deserve the ability to care for a sick child or an aging parent. Workers deserve the security of knowing they won't lose their paycheck if life takes an unexpected turn. **That's why I'm proud to help lead the reintroduction of the FAMILY Act** — to finally guarantee paid family and medical leave for every worker in America. The truth is, there's no excuse for why we still don't have paid leave. Every other developed nation provides this basic support. The only thing missing here is the political will. If we're going to win this fight, we need to show that we're united and demanding action. clean_body: If we’re going to win this fight, we need to show that we’re united and demanding action. | | | | No one should ever have to choose between caring for their family and keeping their job. But right now, millions of workers across our country face exactly that impossible choice. Paid family leave should be a right, not a luxury. Parents deserve time to bond with a newborn. Families deserve the ability to care for a sick child or an aging parent. Workers deserve the security of knowing they won't lose their paycheck if life takes an unexpected turn. That's why I'm proud to help lead the reintroduction of the FAMILY Act — to finally guarantee paid family and medical leave for every worker in America. The truth is, there's no excuse for why we still don't have paid leave. Every other developed nation provides this basic support. The only thing missing here is the political will. If we're going to win this fight, we need to show that we're united and demanding action. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: DNC HQ
subject: We’re flipping the House and the Senate
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer email than usual — but with so much on the line right now, we hope you’ll keep reading. If you don’t have time, we’ll cut to the chase: **[Democrats have a real chance to take back Congress — but only if we get to work now. If it makes sense for you, will you make a $3 contribution to help flip the House and Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250921_4625_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4625_22930333_nc02se&akid=4625%2E22930333%2Enc02se)**
_Here is the most important information you need to know:_ **DEMOCRATS ONLY NEED TO FLIP _THREE SEATS_ TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.** House Republicans are once again putting their own interests ahead of their constituents. They’ve passed a budget that takes health care away from millions of people and forces rural hospitals to close. Their agenda is historically unpopular — and the DNC is targeting 35 vulnerable Republican districts to make sure voters are ready to hold their representatives accountable at the ballot box. **FOUR SEATS WILL GIVE DEMOCRATS SENATE CONTROL.** Democrats have a real path to taking back the Senate, and it just keeps getting wider. Republican Senator Joni Ernst just announced she won’t be seeking reelection in Iowa — giving Democrats another opportunity to pick up a seat. That’s on top of big opportunities in North Carolina and Ohio, after former Governor Roy Cooper and former Senator Sherrod Brown entered races in their states. But make no mistake: These races will be close and every single vote will count. _If Democrats can win back Congress, we can check Trump’s power and prevent more damage and destruction. But here’s the thing:_ **REPUBLICANS ARE TRYING TO RIG THE SYSTEM TO STOP US.** Trump and his allies are doing everything they can to keep control of Congress. They’ve redrawn congressional maps in states like Texas and Missouri to give themselves more seats, and this could just be the beginning. Democrats are fighting back — including redrawing maps in states like California to counter Republicans’ moves in Texas. But the only way we’re going to win this fight and protect our democracy is if we all get involved _now._ **[Please don’t wait for someone else to step up. Don’t wait until it’s too late. Can you make your first $3 contribution to support the DNC today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?refcode=em_20250921_4625_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4625_22930333_nc02se&akid=4625%2E22930333%2Enc02se)**
Thank you, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We can’t sit on the sidelines right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
We have a choice: |
#
---
Team, I hate to reach out on a Sunday, but this is too important to wait. **We’re going through a tough time right now as a country.** Political division is rampant, anti-abortion extremism is at an all-time high, and the economic policies forced onto us by Washington Republicans are pushing working families to the brink. **We can’t sit on the sidelines right now.** I know things feel heavy, but we can’t stop fighting for progress — and this grassroots team has proven time and time again that giving up just isn’t an option. Even in troubling times, we’ve stood strong and made impactful changes to better our communities. From enacting common-sense gun safety legislation to protecting reproductive freedom to lowering costs for families, we have always banded together to make Michigan a place where anyone can build a brighter future. Now, we have a choice: **Either continue forging a path forward, or let extremism pull us decades backward.** **[So I’m personally asking, can you pitch in to support our work at Fight Like Hell PAC today? name: JB Pritzker
subject: Chris Pappas is a proven fighter, folks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me cut to the chase.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250921_1_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250921-4520&refcode2=4520_400544_oRIcoR&akid=4520%2E400544%2EoRIcoR)
JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
We can’t let that happen.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks.**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in:
**[If you can, please split a $5 donation right now between Chris Pappas and Deb Haaland to put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250921_1_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250921-4520&refcode2=4520_400544_oRIcoR&akid=4520%2E400544%2EoRIcoR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250921_1_pappas?amount=5&refcode=em20250921-4520&refcode2=4520_400544_oRIcoR&akid=4520%2E400544%2EoRIcoR)**
Thank you for standing up,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois

We can’t let that happen. Chris is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves. I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and I want him in the Senate. I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks. The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in: Thank you for standing up, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Charlie always believed this day would come
54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25.

| | [ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7761f888bb5e4d6b9b5fbd9eb7323011&_e=xcFk-koiwX4eLdM0a29cGaiwdAhCs5H0bO1daHqHNiEJIixSy0JYX-lo0xepdrYVRMGU1Mf1TmtvHGwaWwA86wMqJebJdvfp5P7Icssgzsmc5soLOeZh_9cAVlE2mjgSsC2mmuqdpduKuVVfOEkIgi5cLhTuY2LQzyI_Wk0PtIOnu3VFmCITvOe9_TRzcqoRpt1Ot7BNGbCG5K3JuoiuRe0HcZJtELMw2_pi5YmjVIosW0B5eZHy7WOgtC1ofvA2jXiU3JWmr8dzd69_tMZexTnaqLimrDM8onHsNt56Z5tPka7TRS9S1sikajDAQdtM08-zeH6RIom-GZFA5Q87T_TT13C7063Ih_NfudyNHcsMRTckXZ9UcQG6pvgmr40c3Il5RdR6d3SWBoHqOrTRJjUvBPsCchYRnnZc2T3ZUpwZ3vz56LaLo0SkiqBB_F6uSSomNua-qnSvZ62_luWc49ERgzp1a9ptC6sAtBe30X-v467r8mLCi59HxaXeMla5hU0AnmWtDhoqojDo9JapmayJTJindbiosIdvlRwP0HBBezmm7pbt6EzkM58dBH4BWecxgTD60rQ45hjEP_ji9ZjpKDlNz9-q6rzK-0cYhyYK6C2UongWfZrM78Nw1lQwi7wGmBLgjzHP9WwSuYaDSczaIrnmrKhEot8SwbyYASJiPTo4BfgqwbsCdlbAH16Zbz4QxUUo_MOokguGxlXNoqQcv_e2gMjPe8kD7LV5CAA%3D)

Peter, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7761f888bb5e4d6b9b5fbd9eb7323011&_e=xcFk-koiwX4eLdM0a29cGaiwdAhCs5H0bO1daHqHNiEJIixSy0JYX-lo0xepdrYVRMGU1Mf1TmtvHGwaWwA86wMqJebJdvfp5P7Icssgzsmc5soLOeZh_9cAVlE2mjgSsC2mmuqdpduKuVVfOEkIgi5cLhTuY2LQzyI_Wk0PtIOnu3VFmCITvOe9_TRzcqoRpt1Ot7BNGbCG5K3JuoiuRe0HcZJtELMw2_pi5YmjVIosW0B5eZHy7WOgtC1ofvA2VnhrdH_180MjxhEEogqlfFzu-9tifUAMvpDubMOFONcfidtLMB974VDM7rfUO2LrAfEZi8yC6tua8F0qg-MeJXvsBXkkN_sCewbrSps2zBOin8QA0YsMZEQOUswdmVxGvLHiHm-6rvi4B8k1_xGqHJfAR82Y5cFyqJc7EqyDX15tHSh22I6-jsuw2hKOsEmjoBPKtH3YOpGXcTM65obYIwMcUVEz4K52DiidpwykTs5XLYSWi26TfgjUDmniRk1UX39LAmuPlVifQtKmBXeAT6GXW4-woqKsPiTKwtlIlZkllnSqkWzTSi0_eENG7jS3zp2sDHdg6_1dn2cjkgrJ0vnGOlCFu1krksS40CR4h572WUvVKVqRRKtRSXUjRUw2zIso_MFu9cr4CuAiyl1Mb3YXzMtyE4ILm_TwkHQRJJii7rut7HT0lfIwSr2hF2SyLiGIsPiJs_PJuuJFAk3xmmRrZ65gbkqAtvzxuiN1mNE%3D)

**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Peter... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7761f888bb5e4d6b9b5fbd9eb7323011&_e=xcFk-koiwX4eLdM0a29cGaiwdAhCs5H0bO1daHqHNiEJIixSy0JYX-lo0xepdrYVRMGU1Mf1TmtvHGwaWwA86wMqJebJdvfp5P7Icssgzsmc5soLOeZh_9cAVlE2mjgSsC2mmuqdpduKuVVfOEkIgi5cLhTuY2LQzyI_Wk0PtIOnu3VFmCITvOe9_TRzcqoRpt1Ot7BNGbCG5K3JuoiuRe0HcZJtELMw2_pi5YmjVIosW0B5eZHy7WOgtC1ofvA2br0hBaPeLEanG5PtiRj-jp6-BwQyy6stzz3Y7GQtSpBubFdVP6ytYKxRWwiArraBl07oG5b-g0JAoQFUQaFJNmrT168OVhMw5IwC94U2pdruuDxsUZ-2m2_T-kEMhoCyGFcbWqtYj9EukydSOwfwgKffkSxe8PmLTIqunCya_C-DzduTMFqtyunWJqo-AVf92JkAlM7vBWM_xxdVdIDVIm2VjRRrAIoyRSKtik0OJ_Z-ijvbnX1DIhwLdfs0JYhLjjQCtSgJNu0JZ6VH7g9RkkCs0X2jIVVsHlQ5qzy0pDGHMk802tQZitd9U6iBE1T6FzfQsa-9cJVdY-wjkVwpXfnU2UKdhhwtVbnciR8ZjueQzrBuganC8YceChYe130WiNtMdgP2ORr3VJLXtAvlXpjDyAgCWee0byBJsnVgaqx6bVzMsod3VZMXA_nykgn8Y68UMgs-6cFtAWMMRni-gL9yU8DK0zhuuoB88MJXxG0%3D)

He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Peter, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. ** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Peter, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

clean_body: Charlie always believed this day would come 54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25. | | Peter, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Peter... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Peter, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Peter, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here 's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Peter, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Peter, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

**Cracks in the U.S. economy: Job growth slows 75% from a year ago**
_NPR_ I wanted to make sure you saw this headline, because it says everything about where Donald Trump is taking our economy. **The U.S. added only 22,000 jobs last month.** It was the weakest jobs report in years, and unemployment ticked up to its **highest non-pandemic level since 2017.** That means more families are struggling, and more people are going without work for months at a time. These numbers didn’t just happen by accident. They’re the result of Trump’s choices:
* His reckless tariff war is making groceries, gas, and everyday goods more expensive for families.
* His spending cuts are stripping away the programs and services people depend on.
* And his attacks on clean energy are destroying tens of thousands of good-paying jobs and blocking the industries of the future.

**Just weeks ago, the Trump Administration halted construction on a nearly finished $4 billion offshore wind farm off the coast of Rhode Island that would have powered 350,000 homes in Rhode Island and Connecticut.** Years of progress, thousands of jobs — wiped out overnight. And it doesn’t stop there. Trump has slashed clean energy contracts, gutted programs expanding solar and wind power nationwide, and eliminated subsidies that were helping us transition faster to renewable energy. Energy experts warn his agenda will leave us with higher prices and a weaker economy, but it doesn’t have to be that way. **Clean energy is the cheapest and fastest way to power homes and businesses. It means good-paying jobs, lower energy bills, and healthier communities. Trump calls it the “scam of the century.” I call it the future we can’t afford to lose.** We may not be able to stop this administration from doing Big Oil’s bidding, but we can fight like hell to build a firewall of climate champions at every other level of government. Local councils, state legislatures, Congress, and beyond. Every seat matters in the fight to protect our communities and keep climate progress alive. **[That’s what JanePAC is doing every single day. We’re investing in candidates who stand up to Big Oil and fight for clean air, clean water, and clean energy jobs that will power our future. And we need you with us. Will you donate a few dollars today to help power our work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115645642/570998124/2105508926?refcode=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZmMxNzNjLWZiOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lFjuVLezL_XqXhE77LrCevOlciZg3b57x23uQpwKm4A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115645646/570998129/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZmMxNzNjLWZiOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lFjuVLezL_XqXhE77LrCevOlciZg3b57x23uQpwKm4A=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115645648/570998134/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.7ffc173c-fb96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZmMxNzNjLWZiOTYtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lFjuVLezL_XqXhE77LrCevOlciZg3b57x23uQpwKm4A=)

clean_body: Here’s the proof. | Cracks in the U.S. economy: Job growth slows 75% from a year ago NPR I wanted to make sure you saw this headline, because it says everything about where Donald Trump is taking our economy. The U.S. added only 22,000 jobs last month. It was the weakest jobs report in years, and unemployment ticked up to its highest non-pandemic level since 2017. That means more families are struggling, and more people are going without work for months at a time. These numbers didn’t just happen by accident. They’re the result of Trump’s choices: His reckless tariff war is making groceries, gas, and everyday goods more expensive for families. His spending cuts are stripping away the programs and services people depend on. And his attacks on clean energy are destroying tens of thousands of good-paying jobs and blocking the industries of the future. Just weeks ago, the Trump Administration halted construction on a nearly finished $4 billion offshore wind farm off the coast of Rhode Island that would have powered 350,000 homes in Rhode Island and Connecticut. Years of progress, thousands of jobs — wiped out overnight. And it doesn’t stop there. Trump has slashed clean energy contracts, gutted programs expanding solar and wind power nationwide, and eliminated subsidies that were helping us transition faster to renewable energy. Energy experts warn his agenda will leave us with higher prices and a weaker economy, but it doesn’t have to be that way. Clean energy is the cheapest and fastest way to power homes and businesses. It means good-paying jobs, lower energy bills, and healthier communities. Trump calls it the “scam of the century.” I call it the future we can’t afford to lose. We may not be able to stop this administration from doing Big Oil’s bidding, but we can fight like hell to build a firewall of climate champions at every other level of government. Local councils, state legislatures, Congress, and beyond. Every seat matters in the fight to protect our communities and keep climate progress alive. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: The real reason why Trump is afraid of Zohran Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We need leaders who won’t back down to Trump's empty threats. | | | Peter, There are many reasons why Donald Trump is so worked up over the NYC Mayoral election, but this one stands out: **he knows Zohran Mamdani would fiercely oppose his authoritarian power grabs.** Trump is a bully. _He’s always been a bully._ It’s how he behaved as a businessman, and it’s how he behaves in the White House: **bend the knee or face the consequences.** This worked on Mayor Eric Adams, who allegedly offered to cooperate with Trump’s rabid deportation machine as long as the DOJ dropped their corruption charges against him.1 **But it won’t work on Zohran Mamdani.** That’s why Trump is panicking. He even threatened to revoke New York City’s funding if he wins.2 **But in NYC and across the country, we need leaders who won’t back down to his empty threats. And with your help, we’ll be sure to help push Zohran across the finish line.** [Pitch in today to help us elect a mayor who won’t surrender one inch to Trump, and who will build a city that’s safe and affordable for all New Yorkers.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGQoPB5GIPkbCzSXxsGwLUZrwrVQ_C9_pzTX3MFHLQ2brEy6a3_7EdOaSXAhoWE861LfJw8p5RwQ4eecDZnTBiUWj6PIOnzX5i7GFaCzK0c1TPzYPWIoUoCXptD7wMlD1-sNhDj3dytpcbj4MYYhY_aUD81C1NjI5W0mxgtzpWZ8iRo55FdzSO3pdnJTYqL3HSuOmKDvN_Y2lkZ65GECLK4McpRt9TkESidzR523Vmb7Rx4CsA34aQYghreKUK8UWXpMbqV9c19-3cJ9WxrPl2hQ3ulqrHyG7id__yIxwM1uHvAhhRHkWFbZX4sZZeP5Ht5YDRipF13jELYrgV8BDIyILHnHCUya551VVd6qkNpm9IZKD7dkcLKwCKl93WfVrLQ/4k3/oybbu2qYS1OkGs3m8TMSWQ/h0/h001.PVo5Z0NvCce1D7RECwV1IkUx1FUjnx_jEwo8IKGiL2A) **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T966anOFnxLCk2AXJI73uxGQoPB5GIPkbCzSXxsGwLUZqswNSNyOdjum0f3J1AL4lMNLue_dQBQvTeb4WfHezSMqNH8GKsXsJResBzS7q3bzN6PdaI2ioKrvWqxFFtldKKkGhFPl2Pf3nwqotBM6lLd8F9nDvm94nLebwhHi19cAAUDJO4OcqO-KQxPBMgbVM_ycKeHiQHRJCzMzm0zY2xhJJitPIHAynthR-6MmUIB2UD7qC1Yu6xSNYHimqIB0PWkCF-_1bcuLW0ft3kjIkMNDeTuyKHDEVtcoga_MVd4-KnAb6bXkWN4jMhmZfw59I-t1WlbxzjOFSlC6poOdoRIXLOn38XrExn29P0BDzlMIP4Vs-a-XCYNltCBddwZtW_8n6_BSLdbnOtWPwYcKLp-g/4k3/oybbu2qYS1OkGs3m8TMSWQ/h1/h001.QSpN5pV7rZs4h7ceKw5cPh9aGjlNU-8lKqKQFxhtY7c)** Thank you for being a part of this movement with us, Peter. clean_body: We need leaders who won’t back down to Trump's empty threats. | | | Peter, There are many reasons why Donald Trump is so worked up over the NYC Mayoral election, but this one stands out: he knows Zohran Mamdani would fiercely oppose his authoritarian power grabs. Trump is a bully. He’s always been a bully. It’s how he behaved as a businessman, and it’s how he behaves in the White House: bend the knee or face the consequences. This worked on Mayor Eric Adams, who allegedly offered to cooperate with Trump’s rabid deportation machine as long as the DOJ dropped their corruption charges against him.1 But it won’t work on Zohran Mamdani. That’s why Trump is panicking. He even threatened to revoke New York City’s funding if he wins.2 But in NYC and across the country, we need leaders who won’t back down to his empty threats. And with your help, we’ll be sure to help push Zohran across the finish line. Thank you for being a part of this movement with us, Peter. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , Rolling Stone, February 19, 2025 2\. , ABC 7 News, September 16, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | Sent via . This is not a drill. **MAGA extremists and their billionaire backers are moving at lightning speed to silence dissent and crush free speech.** Project 2025 isn't some fringe policy wish list, it's a **roadmap for authoritarian rule.** They want to control what you see, what you say, and even what you're allowed to believe. And they're already testing it. From canceling Jimmy Kimmel to threatening ordinary citizens' jobs, their message is crystal clear: **if you dare speak out, you 're next.** Think about that for a moment. A president using raw power to label critics as "terrorists." A government turning conspiracy theories into law. Corporate elites bankrolling the silencing of everyday Americans. **This is how democracy dies.** Not with one big moment, but with a series of smaller attacks until freedom is gone. No Dem Left Behind is not standing down. We're building a grassroots army ready to defend speech, defend truth, and defend the people who refuse to bow to MAGA's billionaire class. We are taking this fight into every district, every state, and every community they've written off. **[But here's the hard truth: we can't do it without you. Outrage alone won't stop them - only organized, grassroots power will. Chip in right now to fuel this fight and show MAGA their takeover stops here. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Targeting nonprofits they oppose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_1&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again.
The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=092125_1&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] [] We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again. The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. “ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is moving
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

Friend,

Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie.

His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us.

And his vision — TO BUILD THE MOST FAITHFUL AND THE MOST PATRIOTIC
GENERATION IN AMERICAN HISTORY — is why Turning Point USA exists
today.

Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you...

In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us,
Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students
who want to start or join a chapter:

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

GOD IS SO GOOD. ✝️🙏🕊️

To give you perspective, friend...

Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+
college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters.

It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact...
_But now? _

These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They
weren’t recruited...

THEY FELT IT WAS THEIR TIME TO STAND UP FOR THIS COUNTRY AND HONOR
CHARLIE.

Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed
God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And
his vision of a better America for us all.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

He always believed this day would come.

He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would
shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning
Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in
America.

And now...

_It’s happening._

Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible.

And more beautiful than we can even describe.

AGAIN, FRIEND, GOD IS SO GOOD.

Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers.
Emails. Messages.

Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your
children’s or grandchildren's lives.

And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_

As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up
with every chapter request.

And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism
kits.

EVERY NEW CHAPTER RECEIVES THESE KITS FROM TURNING POINT USA WITH
EVERYTHING THEY NEED TO GET STARTED — INCLUDING:

✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear

Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t
be a small task. _

But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. _FOR CHARLIE._

_And here’s how YOU can help with this..._

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT — READY TO
DEPLOY INTO A NEW TURNING POINT USA STUDENT CHAPTER...

How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of
new student chapters that are just getting started?

1 KIT = $25
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

2 KITS = $50
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

10 KITS = $250
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

100 KITS = $2,500
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

1,000 KITS = $25,000
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

SPONSOR ACTIVISM KITS
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make
Charlie’s vision a reality...

THIS IS IT.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/90ede776-f46c-4429-ae10-3b00ec23aa85?source_code=MAWCO70719&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70719]

Also...

HERE’S ONE MORE POWERFUL THING YOU CAN DO:

📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or
any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who
wants to join or start a chapter...

PLEASE SEND THEM THIS LINK: TPUSASTUDENTS.COM/STARTACHAPTER
[https://www.tpusastudents.com/startachapter]

Friend, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated...

If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this
painful week...

If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray...

THANK YOU.

We can never say it enough.

If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this...

YOU’RE THE REASON CHARLIE’S MISSION AND VISION WILL GROW FOR
GENERATIONS TO COME.

God is so good.

FOR CHARLIE,

-The Turning Point USA Family

P.S. Please know if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask
for are your prayers.

Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all
you can give today, _we’re grateful._

But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that
students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission...

Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and
gets new student chapters off the ground floor...

And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought
possible.

EVERY $25 YOU GIVE TODAY HELPS US STOCK ANOTHER ACTIVISM KIT READY TO
DEPLOY TO A NEW STUDENT CHAPTER.

SPONSOR AN ACTIVISM KIT
MAKE YOUR GIFT HERE

Thank you for your help and for your prayers.

GOD IS SO GOOD. 🙏

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Unsubscribe: https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=321390&trkid=940002472&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team KG for NY
subject: How likely are you to vote in 2026?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
The 2026 midterms are coming fast — and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
Hi — The 2026 midterms are fast approaching — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Donald Trump and his allies are counting on low turnout and voter fatigue to hold the House and Senate. They’re hoping we’ll stay quiet while they gut health care, attack our freedoms and roll back progress. We have to prove them wrong. **That’s why we’re running a quick poll:** [**_How likely are you to vote in the 2026 midterm elections?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115648513/571007310/1585528321?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.09.21_Midterm-Elections_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTg2ZjgwYy1mZDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DttAddFAHp58TaTzO03ctYUU8iIPoq78zyAr75_C7iA=&emci=fd67b104-bd94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8e86f80c-fd96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029) | | [100% committed ✅](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115648515/571007312/1585528321?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.09.21_Midterm-Elections_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTg2ZjgwYy1mZDk2LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DttAddFAHp58TaTzO03ctYUU8iIPoq78zyAr75_C7iA=&emci=fd67b104-bd94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8e86f80c-fd96-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: An attack on all Muslim people in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: We’re not going anywhere.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1812%2E791427%2E8D_XB5)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25-tlaib.mScH2B&refcode=em250921-1-nor&t=2&akid=1812%2E791427%2E8D_XB5)
Friend — Randy Fine, Congress’s chief Islamophobe, is at it again.
This time, he’s calling my colleague and sister in struggle Rashida Tlaib the “ugly face of Islam in America”, adding: “It’s up to us to stop them.”
Friend, Randy Fine didn’t say “radical Islam” or “Islamic extremism”, the usual right-wing dogwhistles. No, in his tweet, Randy Fine is simply attacking all Muslim people in America. Saying that they must be “stopped.”
Just imagine if he was talking about any other religion. Imagine if a member of Congress called one of their colleagues “the ugly face of Christianity” or “the ugly face of Judaism.” They would rightfully be met with immediate, sweeping condemnation. But for Republicans, Muslim people are fair game for hateful attacks.
**Randy Fine is a racist bigot who has made it clear that he wants Muslim people to be forced out of American society.**
Well, both Rashida and I have a message for Randy: **_We’re not going anywhere.**_
In the video clip that Randy is reacting to, Rashida Tlaib is showing more moral courage and compassionate leadership than he ever could.
Rashida has watched from afar for two long years as her Palestinian brothers and sisters are bombed, shot, and starved to death. She has led the growing movement to secure a ceasefire, end military aid to Israel, and end the occupation of Palestine.
**That’s the real reason that Randy Fine is afraid of Rashida — day in and day out she exposes the lies of the pro-genocide, pro-Israel far-right that Randy represents.**
As the only two Muslim women in Congress, this kind of stuff isn’t new for Rashida and I. That’s why we stick together, and why we stick with this beautiful progressive movement. Because we are stronger when we are together in solidarity, standing up to racist attacks and staying focused on the fight for justice for all.
**[If you can, please support Rashida and I by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today. Your donation today sends a message that we will not be intimidated by racist name calling from incompetent Republicans like Randy Fine. Your donation sends a message that we will not give up the fight for the safety and dignity of Palestinians.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25-tlaib.mScH2B&refcode=em250921-1-nor&t=3&akid=1812%2E791427%2E8D_XB5)

As the only two Muslim women in Congress, this kind of stuff isn’t new for Rashida and I. That’s why we stick together, and why we stick with this beautiful progressive movement. Because we are stronger when we are together in solidarity, standing up to racist attacks and staying focused on the fight for justice for all. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: We have a question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

We have a question for you, Peter. And please — really think about it.
If you knew — and we mean _really knew_ — that a $5 contribution meant Jon Ossoff would win reelection in the closest and most expensive Senate race of the midterms, wouldn't you make that donation?
And what if you _knew_ that the same $5 meant Democrats would retake the Senate and be able to stop Trump's legislative agenda for the next two years, wouldn't it be $5 well spent?
We understand that it probably doesn’t seem like $5 is enough to accomplish those goals in the face of the millions that Super PACs are pouring into this race.
But the truth is, as you read this, there are lots of people like you who share these goals who have already given their $5 today.
Now they are hoping you'll do the same.
[**If reelecting Jon Ossoff and regaining control of the Senate to stop Trump's agenda seems worth $5 today, that's the contribution we're asking you to make.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250921-1-f&t=1&akid=799%2E5691347%2ErFYhk7)

body:
#
Each of us swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution and the rights it ensures. Many of us put our lives on the line for those rights. Our friends were wounded and killed defending them.
Donald Trump is trying to destroy free speech and the free press, and we’re not going to sit idly by and let him do it.

clean_body: Add your name if you agree: Mail voting must be protected | | | We’d show you Donald Trump’s latest long-winded tirade about mail voting on Truth Social, but it would take up the entire email. All you need to know is that he’s back at it again with the baseless rants about mail voting, but it’s not just rhetoric. Earlier this month, he admitted Colorado’s mail-in voting system was “a big factor” in his decision to move U.S. Space Command headquarters out of the state, costing billions and threatening national security. Punishing an entire state for making voting more accessible is a direct example of how Trump is willing to use government power for political retribution. And it comes while Trump continues to spread false claims that mail ballots are fraudulent. As Trump continues his pressure campaign against mail voting, we have to push back even harder to ensure equal access to the ballot box. And we need to make it clear that the American people support preserving this secure, reliable method of making our voices heard. | Millions of Americans rely on mail voting. It is essential for seniors, military families, disabled voters, and rural communities. And study after study shows fraud is virtually nonexistent. Trump’s threats to ban mail-in voting aren’t just about 2026 or 2028. They’re part of a deliberate effort to make it normal for elections to be manipulated or discarded if they don’t yield a result that the president is pleased with. Stopping the Trump Regime from sliding our country further toward complete authoritarian control means speaking up now. In solidarity, Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Here's why I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5946?t=2&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5947?t=3&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5947?t=4&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need****your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan. [ _Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5947?t=5&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5948?t=6&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5949?t=7&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5950?t=8&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5947?t=9&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5951?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5946?t=11&akid=865%2E49239%2ETa07_u)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Kristen McDonald Rivet
body:
|
#
Friend, Senator Elissa Slotkin here. I’m no stranger to tough races. Over the years, I’ve run some of the most competitive campaigns in the country – and I know how much they take out of you. I also know how much they matter. That’s why I’m writing to you about Kristen McDonald Rivet. Kristen is in the middle of a re-election fight for MI-08. After winning a Trump-district last year, MAGA super PACs have already spent nearly a million dollars in attack ads trying to tear her down. We all know our country is going through something right now. Families are feeling squeezed, people are uncertain about the future, and trust in our institutions is at a low point. But I believe, as I always have, that the way through moments like this is engaged citizens and principled leaders. Kristen is that kind of leader. She’s spent her career fighting for children and families here in Michigan. She’s pragmatic, she’s tough, and she knows how to get things done. That’s exactly the kind of representation Mid-Michigan needs. And I can tell you from experience: these kinds of races are won when grassroots supporters step up early and often. Every door knocked, every conversation with a voter, and yes – every dollar raised – helps fight back against the wave of outside spending. [**Will you chip in $3 now to help me fight back and keep this frontline seat blue? Just wanted to make sure you saw this. Gabe officially launched his re-election campaign for New Mexico’s 2nd District. He’s running to keep fighting for the people who’ve been counted out — the working families trying to make ends meet, the communities fighting to be heard, and the next generation who deserve a future with real opportunity. But here’s the thing: national Republicans saw his announcement too. And they’re already zeroing in on this race. Congressional Republicans have already handed Donald Trump and his MAGA allies massive power — and flipping this seat would weaken the last checks left. Our rights, our democracy, and the future of this country hang in the balance. We can’t let that happen. This is our chance to show we’re not sitting this one out — that we’re all in, and that we believe in something better than the chaos and division Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are offering. **\---------- Forwarded message from Gabe ----------**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115652644/571017578/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092125_LAUNCHFWD_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjczNzliYS0wNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faoj6Irx6y9AIB9kdUv-3y-uBfGvnzABWztZSH7J7zo=)
Hey, it’s Gabe.
I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for re-election to keep representing New Mexico’s 2nd District.
Running for office wasn’t always the plan. I didn’t grow up dreaming of a life in politics. I was raised by a single mother who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope, grit, and a whole lot of determination.
She worked long hours and made tough sacrifices. And everything she did — every value she passed on — taught me the importance of service, of hard work, and of speaking up when something isn’t right.
That’s why I ran in the first place.
Because I saw our communities being ignored. I saw politicians more interested in power than in their people. And I knew I had to step up.
Since winning our first campaign in 2022, I’ve traveled across southern New Mexico, meeting people who inspire me every single day.
Families working multiple jobs, neighbors looking out for one another, and communities doing everything they can to build a better future for the next generation.
They remind me why this work matters. And why I keep fighting.
We’ve made real progress together — protecting our public lands, expanding access to healthcare, and building a stronger economic foundation for working people.
But we’re not done. Not even close.
Right now, some of the most fundamental rights in this country are under attack. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are targeting this seat because they know just how important NM-02 is to maintain control of the House.
They’re pouring tons of money into this district, and they’ll stop at nothing to flip it. We can’t let that happen.
This is a moment to stand together, because the stakes couldn’t be higher.
If you believe in protecting our democracy, our freedoms, and the communities too often pushed to the margins, then I’m asking: [Will you chip in to support my re-election campaign — so I can keep fighting for the people of New Mexico’s 2nd District and continue the work we’ve started together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115652646/571017583/961986198?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_092125_LAUNCHFWD_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjczNzliYS0wNDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=faoj6Irx6y9AIB9kdUv-3y-uBfGvnzABWztZSH7J7zo=)

clean_body: Let’s help Gabe keep NM-02 blue. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Just wanted to make sure you saw this. Gabe officially launched his re-election campaign for New Mexico’s 2nd District. He’s running to keep fighting for the people who’ve been counted out — the working families trying to make ends meet, the communities fighting to be heard, and the next generation who deserve a future with real opportunity. But here’s the thing: national Republicans saw his announcement too. And they’re already zeroing in on this race. Congressional Republicans have already handed Donald Trump and his MAGA allies massive power — and flipping this seat would weaken the last checks left. Our rights, our democracy, and the future of this country hang in the balance. We can’t let that happen. This is our chance to show we’re not sitting this one out — that we’re all in, and that we believe in something better than the chaos and division Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are offering. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = \---------- Forwarded message from Gabe ---------- = Hey, it’s Gabe. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for re-election to keep representing New Mexico’s 2nd District. Running for office wasn’t always the plan. I didn’t grow up dreaming of a life in politics. I was raised by a single mother who came to this country from Mexico with nothing but hope, grit, and a whole lot of determination. She worked long hours and made tough sacrifices. And everything she did — every value she passed on — taught me the importance of service, of hard work, and of speaking up when something isn’t right. That’s why I ran in the first place. Because I saw our communities being ignored. I saw politicians more interested in power than in their people. And I knew I had to step up. Since winning our first campaign in 2022, I’ve traveled across southern New Mexico, meeting people who inspire me every single day. Families working multiple jobs, neighbors looking out for one another, and communities doing everything they can to build a better future for the next generation. They remind me why this work matters. And why I keep fighting. We’ve made real progress together — protecting our public lands, expanding access to healthcare, and building a stronger economic foundation for working people. But we’re not done. Not even close. Right now, some of the most fundamental rights in this country are under attack. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are targeting this seat because they know just how important NM-02 is to maintain control of the House. They’re pouring tons of money into this district, and they’ll stop at nothing to flip it. We can’t let that happen. This is a moment to stand together, because the stakes couldn’t be higher. If you believe in protecting our democracy, our freedoms, and the communities too often pushed to the margins, then I’m asking: = | = Let’s get to work. — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . subject: Right-wing extremists are still trying to turn back the clock

body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4990%2E35263%2EjNKDaT)
Peter, A decade after the Supreme Court made marriage equality the law of the land in the historic decision _Obergefell v. Hodges,_ right-wing extremists are STILL trying to turn back the clock. **The Supreme Court was just formally asked to take up an appeal that, if won, would overturn the 2015**** _Obergefell_****ruling and jeopardize federal protections for same-sex marriage.** _Obergefell_ , which cemented marriage as a fundamental right for every couple, was the culmination of decades of hard work from activists fighting for equal rights. Let me tell you, Peter:**we will not let the far-right roll back our hard-won progress.** As the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I promise not to back down. I will keep up the fight for LGBTQ+ rights until every person can live freely, openly, and authentically. **[As I keep up the fight for LGBTQ+ rights every single day in the Senate, will you pitch in and support our team before our FEC deadline passes?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-sep25.avzHzX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250921_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4990%2E35263%2EjNKDaT)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-sep25.i9k4bD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250921_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4990%2E35263%2EjNKDaT)

body:
