name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Even now... it still doesn’t feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction — it shaped all of us. And his vision — **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** — is why Turning Point USA exists today. Patriot, that’s why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Patriot... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren’t asked to... They weren’t recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time — how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It’s happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Patriot, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we’ve also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie’s voice changed lives... or your children’s or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _“What can I do?”_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we’re going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started — including:** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Patriot, I’m sure you’d believe it when we say it... _this won’t be a small task._ But we’re going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here’s how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit — ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[ **1 KIT = $25** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **2 KITS = $50** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **10 KITS = $250** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **100 KITS = $2,500** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **1,000 KITS = $25,000** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **Sponsor Activism Kits** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie’s vision a reality... **This is it****.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Also... **Here’s one more powerful thing you can do:** 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew — or any young person in your life — who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... **Please send them this link:** **[TPUSAStudents.com/StartaChapter](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10913207/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHB1c2FzdHVkZW50cy5jb20vc3RhcnRhY2hhcHRlcg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjE/LbmNsWE1BU3J3bA/gaNAmMw/s7gf0aa35cf)** Patriot, if you’ve already given... If you’ve already donated... If you’ve already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you’ve prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you’ve read this far, we want you to know this... **You’re the reason Charlie’s mission and vision will grow for generations to come.** God is so good.
---
**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Patriot, if you can’t afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first — and if that’s all you can give today, _we’re grateful._ But if you’re able to help... if you’re overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie’s message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie’s vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**
---
[ **Sponsor an Activism Kit**
**Make Your Gift Here** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Thank you for your help and for your prayers, Patriot. **God is so good.** 🙏
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10913207/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MjE/LbmNsWE1BU3J3bA/qP2hpZHM9bmM2dndTWXJvVTVsZGFscw/gaNAmMw/s5kb85138b5)

Peter,

Virginia is one of the most important states in the country this year, and early voting is officially underway! The Democratic nominee for Governor, Emerge alum Abigail Spanberger, is leading the fight to protect reproductive rights, voting access, and progressive policies in her state.

Abigail’s career shows what happens when women are prepared, supported, and trained to lead. She is exactly the kind of leader Emerge trains every day.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Never again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9003%2E5257348%2EVYZUAL)
Derek — If we fail to learn from history, we doom ourselves to repeat it.
Following the Watergate scandal, which eroded the American people’s faith in their democracy and trust in the White House, Congress enacted reforms aimed at increasing accountability and restoring checks and balances within the government. Legislators passed a series of landmark reforms — the post-Watergate reforms — to prevent future presidents from abusing their office.
**That trust is broken again — this time, at the hands of the most corrupt president in our country’s history. And we need to take bold action to repair this trust and protect our democracy.**
While a member of the House of Representatives, I introduced the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ , an ambitious set of reforms that would help ensure wannabe demagogues like Donald Trump cannot push our democracy to the brink again.
Since returning to the Oval Office, Trump has accelerated the process of tearing down our system of checks and balances and weakening our democracy.
His presidency, at its core, has been about consolidating power and eroding the rule of law, to enrich himself, his family, and friends. When his tenure in the Oval Office comes to an end, we must reinforce the separation of powers and ensure that no President can again bring us so close to one-man rule.
**That’s why I reintroduced the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ in the Senate this week — this time, with additional provisions to address numerous new abuses of power that Donald Trump and members of his administration have engaged in since his return to the White House in January.**
Derek, we cannot take our democracy for granted. And I won’t That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you add your name in support of the Protecting Our Democracy Act today? We need to speak up and call out the abuses of power by the Trump admin — and we need to make sure no president can ever again dismantle our democracy as Trump has done.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202509-poda.uCxPPe&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250921_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9003%2E5257348%2EVYZUAL)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202509-poda.uCxPPe&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250921_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9003%2E5257348%2EVYZUAL)
---
Thank you,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5307?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250921_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9003%2E5257348%2EVYZUAL)

# [Cancel Culture turns, bites the hand that fed it ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=173965977&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczOTY1OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTg0NzI1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2MTA2NDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.15ZgG9j5zFnXzRBUlLICrDdBCW0FfMLCV21MMDmolCg)
### "The party of tolerance is suddenly allergic to consequences."
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/@capitalistmag)
---
| Sep 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@capitalistmag)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=173965977&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczOTY1OTc3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1ODQ3MjU1MiwiZXhwIjoxNzYxMDY0NTUyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDcyMDA2OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.twmxeUpeUufB0gSZF88_Q9mXTYWNNS_nuLvmdQDxgaA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=173965977&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczOTY1OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTg0NzI1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2MTA2NDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.15ZgG9j5zFnXzRBUlLICrDdBCW0FfMLCV21MMDmolCg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=173965977&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczOTY1OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTg0NzI1NTIsImV4cCI6MTc2MTA2NDU1MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.15ZgG9j5zFnXzRBUlLICrDdBCW0FfMLCV21MMDmolCg)
---
| | [](https://substack..iBmsIYTzj78NqLgBSDb6E4rYmqT4V774yVKSzsEbN6o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/thecapitalistmag/p/cancel-culture-turns-bites-the-hand?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

From the outset, it should be acknowledged that Cancel Culture represents one of the most pernicious legacies of the digital era--a phenomenon that, in its essence, revives the specter of public tribunals akin to French Revolution executions, where judgment is swift, collective, and often irrevocable.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3d78177f-37ff-423a-be10-898026a314c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Far from mere social ostracism, it inflicts wounds that extend beyond reputation, dismantling careers, livelihoods, and psyches in ways that echo a perpetual exile, irrespective of the offense's gravity or context.
* * *
**Article continues below**
* * *
**[In partnership with Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/a982f57a-eb10-49e4-8cf7-1ed7e0de3747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Fight for the Truth and Take Back Control with Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/a982f57a-eb10-49e4-8cf7-1ed7e0de3747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a982f57a-eb10-49e4-8cf7-1ed7e0de3747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The internet isn't a discussion anymore, it's a shouting match between clickbait, spin, and headlines that sound like bad comedy. One minute you're checking the weather, the next you're wondering if "Ambassador Arrested in His Underwear" is news, or just Tuesday.
**That 's why we built Freespoke.**
Freespoke puts you back in control. One tap shows you the consensus, the divide, and expert insights from podcasts, so you see the truth, not the propaganda. It's private, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No porn. No data harvesting. Just clarity.
Whether you're fact-checking a meme, decoding a viral TikTok, or cutting through the "official version" of events, Freespoke is your chaos-killer.
And as an exclusive for The Capitalist readers**:** Get 35% off Freespoke Premium with code **cap35.**
Premium unlocks enhanced privacy by blocking all ads while using the app which means no more creepy data-stalking ads. Plus, you get unlimited AI summaries that simplify complex stories in seconds, and fully searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the source.
Don't lose the truth in the chaos of the internet. **[Download the free app today](https://substack.com/redirect/a982f57a-eb10-49e4-8cf7-1ed7e0de3747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and take back control.
[Download the Free App and Be in Control](https://substack.com/redirect/a982f57a-eb10-49e4-8cf7-1ed7e0de3747?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Article continues**
* * *
Those of us immersed in the media landscape on the right are intimately acquainted with this force. At the Capitalist we are no strangers to Cancel Culture. Over years of navigating newsrooms and digital platforms, our staff have witnessed its toll first hand: the ever present self-censorship to avoid its Sauron like gaze, friends and colleagues ensnared in its web, institutions where we once contributed eroded, and the subtle, pervasive creep of its "logic" into the algorithms that govern our daily discourse.
We have observed and worked for thriving enterprises, bolstered by robust financials, reduced to ruins in mere weeks--victims not of overt censorship but of opaque "adjustments" to "algorithmic visibility", fragmenting their reach and viability in the name of "fact checking" and "trust scores". In starker instances, the mechanisms were laid bare: shadow bans and outright expulsions from platforms, executed without transparency or recourse, leaving the afflicted to ponder the unspoken rationales from their couch, jobless.
Yet, in the wake of Charlie Kirk's assassination--a seismic event that has reshaped the political terrain--this amorphous entity, unbound by ideology, has pivoted toward fresh prey.
Cancel Culture has come for the liberals and the conservative view largely is, _**we are fine with it.**_
The initial repercussions were immediate and visceral: **["Stealth woke"](https://substack.com/redirect/b92ae521-75db-44c2-9441-5e4d5eb93b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** individuals, long used to consequence free radical political expression online vented their schadenfreude online over Kirk's demise, only to face swift professional reprisals as their posts were circulated to employers, culminating in terminations within hours or days, their employers citing violations of conduct policies amid public outcry.
_**" It turns out that the right is more than adept at **_**Cancel Culture** _**" -Anon**_
We are now entering a subsequent phase of this unfolding drama, where the targets have escalated from anonymous users ensnared by a fleeting TikTok clip or an ill-advised Facebook rant to figures of prominence: celebrities, influencers, and cultural arbiters, hauled before the unforgiving court of public scrutiny.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bc2c2495-98cb-4191-b3cb-95c39b66698f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Then came the big scalp: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel, who knowingly went on-air and repeated false information about the Kirk's assassin which drew ire from conservatives and advertisers, then doubled down according to The Hollywood Reporter:

_**["THR reported on Wednesday that Kimmel did not plan to apologize for his comments, but did plan to address the situation on-air."](https://substack.com/redirect/b4fef5ae-d0d6-4ed3-9118-63907b76a396?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
Consequently he was pulled off the air indefinitely by ABC.
The episode crystallizes a profound irony in America's cultural wars: Cancel Culture, once wielded predominantly by progressives to enforce their "social justice norms", is now turning inward, ensnaring its erstwhile champions. Jimmy Kimmel once thrived as a sharp-tongued satirist, skewering the absurdities of power from his perch on ABC but that perch like so many other careers over the years has been atomized by Cancel Culture.
The hydra of the social media era, has long thrived on outrage's asymmetry. Born in the crucible of #MeToo and Black Lives Matter, it weaponized platforms like Twitter. Liberals championed it as a tool for "social justice" to enforce "accountability"--or, critics argued, vengeance.
Historically, Cancel Culture has disproportionately targeted conservatives. Take actress Gina Carano, fired from Disney's "The Mandalorian" in 2021 after social media posts where she compared COVID policies to Nazi actions in WW2. Liberals largely applauded, viewing it as "a stand against hate speech." Similarly, Roseanne Barr's ABC sitcom was axed in 2018 over a racist tweet about Valerie Jarrett, with progressives hailing the move as "necessary accountability."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fd6dd18-94de-4ec8-99fa-be3401a24c5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Tucker Carlson's abrupt departure from Fox News in 2023, amid lawsuits and controversies, elicited cheers from the left, who saw it as "curbing misinformation." And Donald Trump's ban from Twitter following the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot was defended by many Democrats as "protecting democracy" from incitement.
Liberals, quick to embraced de-platforming as a tool for "social progress," dismissed conservative complaints as overreactions as they went about their work as moral arbiters.
Now however they feel very differently.
_**" The average time between a liberal switching sides on an argument is two years" -Anon**_
The situation is not so funny when the wolf is at your door and their cries of _**" silencing"**_ and _**" infringements on their first amendment rights"**_ to conservatives sound like selective amnesia.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/498cb2a8-d83d-4111-96fe-6c94b8eec3a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hollywood, naturally, has erupted in protest over the Kimmel situation, decrying it as an _**" assault on free speech."**_ Yet for many on the right, this was the most ironic poetic justice--a taste of the medicine liberals had long prescribed for everyone else being dispensed to them. To see it administered gave immense satisfaction, to take part in dispensing it, cathartic.
_**"The party of tolerance is suddenly allergic to consequences." -Anon**_
The chickens for the Left in America are very much coming home to roost and they are not enjoying it very much. The problem for them is that a vast amount of their political strategy for most of the last decade has has been inextricably intertwined with Cancel Culture. They did it to conservatives, they did it to members of their own tribe who they did not think conformed to their view of "social moral purity", and for a while it worked, Cancel Culture was their pet, but now they have lost control of the leash and those are on the right are in no hurry to save them from a monster they themselves created.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/235e79b4-5414-4fc8-91e7-4a8352402ccc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Conservatives are grieving for the loss of Kirk, but from that grief is emerging a resolve not seen before. Conservatives learned the rules of Cancel Culture long ago, as anyone who had questions about climate change, covid's origins, the efficacy of the covid vaccines and lockdowns, or dare we say it, the 2020 election, discovered to their cost. So now they seek to take the fight to the left, to subject them to the same scrutiny they have endured and it is very evident that it is something the left is totally and utterly unprepared for.
For more than half a decade the weapon of choice for the Left was Cancel Culture. They championed it like there would never be a reckoning to face. Self assured that it would never turn on them. The evidence is everywhere, littered on their social feeds. Bold posts dripping with patronizing moral condescension about the need to censor view points and silence people they did not like, and cheering when their mob justice felled another career. Kimmel was no exception.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a69de34-f5f4-4cbe-856a-9eb7937ec51c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They spoke in a way that all moral zealots do, that the world will regard them as the pinnacle of lawful good for eternity. But just as they banished Christmas songs from the forties ("Baby it's cold outside") because they deemed it contained "problematic language" they are discovering that the passage of time has changed perceptions on their zealous moralism too.
Now it is the turn of the left to feel the chill of Cancel Culture as it wafts past them, to have old tweets dragged out into the light and harshly examined under a new paradigm of thought.
To recycle the arguments conservatives made when you mercilessly unleashed this force on them is a fools errand, they will fall on deaf ears because for many on the right, we are fine with it.
* * *
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d59b7600-6500-462a-a40d-a7ea9de6ee7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: "The party of tolerance is suddenly allergic to consequences." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "The party of tolerance is suddenly allergic to consequences." | | | Sep 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | From the outset, it should be acknowledged that Cancel Culture represents one of the most pernicious legacies of the digital era--a phenomenon that, in its essence, revives the specter of public tribunals akin to French Revolution executions, where judgment is swift, collective, and often irrevocable. | | ---|---|--- Far from mere social ostracism, it inflicts wounds that extend beyond reputation, dismantling careers, livelihoods, and psyches in ways that echo a perpetual exile, irrespective of the offense's gravity or context. Article continues below | | ---|---|--- The internet isn't a discussion anymore, it's a shouting match between clickbait, spin, and headlines that sound like bad comedy. One minute you're checking the weather, the next you're wondering if "Ambassador Arrested in His Underwear" is news, or just Tuesday. That 's why we built Freespoke. Freespoke puts you back in control. One tap shows you the consensus, the divide, and expert insights from podcasts, so you see the truth, not the propaganda. It's private, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No porn. No data harvesting. Just clarity. Whether you're fact-checking a meme, decoding a viral TikTok, or cutting through the "official version" of events, Freespoke is your chaos-killer. And as an exclusive for The Capitalist readers: Get 35% off Freespoke Premium with code cap35. Premium unlocks enhanced privacy by blocking all ads while using the app which means no more creepy data-stalking ads. Plus, you get unlimited AI summaries that simplify complex stories in seconds, and fully searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the source. Don't lose the truth in the chaos of the internet. and take back control. Article continues Those of us immersed in the media landscape on the right are intimately acquainted with this force. At the Capitalist we are no strangers to Cancel Culture. Over years of navigating newsrooms and digital platforms, our staff have witnessed its toll first hand: the ever present self-censorship to avoid its Sauron like gaze, friends and colleagues ensnared in its web, institutions where we once contributed eroded, and the subtle, pervasive creep of its "logic" into the algorithms that govern our daily discourse. We have observed and worked for thriving enterprises, bolstered by robust financials, reduced to ruins in mere weeks--victims not of overt censorship but of opaque "adjustments" to "algorithmic visibility", fragmenting their reach and viability in the name of "fact checking" and "trust scores". In starker instances, the mechanisms were laid bare: shadow bans and outright expulsions from platforms, executed without transparency or recourse, leaving the afflicted to ponder the unspoken rationales from their couch, jobless. Yet, in the wake of Charlie Kirk's assassination--a seismic event that has reshaped the political terrain--this amorphous entity, unbound by ideology, has pivoted toward fresh prey. Cancel Culture has come for the liberals and the conservative view largely is, we are fine with it. The initial repercussions were immediate and visceral: individuals, long used to consequence free radical political expression online vented their schadenfreude online over Kirk's demise, only to face swift professional reprisals as their posts were circulated to employers, culminating in terminations within hours or days, their employers citing violations of conduct policies amid public outcry. " It turns out that the right is more than adept at Cancel Culture " -Anon We are now entering a subsequent phase of this unfolding drama, where the targets have escalated from anonymous users ensnared by a fleeting TikTok clip or an ill-advised Facebook rant to figures of prominence: celebrities, influencers, and cultural arbiters, hauled before the unforgiving court of public scrutiny. | | ---|---|--- Then came the big scalp: Late-night host Jimmy Kimmel, who knowingly went on-air and repeated false information about the Kirk's assassin which drew ire from conservatives and advertisers, then doubled down according to The Hollywood Reporter: Consequently he was pulled off the air indefinitely by ABC. The episode crystallizes a profound irony in America's cultural wars: Cancel Culture, once wielded predominantly by progressives to enforce their "social justice norms", is now turning inward, ensnaring its erstwhile champions. Jimmy Kimmel once thrived as a sharp-tongued satirist, skewering the absurdities of power from his perch on ABC but that perch like so many other careers over the years has been atomized by Cancel Culture. The hydra of the social media era, has long thrived on outrage's asymmetry. Born in the crucible of #MeToo and Black Lives Matter, it weaponized platforms like Twitter. Liberals championed it as a tool for "social justice" to enforce "accountability"--or, critics argued, vengeance. Historically, Cancel Culture has disproportionately targeted conservatives. Take actress Gina Carano, fired from Disney's "The Mandalorian" in 2021 after social media posts where she compared COVID policies to Nazi actions in WW2. Liberals largely applauded, viewing it as "a stand against hate speech." Similarly, Roseanne Barr's ABC sitcom was axed in 2018 over a racist tweet about Valerie Jarrett, with progressives hailing the move as "necessary accountability." | | ---|---|--- Tucker Carlson's abrupt departure from Fox News in 2023, amid lawsuits and controversies, elicited cheers from the left, who saw it as "curbing misinformation." And Donald Trump's ban from Twitter following the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot was defended by many Democrats as "protecting democracy" from incitement. Liberals, quick to embraced de-platforming as a tool for "social progress," dismissed conservative complaints as overreactions as they went about their work as moral arbiters. Now however they feel very differently. " The average time between a liberal switching sides on an argument is two years" -Anon The situation is not so funny when the wolf is at your door and their cries of " silencing" and " infringements on their first amendment rights" to conservatives sound like selective amnesia. | | ---|---|--- Hollywood, naturally, has erupted in protest over the Kimmel situation, decrying it as an " assault on free speech." Yet for many on the right, this was the most ironic poetic justice--a taste of the medicine liberals had long prescribed for everyone else being dispensed to them. To see it administered gave immense satisfaction, to take part in dispensing it, cathartic. "The party of tolerance is suddenly allergic to consequences." -Anon The chickens for the Left in America are very much coming home to roost and they are not enjoying it very much. The problem for them is that a vast amount of their political strategy for most of the last decade has has been inextricably intertwined with Cancel Culture. They did it to conservatives, they did it to members of their own tribe who they did not think conformed to their view of "social moral purity", and for a while it worked, Cancel Culture was their pet, but now they have lost control of the leash and those are on the right are in no hurry to save them from a monster they themselves created. | | ---|---|--- Conservatives are grieving for the loss of Kirk, but from that grief is emerging a resolve not seen before. Conservatives learned the rules of Cancel Culture long ago, as anyone who had questions about climate change, covid's origins, the efficacy of the covid vaccines and lockdowns, or dare we say it, the 2020 election, discovered to their cost. So now they seek to take the fight to the left, to subject them to the same scrutiny they have endured and it is very evident that it is something the left is totally and utterly unprepared for. For more than half a decade the weapon of choice for the Left was Cancel Culture. They championed it like there would never be a reckoning to face. Self assured that it would never turn on them. The evidence is everywhere, littered on their social feeds. Bold posts dripping with patronizing moral condescension about the need to censor view points and silence people they did not like, and cheering when their mob justice felled another career. Kimmel was no exception. | | ---|---|--- They spoke in a way that all moral zealots do, that the world will regard them as the pinnacle of lawful good for eternity. But just as they banished Christmas songs from the forties ("Baby it's cold outside") because they deemed it contained "problematic language" they are discovering that the passage of time has changed perceptions on their zealous moralism too. Now it is the turn of the left to feel the chill of Cancel Culture as it wafts past them, to have old tweets dragged out into the light and harshly examined under a new paradigm of thought. To recycle the arguments conservatives made when you mercilessly unleashed this force on them is a fools errand, they will fall on deaf ears because for many on the right, we are fine with it. | | ---|---|--- Thanks for reading The Capitalist! This post is public so feel free to share it. You're currently a free subscriber to . body:
Charlie always believed this day would come
54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25.

| | [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09aa2f96301348f7ad7c32e6ef948ec3&_e=c7kDhKkJSCoeYvDNOf4qItV3fphwP2QeHmXltqT-1uAGKXVGTxaMVmKVoyDYvZSky--B6eDTzEY8Fdwo82nvvVTyWGHUxW729ZZNW702jX3bZ2CZMpgG6GR8LwU7kOf42Ar-11gzGYwK01hxXTccQ70rMK4S1kY18qn4hbM8W1fBvdguaJa3OWNaDEPpK37zhLsWmougCdeDrOd7hCgLN8BMHAozKe5MCKqyyW6Gs7pt9S24294cMLK9VwhnNWUTeH8zRnbAjwDqGEzM6bQOf2EL1zA8RDRDJFrlGqIaSsufYO91urJQrSCbL2DAtICI7Zq6BuM5CKS0Dl3GmdjWBg27AuH7GMLP7CJvS8VZXfk8ZGHqMG6QhSOtgR7j3FUmDM_1IaDluarXju9Y496iPlWOsBMpjnEvh-9Nw1dgRjF3w692XDffseSmVdPYZaE5OsHRjw1hjN8iymwWPzCQVP1I6QX3shIdqs047yLPwKjd7kfUcRb_tM84o3MmWWLddwy6LBOPBHo6Kti62bPsN_YuEnJ283Ay1aFRY1USEHZlNlASwXmm0hAZmPWWfoTYWs7prQvr-6GGaVQnmtmpXZPVtdl2g4AWyWgq38uKP6OLgqEU2qY1PzMoAWorldzN8VVQoK4tGjNrheMxHsbIJF_zCrZwi78jJBqeyYDceqc6-3kkSrV80PiSAvDOEspvmx_PuWx0-MzoSujOPmXqLsEcKVd50nnsd-UiWKEQHoA%3D)

Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09aa2f96301348f7ad7c32e6ef948ec3&_e=c7kDhKkJSCoeYvDNOf4qItV3fphwP2QeHmXltqT-1uAGKXVGTxaMVmKVoyDYvZSky--B6eDTzEY8Fdwo82nvvVTyWGHUxW729ZZNW702jX3bZ2CZMpgG6GR8LwU7kOf42Ar-11gzGYwK01hxXTccQ70rMK4S1kY18qn4hbM8W1fBvdguaJa3OWNaDEPpK37zhLsWmougCdeDrOd7hCgLN8BMHAozKe5MCKqyyW6Gs7pt9S24294cMLK9VwhnNWUTiQDGRi3a15Hh0qjMJtMzaiAVyHeqjUP_yQCwOwX-pGjd4qy9fly6M9vZ6dZVwpirV7bl45VcTv1uQn82rhYn6PNnw_q3VG4cqORKgozEG5ebJ7hOHdlo0jzCrzW1iyS04__C5xfWfG-eS7vfYxTPiowjzpZZjIMcS3cQy7-htDuMLjj4Vo_RefrBqZJOSsCB_lsngD-Fb3vg1Q7MgC7TYo-67oR6qpv_3mJ5JVufQTcyYGncYD2P8itUG32RGNt1pIk9k4tP9u8inkWWSxdeUv6ertkPJHhws9XVTcfQ8RyKMGPZAdAOIz-uPzMMH4_YJELW8nzAp_7SEtkjnVYcs1ZDUlvMv9xG-4-ODJd4QzGD5-Fzs0Sfi-HUw0Ndrw3fre3jgCSmwkncR3SVIx2L1ba25ChlTm6NDsFodstLvnPN7xb1DbO2QMFbU3msxThbg--UOyBjwYdOBt3wNG7osCpyVjLsBLDgGO7NcsIg-A8%3D)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09aa2f96301348f7ad7c32e6ef948ec3&_e=c7kDhKkJSCoeYvDNOf4qItV3fphwP2QeHmXltqT-1uAGKXVGTxaMVmKVoyDYvZSky--B6eDTzEY8Fdwo82nvvVTyWGHUxW729ZZNW702jX3bZ2CZMpgG6GR8LwU7kOf42Ar-11gzGYwK01hxXTccQ70rMK4S1kY18qn4hbM8W1fBvdguaJa3OWNaDEPpK37zhLsWmougCdeDrOd7hCgLN8BMHAozKe5MCKqyyW6Gs7pt9S24294cMLK9VwhnNWUTXoHxUCsFHEVVf-bD8f-OZnbFpxo272QmlRfmQtAljPcLX9riwk9Mus4krsDMAm1A5LAn84aGsR-jVK_FbsHvN70FokwUuf8iMv1HEDqNdtK14UiV7fOwHZFN-o3KCSZKclcgz3Ct886stCq0_8x3TJSJqhBCBNXpfyu64sl-fEi18kpiEi_wm45qksY1msmtdTwAuFekY0VbBPTsSoig8c-pDKuEmhkfbl7KI9viLVZ125oZ-q601TFa0RkRen_O8FVbth-HmV4bbpz3fR-eyYF1KVbc3Dq7_wUajmmeO2N7dv1hLA4rLISwugqhsoIuSjQC3SVwDb0L2fARZds55oO20_XSSZ8NVnSn8ypU-KHmyyUQZAl9g0A7cI_aMzWMj2R9lfQ0fvrjR18Fkby8Y5thFdBGxuFoBBrM1FXo1NtRTxYOa3EH-ic2gqzTftg0JAKI_FR9Fjjv3Z1M53fYyDMHldCOUe5KDhUQK_WyZC4%3D)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---
[**1 KIT = $25**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=09aa2f96301348f7ad7c32e6ef948ec3&_e=c7kDhKkJSCoeYvDNOf4qItV3fphwP2QeHmXltqT-1uAGKXVGTxaMVmKVoyDYvZSky--B6eDTzEY8Fdwo82nvvVTyWGHUxW729ZZNW702jX3bZ2CZMpgG6GR8LwU7kOf42Ar-11gzGYwK01hxXTccQ70rMK4S1kY18qn4hbM8W1fBvdguaJa3OWNaDEPpK37zhLsWmougCdeDrOd7hCgLN8BMHAozKe5MCKqyyW6Gs7pt9S24294cMLK9VwhnNWUTye-Nd-HeiXYi-47qsDROX4T24LscPTtnGDjP9VLUSVjCxDoP3iZa3PYLJby7T2FUVacfOTLzOkPB-ng4NzUNnTdkvnj717CMX9icDMK51WV3IZIB5PGXTG7ho6D0--PQgGcmrrmsd6eb0HBQs--t_1au02sOmR-eVL7I2N6pkXP_QY2kKRD__gJaNqGlfd_mggUuTXJDQdU3WjxBI8Kw_INwHiz7l6wEkvhziByJMxJTBFpmC8r4sQcIzQOoc4tME_9EHh9ZzdzoJRxEWWrBx5zA206UQT076jWbebQQVMROYRG8OGfxSAy2A63i3lpUIk4QLn-VguHOFQ-oXveerrYOUdhLu33bJcddwz-O9KwBE-LD_ZrfcsDmw_rCSouOFXeswiQCPjZvUAUoSCobThEsi4GbfO6zkYbOwpoQeu3s8a19lNhDSpMMdrnhhF1lmrODphMLHqbBIO4YK8OfEgSbFMTEStawECd3UaKNJa8%3D)

clean_body: Charlie always believed this day would come 54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25. | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here 's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

subject: Democracy alert: Trump DOJ pushing for sweeping voter roll data grab

body:

**➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ is planning to hand your voter registration data to DHS** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115654994/571024895/1071238056?refcode=em-9.21.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlZmRmMi0wYjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF1u9uDg_wuE5PVOA1r_o94c_ouCYANJBW6SkMh08CI=)
* * *
Friend. This week we learned something deeply dangerous: the U.S. Justice Department is considering transferring massive amounts of voter registration data from states to Homeland Security for use in criminal and immigration investigations. **They’ve collected this data via letters to at least 22 states.** It includes full voter rolls – names, addresses, sometimes driver’s license numbers – and now they want DHS to start cross‐referencing it with law enforcement and immigration databases. **This isn’t about cleaning up the rolls. It’s about surveillance. It’s about intimidation. It’s another tool in Trump’s authoritarian toolbox.** State election officials and independent legal experts are sounding alarms. Privacy laws may be violated. Voter trust will be eroded. Communities of color, immigrants, and those already targeted will feel the consequences first. **That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State matter now more than ever.** They’re refusing to turn over sensitive data without safeguards. They are defending everything from privacy to voter integrity. But defending rights takes resources: legal muscle, organizing power, and public awareness. [**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help us support Secretaries of State resisting this data grab and protect our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115654995/571024896/1071238056?refcode=em-9.21.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlZmRmMi0wYjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF1u9uDg_wuE5PVOA1r_o94c_ouCYANJBW6SkMh08CI=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115654996/571024897/1071238056?refcode=em-9.21.25-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTVlZmRmMi0wYjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TF1u9uDg_wuE5PVOA1r_o94c_ouCYANJBW6SkMh08CI=)**

clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: DOJ is planning to hand your voter registration data to DHS = Friend. This week we learned something deeply dangerous: the U.S. Justice Department is considering transferring massive amounts of voter registration data from states to Homeland Security for use in criminal and immigration investigations. They’ve collected this data via letters to at least 22 states. It includes full voter rolls – names, addresses, sometimes driver’s license numbers – and now they want DHS to start cross‐referencing it with law enforcement and immigration databases. This isn’t about cleaning up the rolls. It’s about surveillance. It’s about intimidation. It’s another tool in Trump’s authoritarian toolbox. State election officials and independent legal experts are sounding alarms. Privacy laws may be violated. Voter trust will be eroded. Communities of color, immigrants, and those already targeted will feel the consequences first. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State matter now more than ever. They’re refusing to turn over sensitive data without safeguards. They are defending everything from privacy to voter integrity. But defending rights takes resources: legal muscle, organizing power, and public awareness. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Aria, United We Dream
subject: The dreams of our students matter
body:
No one should have to worry about their ability to continue their schooling because they can’t afford it. | | | Peter — In August, we shared that in-state tuition was under attack in Texas. **Now, we’re seeing the same attacks play out again —**** _this time in Illinois._** Illinois has become the fifth state to be targeted for offering in-state tuition to undocumented students who grew up in that state.1 **** Let’s be clear: _We have to protect the freedom to learn for students everywhere._ [**These are victories OUR communities won. If you can, chip in right now to join our movement:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPbLQLlmAxsmHYJcLcseewrGVVR7QfbsWbfp5UTxyEJr2JUFRnAbYauT2VDn84fdOnGaEvA55heXHFHw112CrCCPFDFjQHaA28p2_AQc9fR6SYvxTwkYOEmjzl4OIMwERUA2bIbmT_3RjQNHaWQl7Iy3V_25h7eu3mh38As54iM1zd0fqtVlspzJV9P_jCf9zvrun4GrnpFLSiehFHu6mvJc1OxIvLWKA44477Afdjo8JZ-lQAe0DwOsEeq-skeh8X_ds-zNUhRNp7G4Mn0XYBcj7xWWgAkFG3VvlwoPeubjF8ob5vVny0gH5BDbDU0jc9kJ3k8jZ_Q2m0CH8cM_GAHMBuggTz_DKRlg0ON_CAR2MA/4k3/LklgF5JARi6ySujAXkrl2w/h0/h001.MKpp53oFKKN45nbd4A6iETBYd2T9QjcZXFaCmgszXVg) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoVTp7uH9u5yk7V4A-QxLPbLQLlmAxsmHYJcLcseewrGiEeoEOlFWClxc7J74d_xKJbWzs5eQ4IwhY-0lemrFe7hP1CDjh0nmTkDZixiu6ezZqlBfCOUwvpm9dzTkTs5Bs7NVWe9cxzD-NuHdIqdqsRh--7TZSx3UgmAOU_TIMHiIA4Or4_yQ6-MT94lHI5QJxjk0EVOuU9arVOHevaYSj1QgZoH5bx2eDMF0uA3SkWGSJGfDV6G81dNy1m7T8EH-dBt55N_X63LWBSiWO-sc0KnWHh6jYG9l5Ao62FNG-5uDF0V67seIYE-h7RoJ8vPkBvMiPoZ-RBhpkJrSfAQKlMx_3VAd360H79bmZlaqZE1cDTvsRfO12A8-7hi8fCSLA/4k3/LklgF5JARi6ySujAXkrl2w/h1/h001.gRJT3AyzeWfP-vgPlnA_heyYnz8-iaxRfzNx5YM4rPU)
---
The truth is that students power our communities, our states, and our economy. When everyone has the opportunity to learn regardless of their background, it is a net positive for all of us.
When higher education is under attack, _that means opportunity is at risk for all of us._ It’s unacceptable that students are being robbed of their freedom to learn simply because of their immigration status.
[**The dreams of our students matter, and we won’t stop organizing until every student has access to the high-quality education they deserve. clean_body: No one should have to worry about their ability to continue their schooling because they can’t afford it. | | | Peter — In August, we shared that in-state tuition was under attack in Texas. Now, we’re seeing the same attacks play out again — this time in Illinois. Illinois has become the fifth state to be targeted for offering in-state tuition to undocumented students who grew up in that state.1 ** Let’s be clear: We have to protect the freedom to learn for students everywhere. | | The truth is that students power our communities, our states, and our economy. When everyone has the opportunity to learn regardless of their background, it is a net positive for all of us. When higher education is under attack, that means opportunity is at risk for all of us. It’s unacceptable that students are being robbed of their freedom to learn simply because of their immigration status. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. This moment demands we come together as teachers, as students, as people , to build a future where every young person has the opportunity to succeed. Thank you for standing with us, Aria, United We Dream | 1\. “Illinois Latest State to Face Lawsuit Over In-State Tuition for Noncitizens.” Inside Higher Ed. September 4, 2025. If Democrats hold this seat, we send a powerful message: Republicans are on defense before 2026 even begins — and grassroots Democrats can overcome their MAGA millions. If we win here, we prove their so-called majority is crumbling and their path to power is slipping away. We need to show overwhelming grassroots strength right now. Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df6672750b5f432085bdacd399048b3b&_e=sUHH3qJ5qkT2LpSJZHno9Rxi30_VOVCce139PNwxba4Zcmz6OMsz39XC2uj_FXhsPon3FdvrDc_9vF-TErcq4B6hvFugzsr9eBPkO3Ob8pZUgN7E3lZqdlR73XAEh_XTC0PduaX3OKEuD464nVKM8g6OoEJvDy6_JV5EgiOobmaLfe9Gq3hGYjiKC3dC-7znzw9PrMnkhPuc5yUHYYMBzxrgql6qwloyu38zM7Ss4qfSNJg9AKcgerU-pt7sCGxEYtrzK1Pu16xcolYj10Rdf0g5vtjM-89yTyIlMh-0cdPwSeLJLGPaBkrCT2hahHcVMmcnDiaYTXMKKmXA7StSvR1ocaFQpJQow4pRnOurGyEnBEKWgrhhhVgVR4wwpNK9nEHWP9GBEbCnC_HKtQREMF2_nNWG2E4Nm4n7wqxjW0dg9jqBBNJkoNFM2M_xgNFNM7EwLe0xEIJU064Xxk3OC7knoMTyhFFAFN0WHGNOKWX-ZJh33XNf5dfyGi8LY8QpJSJ1OhAtdL2A3RZ_V2HGioS68ZhNVXOp3UiX0vIZejsI0R8G3iw_pG5CJk49YMpPCi3JgS91oimWCNkANSkpcQmXaeni3m8TwaF4xbZXTawnsJzz8d0csI0pOig-aPP4JPdkFdo-6o9FvyzV71diqBSA83QUcgbG9_53eJWnrlW-Il92sEs4RWCKUFxhYuy3_MXllsVyXQ-btYhBOdSvzMg8K7LwpprkhxiHQkTkcqk%3D)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=df6672750b5f432085bdacd399048b3b&_e=sUHH3qJ5qkT2LpSJZHno9Rxi30_VOVCce139PNwxba4Zcmz6OMsz39XC2uj_FXhsPon3FdvrDc_9vF-TErcq4B6hvFugzsr9eBPkO3Ob8pZUgN7E3lZqdlR73XAEh_XTC0PduaX3OKEuD464nVKM8g6OoEJvDy6_JV5EgiOobmaLfe9Gq3hGYjiKC3dC-7znzw9PrMnkhPuc5yUHYYMBzxrgql6qwloyu38zM7Ss4qfSNJg9AKcgerU-pt7sCGxEWMhvH7p8BYk7chHq_e0sDRrZ_OKMlGynND_vyvvq92KXLKdJHzqoXaHj5zcWQ6Zf0yrsOGphD0zShEmU9UOWo6-C5bZdEkqVhaEK6EJwbc10JHHb8ysn9sGIF0gfSV3qnRLiqfIO8cTklbCQAvi93gK9hwq4_i-DYkqhRqwFcB59LxiswHxQAnWYuHovWX0tY0SDGqqbwKtjvqc5Z2HrsosqY_g5gvDCUjWYEJto1UOYnVD8A6XYz__Fn3yeFAedarBhQou-BX59Fs1q1Cvg4JOAoBh7UGa42lP2UQm3Gy7r19EP1qpMb6-5x-c7AUZy4lce2uiJscU80ltxT94a7fdXfl_dXZS73HfM0nm_wsxt6IzhMsaPEG58F77ZojN_1noSD6OBWQwObMmf9NKHdlgZESpyIul7bLPdWOtUP3ja2IPHC8T_dUygMzaFWZGrAwNAQCA-gpWI87l1tux-PsuPu7eMZlopFVEqO4UUisc%3D)

He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Friend, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... **Thank you.** We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... **You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. ** God is so good.

**For Charlie,** -The Turning Point USA Family **P.S.** Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, _we 're grateful._ But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. **Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter.**

clean_body: God is so good 54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25. | | Friend, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Friend, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Friend... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Friend, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Friend, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Friend, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here 's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Friend, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Friend, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

With early voting underway NOW, we need the resources to get our message out to voters at the doors, online, and in their communities.

clean_body: | | | — Our campaign is powered by people like you. But we are also supported by countless organizations — like REPRO Rising VA — that know what it takes to win big fights for working families, women, and the future of this country. We are proud to share that we have earned the endorsements of: REPRO Rising VA Clean Virginia Climate Cabinet Action EMILYs List Everytown for Gun Safety / Moms Demand Action Freedom Virginia LGBT+ Democrats of Virginia The National Women’s Political Caucus – Virginia Virginia AFL-CIO Virginia National Organization for Women Virginia’s List Vote Mama The Working Families Party Swing Left Lead Locally IBEW This list is long! These organizations represent teachers and nurses, working families and caregivers, women and parents, advocates for gun safety and climate action — and they’re all united behind our campaign. But endorsements alone won’t win this race. With early voting underway NOW, we need the resources to get our message out to voters at the doors, online, and in their communities. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. With the strength of these endorsements and the power of grassroots supporters like you, we will protect Virginia’s Democratic majority and keep moving forward. Thanks so much for being in this fight with us. With gratitude, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m asking you to support Daniel Biss’ race for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
With Daniel Biss in Congress, I know I’ll have a partner fighting for real change.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
Right now, there are too many people in Congress fighting for the wealthy and well-connected, and not enough looking out for working families. As Donald Trump the Republican party abandon working people and hand control of our government over to billionaires, we need more leaders in Congress who not only have a track record of actually fighting for working families — but delivering for them, too. **That’s why I've endorsed Daniel Biss in the race for Illinois’ 9th Congressional District — and I’m asking you to support him in this critical race, too. Daniel isn’t taking a dollar from corporate PACs, and grassroots support really makes a difference.** [**Before I tell you more about why I’m supporting Daniel, please split a donation between our movement and his campaign today to send a true progressive fighter to Congress.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=8&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---

---
From his time serving in the Illinois state legislature to his current role as Mayor of Evanston, Daniel is someone who has delivered progressive solutions that make a real difference in people’s lives. He has helped pass major abortion rights legislation, secured retirement savings for millions of seniors, taken bold action to address the climate crisis, enacted desperately-needed campaign finance reform, strengthened privacy protections, and much more. **And he’s done all this while fighting against wealthy and powerful special interests who have opposed him at every turn.** That’s the type of leader we need in Congress — someone who is relentless in the fight to deliver for working families, regardless of who’s standing in the way. With Daniel in Congress, I know that I’ll have a partner by my side who will fight as hard as possible to make real progress on health care, housing, climate, abortion rights, and the things that matter most to working people. [**So if you’re ready to send a fighter to Congress who will take on the billionaires and deliver for working people, please split a donation between Daniel’s campaign and ours today. He’s not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so your donation, no matter how much, makes a huge difference.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=14&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3151?t=12&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=2655%2E4032634%2E73G3pV)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Private Briefing: Close the Enthusiasm Gap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Monday, September 22nd at 6 pm Central

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9TZXB0ZW1iZXItVFRIMV8yMDI1MDkxNyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVNlcHRlbWJlci1UVEgxJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTc1In0/1bNtWG8B58KRikcJjq4dRw)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, **Please join me for an exclusive telephone town hall on Monday, September 22****nd,****by calling toll-free at 833-380-0731 at 6 pm Central that night.**_**During our conversation, I will be discussing everything that we must do to close the ALARMING Radical Left enthusiasm gap in order to defend our Republican Congressional Majorities, if we want to stop the Democrats from cutting President Trump 's term in half**_**!** Fellow Conservative, the Radical Left is outraising us, their activists are fired up, and their enthusiasm is driving turnout, leading to shocking victories in special elections this year. That's why President Trump has given me the task of closing this enthusiasm gap, and ensuring we defend our House and Senate Majorities in the midterms! Please understand that our opponents have been working around the clock since they lost, plotting a course to take back control of Congress, while too many conservatives have been relaxing since our victory nearly a year ago. We have a lot to discuss about how we can close the enthusiasm gap to stop the Left's momentum! To join, just dial in at this **CONFIDENTIAL** toll-free number:**833-380-0731**. _**_This briefing is for conservative, America First Patriots only, so do not share this message with anyone who is not like-minded_**_** _._** During the call, you will have an opportunity to ask me your questions directly, and I look forward to answering them. Friend, your participation in the fight to protect our values and defend our Congressional Majorities is critical to the future of our great nation. Thanks in advance for joining the call on **Monday****, September 22****nd********at 6 PM Central**. I look forward to speaking with you. For liberty, Ted Cruz **PS:**_**Space is limited for this private, grassroots briefing on Mon****day, September 22****nd****at 6 pm CT**_**. clean_body: Monday, September 22nd at 6 pm Central | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Please join me for an exclusive telephone town hall on Monday, September 22nd,by calling toll-free at 833-380-0731 at 6 pm Central that night.During our conversation, I will be discussing everything that we must do to close the ALARMING Radical Left enthusiasm gap in order to defend our Republican Congressional Majorities, if we want to stop the Democrats from cutting President Trump 's term in half! Fellow Conservative, the Radical Left is outraising us, their activists are fired up, and their enthusiasm is driving turnout, leading to shocking victories in special elections this year. That's why President Trump has given me the task of closing this enthusiasm gap, and ensuring we defend our House and Senate Majorities in the midterms! Please understand that our opponents have been working around the clock since they lost, plotting a course to take back control of Congress, while too many conservatives have been relaxing since our victory nearly a year ago. We have a lot to discuss about how we can close the enthusiasm gap to stop the Left's momentum! To join, just dial in at this CONFIDENTIAL toll-free number:833-380-0731. This briefing is for conservative, America First Patriots only, so do not share this message with anyone who is not like-minded . During the call, you will have an opportunity to ask me your questions directly, and I look forward to answering them. Friend, your participation in the fight to protect our values and defend our Congressional Majorities is critical to the future of our great nation. Thanks in advance for joining the call on Monday, September 22nd****at 6 PM Central. I look forward to speaking with you. For liberty, Ted Cruz PS:Space is limited for this private, grassroots briefing on Monday, September 22ndat 6 pm CT. name: Abigail
subject: I'm asking one final time...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
How much we raise over these first few days of early voting matters a lot. But it's about more than that. It's about the message we send.

Hi Peter, it's Abigail. I wanted you to hear this from me personally:
_This is a crucial moment for our campaign._
And yes, how much we raise over these first few days of early voting matters a lot. But it's about more than that. _It's about the message we send._
We have momentum on our side right now. But that could change once our latest fundraising numbers become public.
If they're strong, the press and my opponent will see the grassroots strength of our campaign. If we fall short, it sends a signal to Winsome Earle-Sears and National Republicans that they can win and bring Trump's agenda to our Commonwealth.
**That's why I feel the responsibility not just to win, but to win big.**
[__**So, I'm asking one final time this weekend: Will you contribute your first $25 before midnight and join our grassroots donor list?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115659667/571038912/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-21_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI0ZmY2ZTUtMTY5Ny1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8hDFCgeNU1U0NZjV7Y-3ejTUItH_Kf_FmsDI8yFg7uc=)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W) **HORRIBLE UPDATE FROM _NPR:_** [**"Trump files $15 billion defamation lawsuit against the _New York Times”_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=3&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W) [ **Sign NOW to stand with the free press against Trump’s attacks → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=4&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=5&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W)

* * *
Team – Trump’s constant attacks on the press have been RELENTLESS...

–He’s **THREATENED** to PULL _MSNBC_ off the air.
–He **BANNED** the _Associated Press_ from White House Press Briefings.
–He **PRESSURED** _ABC_ to CANCEL Jimmy Kimmel's late night show.
–And now, he’s **SUING** the _New York Times_ for publishing “FAKE NEWS” articles about how he made his fortune.

Donald Trump is attacking news outlets like the _Associated Press, MSNBC,_ and the _New York Times_ because they report the **TRUTH,** not just what Trump wants people to know.

**Seriously, team:**[**It has never been more important to stand up for the free press. ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=7&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W)
[ **So please, join [15,000] other local Democrats and sign TODAY to stand with the free press nationwide → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=8&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W)
[SIGN MY NAME NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69160?t=9&akid=23422%2E4449941%2ErEJP-W)

Counting on you,

Fight For Reform

In football, the game’s not over until the final whistle blows. The same is true for my campaign for Attorney General here in Virginia.

subject: The suspect in Charlie Kirk’s murder made this shocking confession
body:
Police arrested 22-year-old Tyler Robinsin for assassinating Charlie Kirk.
---
[Mark as Spam](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0jszkcc869nfl3o2ceb7oxhs7r3dqn5jowno2w6xnyx748sadxv867zbax988osltxgp3jz2os2gk9e0gkv163tt4djs&__stmp=t2ybkv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xul=1nmc5a54x67zfmd5fi2bt1ih0jszkcc869nfl3o2ceb7oxhs7r3dqn5jowno2w6xnyx748sadxv867zbax988osltxgp3jz2os2gk9e0gkv163tt4djs&__stmp=t2ybkv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

name: Team Pramila
subject: Lawbreaking corporations are walking free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Google broke the law and hurt consumers — and Trump’s letting them get away with it.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250921-5455-footer&t=1&akid=5455%2E420207%2EychyoG)
Peter,
Under the Trump administration, billionaires and giant corporations keep getting more and more handouts from the government — while everyday Americans lose vital lifelines like healthcare and food assistance, have their rights stripped away, and struggle to make ends meet.
**This month’s court ruling against Google is yet another example.**
**FIRST:** **A judge ruled that Google illegally monopolized the search engine market** , crushing competitors and stopping consumers from freely using the internet — what we see, buy, and read — without manipulation.
**THEN:** **The same judge ruled that Google will face barely any consequences** , giving one of the most powerful corporations in the world the green light to harm consumers and small businesses while raking in billions.
**NOW:** **Trump’s DOJ is hailing this as a _major win_** – and they’re right. It’s a win for billionaires, special interests, and Trump’s corporate welfare agenda.
It opens the door for more greed — and Big Tech isn’t wasting time. The last year proved they’ll go to any lengths to avoid accountability, rig the system in their favor, and maximize their profits while Americans pay the price. And they’re pouring money into right-wing political campaigns to make sure no one stands in their way.
**But Pramila isn’t backing down.**
While others talk tough on Big Tech but cozy up to CEOs behind closed doors, Pramila hasn’t changed. The most powerful corporations in the world know she’ll stand up to them, and they’re doing everything they can to stop her.
But Pramila can’t take on Big Tech alone — she needs to know she has you in her corner. This is going to be a massive fight for years to come, but with you on this team, we know people power can prevail over corporate greed.
[**Can you chip in to help fuel Pramila’s work to rein in Big Tech and corporate greed?** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250921-1?refcode=em20250921-5455&refcode2=5455_420207_ychyoG&akid=5455%2E420207%2EychyoG)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250921-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250921-5455&refcode2=5455_420207_ychyoG&akid=5455%2E420207%2EychyoG)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramilla
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250921-5455-footer&t=2&refcode2=5455_420207_ychyoG&akid=5455%2E420207%2EychyoG)**

name: Team Mikie
subject: Can you rush a donation before the debate?
body:
Tonight, Mikie Sherrill takes the stage to make her case to New Jersey voters.

| |
---

Peter, Katherine is the voice at the leadership table for every House Democrat in Congress — and for every American. She knows that fighting back against authoritarianism and the attack on our rights requires coordination and strength. She’s got a plan to win back the House. Your support can make that plan a reality. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Clark Katherine Clark for Congress P.O. Box 159 Belmont, MA 02478 United States | mailto:info@katherineclark.org | Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Donald Trump attacked me from the Oval Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.
#
Peter, Donald Trump attacked me from the Oval Office.
_But I will not be rattled._
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians, driven up costs, and closed our rural health clinics. _In fact, let the President come down to Virginia and answer for the chaos he's unleashed._
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.
**[So, I hope I can earn your support today. Your contribution of $5 or more will be split with State Democrats Committee to help us stand up to Trump's attacks. This is the biggest election of 2025, and we need to raise more resources to reach voters with the truth.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95558?refcode=em20250921-9457&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9457%2E614464%2EFZe3zn)**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Friend, we'd love your response before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Have you ever taken a survey and felt like no one would read it?
