Friend,

Have you ever taken a survey and felt like no one would read it?

**Well, this survey won't go unread.**

I’ve been traveling across Colorado — talking with people from all walks of life. I’ve heard a lot about what’s working and what isn’t.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, that’s why I’m reaching out: **_[Will you take 60 seconds to tell me what issues matter most to you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115661243/571043364/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk922-su-nd&refcode=jtk922-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzA3MWFkZS0xZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9JNgsGc7MivwA_GRLws2tMBG_8xUkkhIY1Gma46AGk=&emci=6426346d-4193-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b7071ade-1d97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)_**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115661244/571043365/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk922-su-nd&refcode=jtk922-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzA3MWFkZS0xZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9JNgsGc7MivwA_GRLws2tMBG_8xUkkhIY1Gma46AGk=&emci=6426346d-4193-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b7071ade-1d97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)

Whether it’s housing, health care, the cost of living, education, or climate — I want to know what challenges are keeping you up at night.
Coloradans deserve a governor who’s focused on the issues that actually affect their lives. I’m listening.

**[Please, will you take my survey now and be part of this conversation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115661245/571043366/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk922-su-nd&refcode=jtk922-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzA3MWFkZS0xZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9JNgsGc7MivwA_GRLws2tMBG_8xUkkhIY1Gma46AGk=&emci=6426346d-4193-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b7071ade-1d97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1295540)**

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Bernie Sanders and I just introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW5fu7vxyqPymYRVJ9dCe1ylp0HdlCyxUQyoaFXEUWcSCc1pUA_1GSU4dqy60BcrrUQvf1yORus8fG-xC-xHJDWxiF0yZQsZd-m0u8J8EOt130A-aOvaVqfnXAQf3dg3pjIZ0PKD3u52_VBtgPaIh8UJ4WXrcJedPO3n4ZxQ3DKLkrxMrvve_CH2f6VDoMxbFr632KFwOGMnQMFpnQc0wdQLYOuNlUmQGLAY2xGOnUzA4M8uJb00vJOgkiy-PzCI98/4k3/oUGhC0bBQQmqhSIB3u5SUQ/h0/h001.6BLZ7vwsxHE8XHJLRvAvNV_bBTBT9bNxPiZdXm4dg8I)
---
Friend, Greedy corporations and their CEOs have never had it so good. They’re price gouging consumers while CEOs are making 290 times that of their average worker. To put this in context, the typical Starbucks worker would need to work 6,600 years to make what their CEO made last year―$95.8 million! At the same time, Tesla’s board of directors is considering a nearly $1 trillion pay package to Elon Musk, who is already the richest man in the world. **That’s why Bernie Sanders and I have introduced the**** _Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_****to tax corporations that pay their top executives more than 50 times their average worker.** At a time when billionaire wealth in the U.S. has reached a record $7.6 trillion and when 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, this bill would put a constraint on excessive CEO pay packages and encourage corporations to raise workers’ wages. [**Tell Congress to act by adding your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the**** _Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7CKIkRsvfShYGNHWycz1ZUAGWJBSzoQaJPWgKLReQrQp_3_3YU7-ApALeIQOV7DYOkeJmWeZ14CmPJctmc8OPI7J033Tb_kkA0D7ieYIAozKt2ToqNl-ssCAZxwUrV7Eo-bppLyl3OEeA0iXi3D90hvWLG_-yMNrbEktj_S2cBr8q4bLVQNV5JUTvqpQzxExQICZFPQ1ltMVMF_6UP0Uc07RL6DLhXC0vCUaQz0IIGhTSB8_LyvaA5JR3ZbND8xlJSIRgCvUTPsLQdWNO9oyhAX0UQkMkirNC0xHO75JHujabhbNx0SgcFlp2WL9-DDwTLFvr6_IeMrtxFZSNIjLpwyvw02hnGDnKmVriIVYGW0ML9KSDXMAI3ZfMuTO44FBwfpzkO9v61Mx2mF_gOheuhYgSWxHfwq9fhBd8y0Kq0QSDc6t7p4V42TL9JoWKWvO_s/4k3/oUGhC0bBQQmqhSIB3u5SUQ/h1/h001.fvhuBSqcDLvl6BhduYd9mlCfAh24FfkzfjSSCTumFTs) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmwH56BiZUa8B4InAnYjFsD9SOcPz4HE978ZnTfc8cO7CKIkRsvfShYGNHWycz1ZUAGWJBSzoQaJPWgKLReQrQp_3_3YU7-ApALeIQOV7DYOkeJmWeZ14CmPJctmc8OPI7J033Tb_kkA0D7ieYIAozKt2ToqNl-ssCAZxwUrV7Eo-bppLyl3OEeA0iXi3D90hvWLG_-yMNrbEktj_S2cBr8q4bLVQNV5JUTvqpQzxExQICZFPQ1ltMVMF_6UP0Uc07RL6DLhXC0vCUaQz0IIGhTY-bWoXbj9jXCT_uMVhU_x0OaRjJYg6GH7eJ84nA7-A1AKwk2joAU5_FelEFBhrAH64KvjC4p0QOA203PVXnyxebZO2Iub_8D6AYWKi-HmP4KuPATfBOQsV3nQXI81nRPtcZ6fnWEuTZybN0wYnOYBnDqbEbBRRRN7DH7UXXgNvf3UcUqEDP4ylA9K7w2MOkDxG9m-A8_6EUduc6BgoqVUQ/4k3/oUGhC0bBQQmqhSIB3u5SUQ/h2/h001.TT8oMjlDnMINzniqqNUe5XYEZs03SM0dMLhM7581Yd4)

Sixty-two percent of Americans are in favor of putting a cap on CEO pay, relative to worker pay. Even Pope Leo has endorsed reining in CEO pay:

clean_body: Coca-Cola’s CEO made 1,980 times that of their average worker who makes $14,144 a year. | | | Friend, Greedy corporations and their CEOs have never had it so good. They’re price gouging consumers while CEOs are making 290 times that of their average worker. To put this in context, the typical Starbucks worker would need to work 6,600 years to make what their CEO made last year―$95.8 million! At the same time, Tesla’s board of directors is considering a nearly $1 trillion pay package to Elon Musk, who is already the richest man in the world. That’s why Bernie Sanders and I have introduced the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Actto tax corporations that pay their top executives more than 50 times their average worker. At a time when billionaire wealth in the U.S. has reached a record $7.6 trillion and when 60% of Americans live paycheck to paycheck, this bill would put a constraint on excessive CEO pay packages and encourage corporations to raise workers’ wages. | Sixty-two percent of Americans are in favor of putting a cap on CEO pay, relative to worker pay. Even Pope Leo has endorsed reining in CEO pay: If the Tax Excessive CEO Pay Act becomes law, and Tesla’s board approves Elon Musk’s nearly $1 trillion pay package, Tesla would owe up to $100 billion more in taxes over the next decade. Together, we’re demanding an economy that works for everyday people, not just wealthy CEOs and corporations. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
As Secretary of Health and Human Services, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is risking millions of American lives.

| Peter, When I worked for Planned Parenthood, I traveled to clinics across the country. I saw places where the local Planned Parenthood clinic was the most affordable healthcare option — AND the most reliable source of science-backed health information for patients and their families. So I know firsthand: It’s hard enough to get accurate health information without the country’s top health official knowingly, deliberately, and consistently spreading lies. **As Secretary of Health and Human Services, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is risking millions of American lives.** His attacks on vaccines have already led to outbreaks of measles and other diseases. Now, he is gutting staff from America’s science and health agencies. Let’s not mince words: _**[Robert F. Kennedy is unfit to serve, and he is a threat to our nation’s health. He must resign immediately. name: The DC Bugle

We won’t sugarcoat it: Democrats have a tough path to winning back the Senate – but **supporting Democratic campaigns is crucial to these efforts.**

Campaigns have to look past partisan politics to take back our power from special interests that prop up politicians like Daines, who then turn around and sell out Montana.

Giving him the boot is the only way we can get back to taking on the issues that matter, like expanding access to affordable healthcare, housing, and groceries.

We have to beat Daines, and we appreciate Reilly Neill for Senate’s support in reaching our common goals.

We’re counting on your grassroots support to drive a surge of turnout and pull off a stunning upset in Montana that will reshape our future and boost down-ballot Democrats. [Will you join Reilly Neill in support of grassroots organizations like ours by splitting a $7 contribution now?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquMsbqgvb_9iNr2WTy5P_7nOYqlSlb8KleRJ5VyHn-9swRM1fTR6rRnFHrWVXVS17QihK-tQifl0BGLw5QMJY8QTbtjc671QwoMIkOi4YNDqUiVbeAHaRHNveNpyY33cjW2uSxtjCuwHjGuKPA41jky9gVV1D7wXqqwDd3w7kno-Z3HynbZcTYSYWwwMb-LEgwHCC6t8NYWCdEUym61orPcj_677cKZDs2S-h3Xlvg8EwXDQYo3pU2Lt4E5ltKLNyFkMi7rkkijRG0d2z8IxOFBF_ry23mdCTGDzFsXtvPqhN_KJZxtnZnsq_Q9W42TjbqJMrmFe1BY-k9a6ZKjNCX3/4k3/zU52kh3JSpaTAjQLWUsD6w/h5/h001.IbrTBVplipO6GX-SY3niQ1YSJBRrJlerNV9DtHRsXBg)

clean_body: | | Reilly Neill is running to be Montana's next U.S. Senator. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Montana’s Democratic central committees have a message about beating Steve Daines. Reilly Neill is on the ballot in 2026, and we’d like to thank her for being the first to join our common and critical effort to take back the Senate and fire “do-nothing” Daines. | | We won’t sugarcoat it: Democrats have a tough path to winning back the Senate – but supporting Democratic campaigns is crucial to these efforts. Campaigns have to look past partisan politics to take back our power from special interests that prop up politicians like Daines, who then turn around and sell out Montana. Giving him the boot is the only way we can get back to taking on the issues that matter, like expanding access to affordable healthcare, housing, and groceries. We have to beat Daines, and we appreciate Reilly Neill for Senate’s support in reaching our common goals. We’re counting on your grassroots support to drive a surge of turnout and pull off a stunning upset in Montana that will reshape our future and boost down-ballot Democrats. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Reilly Neill and the Powell County Democratic Central Committee will process now. | | | | | | Thank you, PCDCC-MontanaDems.org P.S. With Rep. Walkinshaw joining earlier this month, our Coalition has reached a historic milestone.

**At 116 Members, New Dems are now the largest ideological caucus in the House of Representatives _ever_.**

And with that strength comes a clear truth: the future success of House Democrats depends on the New Dems agenda — _lowering costs, working across the aisle, and delivering for working families._

**Now, with California’s special election just weeks away, we have a rare chance to expand our ranks, solidify our agenda, and secure a Democratic majority.**

But victories like this don’t happen on their own. We need to put in the work right now if we’re going to cross the finish line in 2026.

name: Stasha Rhodes, United for Democracy
subject: We just won a small victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
An appeals court blocked Trump from firing Lisa Cook just two days before the big Fed meeting. | |
---
Peter, **This week, the Federal Reserve held its big, two-day policy meeting.** The board voted on interest rates and other economic matters that directly affect our day-to-day lives. Just weeks ago, Trump tried to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook in order to replace her with a loyalist and gain control of the Fed and with it, our economy. **Two days before the big meeting, a federal appeals court blocked him from firing Cook—allowing her to attend and vote in the meeting.** This is a blow for Trump and a win for the people. But predictably, Trump has already gone crying to his MAGA justices on the Supreme Court like he always does: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe661j7EqV8NrsDnbO1Dobe8fht3smzsl7fi5Y5u6Ym0B83bFM8jRU7m_Zfne3AxWjVmulw4JpzIUzonBbmbmrHoU6l4_ROO0MDzmBd4y-nNL4I8QahTFS6cuUBW4RTcIDwnzHdG49P5OKKMEmzSGa25fS9JMxh_lXnReHLNoDyQJ3EvX_9wZzzhAXDC4ZfGQzn33CRjor4x3SLvTqnMe7R6upVA2297AesWRyePYg2hbK5cwzCb-bQjRim6CRuVnuYXMDZWwH_J3_Bf2mETS6LIqth5Cy3nlYxilmUflTOQ1A/4k3/k0r92iKAQZ-YGJjmqL4E3Q/h0/h001.Kgik_Ynq_td1G8nxkKLIHxgb3AZR7kQy51MxkTAukA0) He expects them to give him the keys to our economy. After all, they’ve given him kingly powers at every turn. **But the law says presidents can only fire Fed governors “for cause,” and Cook hasn’t been charged with wrongdoing.** Trump has tried to claim that Cook engaged in mortgage fraud, a trumped-up allegation that Cook denies and her Michigan city of residence says there is “no evidence” for.1 And recent reporting uncovered that Trump’s own Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent used the very mortgage claim tactic Trump is accusing Cook of.2 **Cook was also not provided due process to respond to the allegations.** If the Supreme Court sides with Trump, it will be the first time in the Fed’s 111 years that a president fired a Fed governor. [**We can’t be silent while the Supreme Court betrays our laws and our Constitution to support a wannabe dictator. That’s why United for Democracy is keeping the spotlight on the Supreme Court, and holding the MAGA justices accountable for their corruption. Chip in to power our work!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe661j7EqV8NrsDnbO1Dobe8cXRz0GlSBJvbNJb9vneJnaXcYaAz5dS3cgHXf1tSsYIsT3EmH1hg4bNL6qtIHWQFCTntt-uNYrqa-llWVUrpUtKgK1WqMI79S_ts1h-v-NpZiNyC6jHHMQr695PfXOald7pb_CCT-h7JC7asCVudKcJKbBBbKeyf46sPfSmfInVKSLwmxzdOnppwCBQTeL2jIEqX23HC3H_qWxbbVzVCfUVHY_qPiQ___oIaXQzt7TLLUfwvyGEJweYtuLKHTxMDh3CHwQMZi_ZL9sBsRzQiLs/4k3/k0r92iKAQZ-YGJjmqL4E3Q/h1/h001.o6PsfguZMsARpvMvTkLU7heQPm1xn4Le8wO5u9DBAOA) Thank you for fighting for democracy, Stasha Rhodes

The board voted on interest rates and other economic matters that directly affect our day-to-day lives. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Friend,
We need to level with you: Everything is on the line.
Donald Trump and Texas Republicans have launched an unprecedented scheme to rig next year’s elections before they even begin. Their goal is simple: steal enough seats to seize Congress regardless of what voters decide.
But California Strong Democrats like Gov. Gavin Newsom dared to fight back. We’re now their biggest obstacle. And that’s why they’re flooding our state with lies and dark money to try to defeat Proposition 50 — our firewall against Trump’s election rigging scheme.
And right now, our budget is running dangerously low. Unless we raise $10,000 before midnight, we won’t be able to expand our canvassing plans or scale our literature distribution, which will leave undecided voters without the facts they need to vote YES on Prop 50. Will you rush a donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]Here’s the truth:
➡️ If Prop 50 fails, Trump’s allies will be in prime position to keep total control of Washington D.C. for two more years.
➡️ If Prop 50 passes, California voters (not MAGA politicians!) will get to decide which party controls the U.S. House.
This is the mission. There is no do-over.
Understand what this means:
Every door we can’t knock is another voter who might only see Trump’s dark money ads.
Every turf we don’t expand is another neighborhood left vulnerable to Republican misinformation.
Every dollar we don’t raise tonight makes Trump’s scheme more likely to succeed.
This is not politics as usual. This is an emergency for our democracy.
Donald Trump is betting that California Democrats will falter. That we won’t rise to the challenge. That we’ll let his lies drown out the truth. Let’s prove him wrong. Will you rush a donation right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-sept25-redistricting?&refcode=&amount=]

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d3eee31-dfbf-4d45-a21d-b7a7ed945d2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I am writing this week's column from Phoenix, Arizona to take part in honoring Charlie Kirk on Sunday. It is an event that, while somber, was important to attend given what has taken place since Charlie was brutally taken from us.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QCsfi1yTOQupOgtQZl-P8SLnbwcxfVQDzgwhiDAyduc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=174190072)
As I wrote last week, leftists have not toned down their rhetoric in the aftermath of a suspect Taylor Robinson reportedly hating Charlie for spreading "hate" while Robinson was in a relationship with a man who (wrongly) identified as a woman.
In the time since the shooting, radical leftists have been busy doing more than just celebrating Charlie's death. In Texas, one student at Texas Tech University was expelled after **[allegedly assaulting someone at a vigil](https://substack.com/redirect/a386e924-ff4c-49a9-84de-350aa0a77cf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for Charlie on campus.
Another student at Texas State University was expelled after reenacting Charlie's death over and over again at a vigil hosted by students. The former student, Devion Canty Jr., claims he was spit on and called racial slurs, but there has been no evidence of such behavior towards him. Canty **[created a GoFundMe](https://substack.com/redirect/c412d83c-9662-4fe7-8360-905da0f94235?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after being kicked out of the school.
The real-life antics haven't been just on college campuses and have been far more violent.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Fight for the Truth and Take Back Control with Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The internet isn't a discussion anymore, it's a brawl between clickbait, spin, and headlines that sound like bad comedy. One minute you're checking the weather, the next you're wondering if "Ambassador Arrested in His Underwear" is news, or just Tuesday.
That's why Freespoke entered the ring.
Freespoke puts you back in control of the fight. One tap shows you the consensus, the divide, and expert insights from podcasts, so you see the truth, not the propaganda. It's private, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No porn. No data harvesting. Just clarity.
Whether you're fact-checking a meme, decoding a viral TikTok, or cutting through the "official version" of events, Freespoke is your chaos-killer.
And as an exclusive for Politibrawl readers**:** Get 35% off Freespoke Premium with code **[pbl35.](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Premium unlocks enhanced privacy by blocking all ads while using the app which means no more creepy data-stalking ads. Plus, you get unlimited AI summaries that simplify complex stories in seconds, and fully searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the source.
Don't lose the brawl for the truth. Download the free app today and take back control.
**[Download the Free App and Be in Control](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/2fb2e2e7-ff0e-437c-bf2b-7df44b47607c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
On Saturday, it was confirmed the suspect who **[shot at an ABC news station](https://substack.com/redirect/ccc27647-2b4d-4ce9-866f-de44522559c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in California is a former teacher's union legislative director and his X account is full of far-left rhetoric encouraging violent escalation.
The Sacramento man has since been released after posting bail.
The older man who first claimed to have been the shooter at Utah Valley University, in an attempt to give time for the real shooter to get away, has since been charged with having child abuse material on his phone. **[He has been charged](https://substack.com/redirect/005338a5-a7e4-4e16-a8fb-f61e89f92ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with obstruction of justice and for the abuse materials on his phone.
Several vigils for Charlie have had to be canceled or moved to more secure locations due to threats made by aggressors. Antifa showed up to the memorial service held in Boston to harass attendees. A bomb that was intended to go off was put underneath a news van for a Fox station while it was parked for coverage of Robinson's alleged involvement.
Dozens of House Democrats either voted "no" or "present" on a House resolution honoring Charlie and condemning political violence.
It has been nice seeing Turning Point USA staff that I have not seen in a long time, despite the circumstances. While everyone wants to be here to remember Charlie, there's a level of concern on what could happen during the memorial service. The temporary security fencing that was made famous during the 2020 BLM riots has been placed outside State Farm Stadium.
This is the environment we are in. It is hard enough to remember Charlie when such a tragedy did not seem possible prior to September, but now it is being marred by the new threats made to people who want to mourn him.
This is why we can't unify with these people. They are happy to dance on our graves and take action against those who want to have a moment to process such senseless death. The threats of being fired or put on suspension for a job has not changed some of this wicked behavior.
Only time will tell if this can be a lasting turning point for the country. It is hard to imagine moving on with the status quo once Charlie is buried, and for his sake, the status quo cannot remain. There must be more than justice, there needs to be a reckoning.

body:
Bitcoin didn't fall from the sky. In May 2010, a programmer bought two pizzas for 10,000 BTC--a moment we still celebrate as "Bitcoin Pizza Day."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2a9fbfd-dc97-4e7b-b5a9-370c96e9bb21?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Traxer](https://substack.com/redirect/bd46f78d-17f7-44c5-a969-a5c4376dbac3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/5b208577-806c-488a-bc0e-957a816019a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Bitcoin didn't fall from the sky. It was built, piece by piece, by people who were tired of bailouts, backroom deals, and money that loses value while politicians promise "temporary" fixes. The spark was the 2008 financial crisis. Banks were rescued, savers were punished, and central planners told us to trust them again. A few months later--on October 31, 2008--someone using the name Satoshi Nakamoto posted a nine-page whitepaper to a small email list. Title: "Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System." It was simple, direct, and radical: money without permission, middlemen, or a central bank.
Satoshi didn't invent the entire idea from scratch. He combined decades of work from the "cypherpunk" movement--people who believed privacy and freedom require strong cryptography. David Chaum explored digital cash in the 1980s. Adam Back created Hashcash, proof-of-work that costs real energy to send spam. Wei Dai wrote about "b-money." Nick Szabo described "bit gold." None of those projects fully solved the double-spend problem without a trusted third party. Satoshi's breakthrough was to marry proof-of-work with a public ledger--the blockchain--so anyone could verify the rules and no one could fudge the numbers.
On January 3, 2009, Satoshi mined the "genesis block." Embedded in it was a headline from that day's Times of London: "Chancellor on brink of second bailout for banks." That wasn't an accident; it was a statement. Bitcoin would be the opposite of bailout culture: a fixed supply, transparent rules, and no favorites. Twenty-one million coins--no more. New coins would be issued on a predictable schedule, cut in half roughly every four years. If Washington or Wall Street wanted more, they couldn't vote themselves a raise.
The first real transaction happened days later when Satoshi sent coins to Hal Finney, a respected cryptographer who helped test the software. In May 2010, a programmer bought two pizzas for 10,000 BTC--a moment we still celebrate as "Bitcoin Pizza Day." Laugh if you want, but that goofy purchase proved something: this new money could move from one person to another, anywhere, without permission and without a bank.
From there, the network grew--slowly at first, then in waves. Miners secured the chain by spending electricity and hardware to solve proof-of-work puzzles. Nodes ran the rules so no one--not miners, not developers, not governments--could change the core promise without broad consent. People tried to copy Bitcoin, to "upgrade" it, to centralize it. Bitcoin's answer was stubborn: conservative, rule-bound, and focused on reliability over gimmicks.
Why does the origin matter? Because the birth story reveals the mission. Bitcoin wasn't designed to make day-traders rich or to fund a new class of gatekeepers. It was designed to restore something basic: money that plays by the rules, even when politicians don't. In an era of swelling debt, financial surveillance, and moving goalposts, Bitcoin's start is a reminder that sound money is not a slogan--it's a standard. It began as a protest in code. It endures because it keeps its promises.

On January 3, 2009, Satoshi mined the "genesis block." Embedded in it was a headline from that day's Times of London: "Chancellor on brink of second bailout for banks." That wasn't an accident; it was a statement. Bitcoin would be the opposite of bailout culture: a fixed supply, transparent rules, and no favorites. Twenty-one million coins--no more. New coins would be issued on a predictable schedule, cut in half roughly every four years. If Washington or Wall Street wanted more, they couldn't vote themselves a raise. The first real transaction happened days later when Satoshi sent coins to Hal Finney, a respected cryptographer who helped test the software. In May 2010, a programmer bought two pizzas for 10,000 BTC--a moment we still celebrate as "Bitcoin Pizza Day." Laugh if you want, but that goofy purchase proved something: this new money could move from one person to another, anywhere, without permission and without a bank. From there, the network grew--slowly at first, then in waves. Miners secured the chain by spending electricity and hardware to solve proof-of-work puzzles. Nodes ran the rules so no one--not miners, not developers, not governments--could change the core promise without broad consent. People tried to copy Bitcoin, to "upgrade" it, to centralize it. Bitcoin's answer was stubborn: conservative, rule-bound, and focused on reliability over gimmicks. Why does the origin matter? Because the birth story reveals the mission. Bitcoin wasn't designed to make day-traders rich or to fund a new class of gatekeepers. It was designed to restore something basic: money that plays by the rules, even when politicians don't. In an era of swelling debt, financial surveillance, and moving goalposts, Bitcoin's start is a reminder that sound money is not a slogan--it's a standard. It began as a protest in code. It endures because it keeps its promises. Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Fascism is here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This week, the Trump administration rapidly escalated its assault on free
speech and political dissent. They’re no longer only targeting
pro-Palestinian activism: they’re censoring and attacking ANY speech they
don’t like.

Justice Democrats’ Rep. Summer Lee put it perfectly: “We aren't just
approaching authoritarianism—we're already in it.”

Look at what happened in this past week alone:

* An immigration judge agreed with the Trump administration and ordered
Palestinian activist and legal permanent U.S. resident Mahmoud Khalil
to be deported despite committing no crimes.

* Late-night show Jimmy Kimmel Live! was abruptly and indefinitely
suspended after Trump’s FCC threatened Disney/ABC and demanded the
network punish Kimmel for his commentary on Charlie Kirk’s death and
the MAGA response to it.

* While hosting Charlie Kirk’s podcast from the White House, JD Vance
blamed “left-wing extremism” for Kirk’s death, encouraged doxxing,
said private employers should fire people who criticize Kirk, and
vowed retribution against liberal organizations.

* Trump declared he’s designating ‘antifa’ as a terrorist organization,
even though it is not a singular, structured group and refers to the
broader anti-fascist movement.

* MAGA Rep. Nancy Mace spent the week tweeting and harassing Rep. Ilhan
Omar and tried to force a vote to censure her for comments about
Charlie Kirk she didn’t even make. She was unsuccessful, with even
some Republicans voting against it.

This is on top of the White House suing media outlets, threatening to
revoke funding for colleges and universities, and trying to hand TikTok to
pro-Trump investors.

Fascism is here, Peter, and we’re
not going to let this regime’s fear and intimidation tactics stop us from
speaking truth to power.

Justice Democrats is here to organize people against organized money.
We’re taking on Trump, his billionaire megadonors, and corporate super
PACs. We’re also challenging the Democratic establishment, demanding they
actually do their jobs and fight for us. We’re sending working-class
leaders to represent working-class communities in Congress. We are
building a progressive movement from the ground up and fighting back
against fascism.

But we can’t do it by ourselves. Especially now that Trump and Vance are
loudly and explicitly announcing their plans to target progressive groups
like ours.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250921?refcode=em20250921-37041&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37041_1203867_QUQ9fu&akid=37041%2E1203867%2EQUQ9fu ]Please, if you can afford it, pitch in $5 or any amount
today to ensure we have the resources to fight back and continue growing
our movement in this critical moment for our country.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250921?refcode=em20250921-37041&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37041_1203867_QUQ9fu&akid=37041%2E1203867%2EQUQ9fu ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250921-37041-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37041_1203867_QUQ9fu&akid=37041%2E1203867%2EQUQ9fu

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37041%2E1203867%2EQUQ9fu

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: God is so good
body:
Charlie always believed this day would come
54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25.

| | [ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8d58ac3a334f4c55a3b06221509f19eb&_e=MJrJ2JyUR1TyC4wMhGTYj7xBUi8F07i_CL2Hcy0fpgTVLgBX3XStZAlBJxVXQmZS1_3tjq36TkW6ob0m4SlBOgy6ogEL854lm-O9kFc1mUV8q1Q-vyO_lhFrb4NYIHVl2CEkm5vJnG3vR7STcHySim13i9_R9aMJlKkI0WWz0hPCm1vTlXlIk549fKPe8qHbGXaq_fiWzV-bMWIPdp81_u8ozhQ4Lyl6fb2Xjt8CYH0AAbPZByiypmxzIbeANxtOyq9Cs9qvdX3wQHgVGzuvJnVmL-YqBuTyVEzxVAmlkh70nUJEvGyeaIe7myY3NvJlgYMrJ6FEkTF_wF5jU9H3rYN6rjJI_prFwzoinJCFvmZTOE9Nkh1v40s7Ry5VIrrdytUyzJHL9bkSm7nhp2xv4ciXYREZ3ecNBdEg9875flfJKbU3dQgAB178A82e4xwXGiB5p7ubzzdru1nZu-71aT6mZv-SkiQmc6A2-y6YmS79E92RM59IOJxD4TJEAa8xOk5onyYpbUuF8wt7u-894cyIrsEKOsHBClyy1LUs3Sah09uW5Rb84sD8GBnTpiFb721YRwLvuOSXvH3dm0ozQ06x58IAtcEmLO5lUUIzGTqz-iLw3ro1e8bgwkvSqxUxKW5B5H9U_tjn3JLUOYRWVw6BCmVI_P8qrT9QN41wJbpClbdhLRB-Hvq4-3Yr4Y4r0h9aKFL3P7F0wUiPYbXbeBj_nRBXYtmLKGz8pxQEbmg%3D)
---
Peter, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- **to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history** -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter:
---
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8d58ac3a334f4c55a3b06221509f19eb&_e=MJrJ2JyUR1TyC4wMhGTYj7xBUi8F07i_CL2Hcy0fpgTVLgBX3XStZAlBJxVXQmZS1_3tjq36TkW6ob0m4SlBOgy6ogEL854lm-O9kFc1mUV8q1Q-vyO_lhFrb4NYIHVl2CEkm5vJnG3vR7STcHySim13i9_R9aMJlKkI0WWz0hPCm1vTlXlIk549fKPe8qHbGXaq_fiWzV-bMWIPdp81_u8ozhQ4Lyl6fb2Xjt8CYH0AAbPZByiypmxzIbeANxtOFWhSmqKWEMnWS3eBF3JcFHBbxxy7FOj1oCE5uNz2OK2-OX5ab8jwQnB4ssjjVyf5EIIVbYr0fGY9Iz2N0Ht-prbY7hvsiFTpiz4eflgPVC_rcPZIkA9ZIZ_oPTkti79_Yq17JZa8yXYn90Dz-2UL6mEzbwlPhzouayRO07h1Aa2WWmqE7_XbxZlhs2xFJFBvpmMWzg75j0L1tTbB4rz05y3W_MvJYO0K3VmB9AO68Rr9qOO-ZKnjmv88JUHa0CQ-PjilbGCa-s8FlJDKwL1rjrtrhSkBfTszrtObRshwvM-Rf7bCEw7wQZ4XHOMr3Qm6d8qUjxdTIChyVGebvCZLJp3lIy_BLvzXVVHFoKOtLQgpxphgpouHO0hXe5OLo8m26rpcQpbi2ENvoj7x3D19Tc-8TcwdaBVpuKo9EhZVw5AIGJtydX2xUmkSXhwrGwtCX_nOMHtZd0zRrNU3u_aPXoAuxaGhmpihAs9BbrytrdI%3D)
---
**God is so good.** ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Peter... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... _But now?_ These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... **They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie.** Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all.
---
[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=8d58ac3a334f4c55a3b06221509f19eb&_e=MJrJ2JyUR1TyC4wMhGTYj7xBUi8F07i_CL2Hcy0fpgTVLgBX3XStZAlBJxVXQmZS1_3tjq36TkW6ob0m4SlBOgy6ogEL854lm-O9kFc1mUV8q1Q-vyO_lhFrb4NYIHVl2CEkm5vJnG3vR7STcHySim13i9_R9aMJlKkI0WWz0hPCm1vTlXlIk549fKPe8qHbGXaq_fiWzV-bMWIPdp81_u8ozhQ4Lyl6fb2Xjt8CYH0AAbPZByiypmxzIbeANxtOqnNLV1RwnNnLXUFNpT7r5EuuJTKeTwNhTIbEYApOQXkFLKl-OhaU7Y9wXO_IzhLZUtuLAX6pdtEPsFttJoCou7CfDqdXLul0etVOZ9-S3pnOLSt6yEmrTkfzeyf2skIrJMtMZpgjLT5d1lHpKJLDSmSQA5QiphsLTKOWEmpyS7VG6_oYQ38QwN3D-3L0YxTSmLFOrB6yySxToDW2TfqJybERyb6EaDh20GbTs7zvNaIc4Yy6GJRPm1QP2_eSR1-Nk1Fp6qSuWRt2WqilGuI1f03Uukt7ycvf36fmQuS64470UwIflIBks_X5wT5Y_nQe720zj2E6gqepWyz0jXy4Os2_jwSDRIAw8kvOqiueZxOJqX-uSXDp1pdvEy1qi8gA2Z2Zd2IJpoWCTx8-OjZjLOsNpr9AhFpOwil-SxT7fJ8lA9Y1TCqpSjUxFN2P8Elk-qSs-wOU-ivwK5BC9HAOiZNJ2RDrVLYH6MrzpT5plvc%3D)
---
He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... _It 's happening._ Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. **Again, Peter, God is so good.** Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, _" What can I do?"_ As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. **Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ** ✅ Leadership materials
✅ Pocket Constitutions
✅ Chapter training tools
✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... _this won 't be a small task. _ But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. **_For Charlie._** _And here 's how YOU can help with this..._ **Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter...** How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started?
---

clean_body: Charlie always believed this day would come 54,000 students asked to start chapters—help us equip them with activism kits. 1 kit = $25. | | Peter, Even now... it still doesn't feel real that we lost Charlie. His voice, his courage, his conviction -- it shaped all of us. And his vision -- to build the most faithful and the most patriotic generation in American history -- is why Turning Point USA exists today. Peter, that's why we have an inspiring update for you... In just the first seven days since Charlie was taken from all of us, Turning Point USA has received more than 54,000 requests from students who want to start or join a chapter: God is so good. ✝️🙏🕊️ To give you perspective, Peter... Coming into this school year, Turning Point USA had roughly 900+ college chapters and 1,200+ high school chapters. It took us years to build those chapters... over a decade in fact... But now? These students who signed up? They weren't asked to... They weren't recruited... They felt it was their time to stand up for this country and honor Charlie. Because of the life he lived. The faith he had. The love he showed God, his family, and others. The courage he had to speak truth. And his vision of a better America for us all. He always believed this day would come. He used to talk about it all the time -- how the momentum would shift, how young people would rise up with courage, and how a Turning Point USA chapter would be in every college and high school in America. And now... It 's happening. Faster than he could have imagined. Bigger than we thought possible. And more beautiful than we can even describe. Again, Peter, God is so good. Since we lost Charlie, we've also felt SO MUCH love... Prayers. Emails. Messages. Stories about how Charlie's voice changed lives... or your children's or grandchildren's lives. And so many supporters have asked, " What can I do?" As you read this, our team is working around the clock to follow up with every chapter request. And we're going to need help equipping them with our activism kits. Every new chapter receives these kits from Turning Point USA with everything they need to get started -- including: ✅ Leadership materials ✅ Pocket Constitutions ✅ Chapter training tools ✅ American flags & patriotic gear Peter, I'm sure you'd believe it when we say it... this won 't be a small task. But we're going to do it. Whatever it takes. For Charlie. And here 's how YOU can help with this... Every $25 you give today helps stock another activism kit -- ready to deploy into a new Turning Point USA student chapter... How many of these activism kits can you help provide to the wave of new student chapters that are just getting started? Peter, if there was ever a more immediate way you could help make Charlie's vision a reality... This is it. Also... Here 's one more powerful thing you can do: 📩 If you have a son, daughter, grandchild, niece, nephew -- or any young person in your life -- who wants to get involved... who wants to join or start a chapter... Please send them this link: Peter, if you've already given... If you've already donated... If you've already been a voice of encouragement and strength in this painful week... If you've prayed, been praying, and continue to pray... Thank you. We can never say it enough. If you've read this far, we want you to know this... You 're the reason Charlie's mission and vision will grow for generations to come. God is so good. For Charlie, -The Turning Point USA Family P.S. Please know, Peter, if you can't afford to help right now, all we ask for are your prayers. Charlie would have wanted you to pray first -- and if that's all you can give today, we 're grateful. But if you're able to help... if you're overjoyed to hear that students are flocking to Charlie's message and mission... Your gift today helps sustain this wave of student inspiration and gets new student chapters off the ground floor... And ensures Charlie's vision is realized faster than we all thought possible. Every $25 you give today helps us stock another activism kit ready to deploy to a new student chapter. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We can set an example for the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I wanted to be the first to tell you:
As of Friday morning, the first votes have been cast in our race for Governor.
Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? I'm asking for your donation of $ 25 or more today, split with Tim Kaine , so that we can set an example for the nation and stand up to chaos coming out of Trump's White House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important.
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.
Can I count on you to contribute a small amount today to help us win the biggest election of 2025? With the polls tightening, your $ 25 to our campaign and Tim Kaine is urgently needed to turn out the voters who'll flip Virginia blue. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=25] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to follow our campaign from here until November 4th.
Thank you for the continued support,
Abigail Spanberger
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?amount=25]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=JmpKhc3NOUvsKPq5ihOInjSIuOLc7OtSmCyFMwwheR7nXmzwN2RDlL9G5kktOspf6kUh60InG5rnHmJocQl2g5Zm0qW%2F%2FRLmmFhoJElgjH86igsHZPdM8G%2BDXhQP%2BKzytfPYr%2FsjBytnez1GfnHNjCTFMo2YL9k9yHOzm2hhIGXlkca6%2B53iRp4cxSJClDZhr6i6FekZG1Cw4BFdo7FxenirzY%2BKWg9B0xwHzS2zbLUq8xdG8VrK266GZT2TCAwP0ba7pfrOlu4mWr0Fxrr3OOBelgOPqSDeoufAZysOfBBKzmSdXcJxHham31Qd%2FKnCqOasyb6D5Vrm9BMh1cJGTVS2cQIQY%2BXzoSpM1sFDB8LSEWugktLBBSfK2NL8bnNCkt9AQynMSu5ugvCrW1LT2h1tCgLBs1n8HonTdFbwnzY%3D .

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207msc63xxqbycdsv6eeenfhlfl5uwi8gqe5edmhchh4e0fe240tqn8s4fbjs2f9vp5k3t173c1ra15kxbw&__stmp=t2yi9q&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3a9bey4knks27i5p7h062jqj6cxxfvp0xyq0m0xdhgq8i8a2x1pbwd00ls04alpxxpbd7bm532r5pienbetvn5a03gdx2cckvaqv1neitrjvai9mqrrd3ykbo573108wtprfdwyefv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3a9bey4knks27i5p7h062jqj6cxxfvp0xyq0m0xdhgq8i8a2x1pbwd00ls04alpxxpbd7bm532r5pienbetvn5a03gdx2cckvaqv1neitrjvai9mqrrd3ykbo573108wtprfdwyefv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2yi9q&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Tobias Read
subject: Join me in standing up to the Trump Administration’s illegal attempts to access our voter registration data >>
body:
Add your name to protect Oregon voter data| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663162/571049489/-569431239?refcode=250921em-data-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQzMzNjZS0yZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVQLryFLD9LESuv9hHOk-eeIeKubu5IFE7h7Y3Vs0xQ=)
---
| | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. Our democracy is being put to the test like never before. **There’s no sugarcoating it: I’m writing to you because the Trump administration just tried to seize control of Oregon’s voter registration data.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663163/571049490/-569431239?refcode=250921em-data-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQzMzNjZS0yZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVQLryFLD9LESuv9hHOk-eeIeKubu5IFE7h7Y3Vs0xQ=)
---
They demanded voters’ personal identifying information that has no legitimate role in federal election oversight. Data that can be manipulated to undermine trust in our elections and go after opponents. **This demand has nothing to do with compliance and everything to do with power.** By hoarding personal data, Trump’s DOJ could spin false claims of voter fraud or even build a national voter database to target Americans. **I said no. As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I rejected their request in the strongest possible terms.** But I need your help to show that the people of Oregon stand with me. **[That’s why I’m asking you personally: Will you add your name to our petition opposing Trump’s voter data grab?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663164/571049491/-120029677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWQzMzNjZS0yZDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GVQLryFLD9LESuv9hHOk-eeIeKubu5IFE7h7Y3Vs0xQ=&emci=424cac48-2597-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3ed333ce-2d97-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30662126)**

clean_body: Add your name to protect Oregon voter data| | | = | | Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read. Our democracy is being put to the test like never before. There’s no sugarcoating it: I’m writing to you because the Trump administration just tried to seize control of Oregon’s voter registration data. = They demanded voters’ personal identifying information that has no legitimate role in federal election oversight. Data that can be manipulated to undermine trust in our elections and go after opponents. This demand has nothing to do with compliance and everything to do with power. By hoarding personal data, Trump’s DOJ could spin false claims of voter fraud or even build a national voter database to target Americans. I said no. As Oregon’s Secretary of State, I rejected their request in the strongest possible terms. But I need your help to show that the people of Oregon stand with me. Thanks to Donald Trump’s unprecedented quest for power, our personal privacy is at risk. Trust in our elections is at risk. And our constitutional authority to run state elections is at risk. Thank you for standing strong for democracy, Tobias Read Secretary of State, Oregon = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Your thoughts on USPS privatization?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
AP: FedEx board member Steiner is picked to be next USPS postmaster general amid talk of privatization [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/AP_USPS_Privatization.png]
David Steiner, a former CEO of the nation’s largest waste management company who currently serves on the FedEx board of directors, has taken over control of the U.S. Postal Service, becoming the nation’s 76th postmaster general.
Steiner’s appointment brought heightened concerns from postal unions over possible efforts to privatize the USPS, which the Trump administration has advocated for. The U.S. Postal Service is an independent agency of the federal government and one of a few government agencies explicitly authorized as a public service by the Constitution.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this issue. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you want the U.S. Postal Service privatized?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=092125_2yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=092125_2no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=092125_2&amount=20]

name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Good news and bad news.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250921-1531-foote&t=1001&akid=1531%2E342411%2EyPtWlb ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ve got some good news — and some bad news.

The good news:

We have bold, progressive leaders in Congress who aren’t afraid to speak
truth to power. Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are fighting every single
day for the issues that matter: access to healthcare, climate justice,
affordable housing, social and civil rights, and so much more.

They’re not backed by billionaires. They’re backed by people like you —
and they’ve never been more ready to keep pushing forward.

The bad news:

The MAGA machine is doing everything it can to silence voices, roll back
the progress we’ve made, and consolidate power for the wealthy and
well-connected.

From voter suppression to attacks on our freedoms to right-wing
billionaires trying to buy seats and influence outcomes — they’ll stop at
nothing to tighten their grip on control.

That’s why we need your support.

The Squad doesn’t take corporate PAC money. We rely entirely on grassroots
donors chipping in what they can, when they can. And right now, we need to
show we’re not backing down.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250921-movement.Y_Ncru&refcode=em20250921-1531&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1531%2E342411%2EyPtWlb ]Can you chip in $3 to keep up the fight and protect
everything we’re building together?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250921-movement.Y_Ncru&refcode=em20250921-1531&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1531%2E342411%2EyPtWlb ]Contribute ››

Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and AOC are fighting every single day for the issues that matter: access to healthcare, climate justice, affordable housing, social and civil rights, and so much more. They’re not backed by billionaires. They’re backed by people like you — and they’ve never been more ready to keep pushing forward. The bad news: The MAGA machine is doing everything it can to silence voices, roll back the progress we’ve made, and consolidate power for the wealthy and well-connected. name: James Talarico
subject: Not your typical launch video
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
This is not going to be a typical campaign. That won’t cut it in Texas.
We’re throwing out the DC playbook. It’s failed us too many times.
That’s why I launched this campaign with an unconventional launch video.
I wanted to make clear from day one that we were doing things differently.
[**If you haven’t seen it, please take a few minutes to watch our launch video, and then pitch in any amount to make sure we have the resources to go to every corner of Texas and talk to everyone.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/678?c0=jt-em-launchvideo.LVHIlY&refcode=em250921-ak&t=1&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv)
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/678?c0=jt-em-launchvideo.LVHIlY&refcode=em250921-ak&t=2&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv)
[WATCH + DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/678?c0=jt-em-launchvideo.LVHIlY&refcode=em250921-ak&t=3&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv)
This is the first major campaign launch video to be filmed vertically — optimized for the new social media landscape.
But while this campaign is cutting-edge, it’s also rooted in timeless values. So we didn’t shoot this video on digital — we shot it on film.
And unlike typical launch videos with quick cuts and lots of flashy editing, this video is one single shot. No cuts.
This is the mindset we’re bringing to this campaign.
We’re throwing out the rule book. We’re taking risks. And we’re trying new things.
**That’s how we take back Texas.** [**I hope you’ll consider pitching in a few bucks to be part of it.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launchvideo.AdOKy-&refcode=em250921-ak&t=4&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launchvideo.AdOKy-&refcode=em250921-ak&t=5&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv)
Let’s keep surprising people.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=56%2E1347274%2EaqPrqv).

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: An update on the budget
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=720%2E181023%2EzuKSoG)
Right now, people are feeling very anxious for a lot of different reasons: _Cuts to Medicaid at the federal level. Uncertainty about education funding here in the state. Costs going up because of tariffs and inflation._
But the thing that gets under my skin the most is that at a time like this, when we need to be easing those anxieties and providing clear, consistent leadership here in Michigan, **we’re not seeing that from Michigan House Republicans in their state budget proposal.**
We still don't have a budget passed — and people are rightly feeling nervous in schools and hospitals across the state about what happens when the funding stops on October 1.
Every day, I hear from workers in my office who are anxious about whether they’ll be able to pay their bills because our legislators aren’t doing their job. _These public servants should be celebrated, not laid off._
We need clear, consistent leadership from our lawmakers that will invest in our people and put Michigan families first. As leaders, our job is to ease those anxieties, develop a plan, and reinforce our commitment to getting things done. **That’s what real leadership looks like.**
I’m the only person running for governor right now who’s actually managing a state budget. My department has responded with a plan that would cut our budget in a way that maintains all these services and contributes to funding to improve our roads and public education, _because we can cut spending and make government more efficient without hurting people._
**[Michiganders deserve clear-eyed leadership during this budget push — and we need a fair budget deal from House Republicans. If you agree, add your name in support of a good-faith agreement that puts Michigan families first.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2509-budget-petition?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250921_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=720%2E181023%2EzuKSoG)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/2509-budget-petition?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250921_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=720%2E181023%2EzuKSoG)
---
Thank you for taking action on this,
Jocelyn

[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250921_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=720%2E181023%2EzuKSoG)
---

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=5&akid=720%2E181023%2EzuKSoG)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

**_Begin Forwarded Message from BWC:_**

Our democracy relies on fair maps. When district lines are drawn fairly, every vote carries equal weight, and our representatives are chosen for and by the people.

But in Texas and Missouri, those principles and district lines are under attack. Republicans know the American people reject their extremist policies, so they’re trying to cheat their way to power instead of winning elections fairly.

**_[Will you add your name today to make it clear: Voters should choose their leaders, not the other way around?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663750/571051757/782835423?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250921_PT_Gerrymandering_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM0N2Q0Yy0zMDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zewrRY67shBSyA9PbI0DIRVCvxkPJ9ZhHHixqsLZgdM=&emci=0c780646-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=66347d4c-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)_**
| [STAND FOR FAIR MAPS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663751/571051758/782835423?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250921_PT_Gerrymandering_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM0N2Q0Yy0zMDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zewrRY67shBSyA9PbI0DIRVCvxkPJ9ZhHHixqsLZgdM=&emci=0c780646-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=66347d4c-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)

In Texas, Republicans have approved a new congressional map that will unfairly attack five Democratic held seats in the 2026 election. And in Missouri, lawmakers have moved forward with a special session to redraw their congressional districts.

Gerrymandering silences voices, dilutes votes, and erodes trust in our democracy. Republicans are going to these extreme lengths because they know they’ve already destroyed the people’s trust with the Big, Ugly Bill – and all they care about is clinging to power to push their radical agenda.

**_But we can’t let them cheat their way into more power._**

**_[Please add your name today to help protect the promise of fair representation:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663752/571051759/782835423?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250921_PT_Gerrymandering_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM0N2Q0Yy0zMDk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zewrRY67shBSyA9PbI0DIRVCvxkPJ9ZhHHixqsLZgdM=&emci=0c780646-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=66347d4c-3097-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30096098)_**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I get it
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I know my purpose. For my entire life, I’ve served this country. After my family, my purpose has been to defend our Constitution, our democracy, our people — and to do the most good I can for them.
#

Team —
There have been times in my life when it was hard to see the way forward. When it feels like you’ve got the weight of the world on your shoulders. When hope was hard to come by.
It's not easy. I get it.
A pretty smart guy named Viktor Frankl had some thoughts on how you keep going through tough times. “Those who have a ‘why’ to live, can bear with almost any ‘how.’”
You have to find a purpose, and that purpose often centers on love. Love for your family, for your friends, for your ideals, for your country. And sometimes that purpose is just to keep going, no matter what.
I know my purpose. For my entire life, I’ve served this country. After my family, my purpose has been to defend our Constitution, our democracy, our people — and to do the most good I can for them.
This team has been a huge part of that, and I can’t thank you enough. And you can be sure: I am not going to quit. I am not going to be quiet. I am going to keep standing up and doing what I think is right.
But, just as always, I can’t do this work alone.
Now, if any of that sounds like something you’d like to be a part of, I’ve got a humble request for you:
[**We have some incredibly powerful people lining up against us. To keep going, I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sept25/.-bETEu&refcode=em250921-1-700k&t=1&akid=6192%2E6688874%2E1ASF_2)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-sept25/.tSYzFR&refcode=em250921-1-700k&t=21&akid=6192%2E6688874%2E1ASF_2)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-sept25/.3zsjJw&refcode=em250921-1-700k&t=22&akid=6192%2E6688874%2E1ASF_2)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-sept25/.Nq2luL&refcode=em250921-1-700k&t=23&akid=6192%2E6688874%2E1ASF_2)**
---

---
****
It truly means so much to me that you continue to be a part of this team.
Thanks for sticking with me.
Hang tough,
Mark

Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Now, if any of that sounds like something you’d like to be a part of, I’ve got a humble request for you: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It truly means so much to me that you continue to be a part of this team. Thanks for sticking with me. Hang tough, Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Bobby Pulido
subject: I’m using my voice for something a little different now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey, it’s Bobby Pulido. As a Tejano artist, I’ve used my voice to tell the stories we can all relate to – our joys, our struggles, our heartbreak.

Now, I’m using that same voice for something a little different: to fight for South Texas in Congress.

[I’m officially running for Congress in Texas. I’m not doing it for the title. I’m doing it for my community. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project today and help kickstart our campaign?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94027?t=6&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94027?t=7&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
---
You might know me as a Tejano artist, and that’s something I’ll always be proud of.
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94027?t=8&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
But beyond the music, I’m a business owner, a proud father of four, and a lifelong South Texan with deep-rooted values of hard work, humility, family, and faith.

I recognize the struggles many families in the Valley are faced with because they are my own: rising costs, a healthcare system that too often fails, and an immigration debate that forgets what it’s really like to live on the border.

Families are working harder than ever and still falling behind. I see a healthcare system that’s broken. I see politicians talking about the border like it’s a slogan, not the place where we live, work, and raise our kids.

**I’m running for Congress because this district deserves a representative who knows what it’s like to live here, not just campaign here.**

[I need your help to make it happen. Will you split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and me to help us kickstart this campaign and show the country that South Texas is ready to be heard?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94027?t=9&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Bobby Pulido and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94028?t=10&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94029?t=11&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94030?t=12&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94031?t=13&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94032?t=14&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
Con respeto,
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94027?t=15&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
Bobby
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21273%2E878179%2EW5nOQO)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is how you win a swing state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Join me in the fight. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663918/571052447/823540626?refcode=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg4NWE2YS0zMjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrMnwC1vLZvJwuE7oPrfDNgDRXi5msVJ84BDYt4OpHA=&emci=8c4820e2-a095-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. _Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years._ It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. **I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere.** As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care _more_ affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what _the people_ need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I _know_ that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. **[I’m asking you to make a contribution to our campaign because _right now_ is when we can build the momentum to win. Chip in $10 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663920/571052449/-1743631236?amount=10&refcode=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg4NWE2YS0zMjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrMnwC1vLZvJwuE7oPrfDNgDRXi5msVJ84BDYt4OpHA=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115663921/571052450/-1743631236?refcode=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.df885a6a-3297-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg4NWE2YS0zMjk3LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrMnwC1vLZvJwuE7oPrfDNgDRXi5msVJ84BDYt4OpHA=)**
---

clean_body: Join me in the fight. | Peter — North Carolina is a swing state, and we can be sure that Republicans will go all out to defeat us. But I know how to win North Carolina. Whether it was Attorney General or Governor, I’ve done it over and over in the most competitive years. It takes the dedication to connect with folks in every community, the commitment to fight for the rights that people hold dear, and the courage to stand up in the face of threats to the progress we’ve made. I served as Governor for eight years. I know that North Carolinians don’t want to go backward. And based on the enthusiasm we’re seeing for our campaign from people across our country, that sentiment is true for Americans everywhere. As a U.S. Senator, I will fight for our rights to the ballot box, reproductive health care, clean air and drinking water, and more. I will work to make health care more affordable and accessible — not yank it away from those most in need. I’ll advocate for better public schools, more clean energy options, and opportunities for good-paying jobs. I will defend our democracy. And I’ll never stop listening to what the people need from me and meeting them where they are. I believe that this is how you win a swing state, Peter. And I know that — with you on our team — we can succeed here in North Carolina. = | = Grateful to have you with me, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats.
