name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: RFK Jr. promised no one would be denied. He lied.

| | | **At risk individuals across the country are being denied the COVID vaccine, thanks to RFK Jr’s quackery and incompetence.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mCt6gt3nev0IDvPxYqGlK4P24QsgmVAMhGXEWSqUv8Zx8XGgsp4Fc4vwO5CLGIl27eocGRtCICx9axJkSm5Ks2wMVhtzP5NZumk7vhOlG3Ch3OVo4PQpUQqTV8S-aa470_d61frXT_HIe-YSPJShwTyI6JdDXoKdt3eqngFYpu6ycloRHsHlDn7_xVCEdbFPJZdX1xsWeezwJLLOjZA0fbVz0FHvyxmVVnR0KDDzwQRn-DNl-2GrMPImavKxivwv9NskhDWnegWnH-wPBdwhGOoeio6I2NbMUXL7E964eM4yKMKWg1awTslPCZ8azao_piLK18cnhvEMmA23_hnQRFK6PGpT6uIgJdhPiYZ1RyfdA/4k3/XPNHqn-rSdeK2y82395FxA/h0/h001.e28K3YRCSxfvEGBvF6I4rLcz5s9swKgcbTT32a-IcCo) **[Will you make a contribution to help restore access to lifesaving vaccines and STOP RFK Jr.?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAQcHBGZTQyASHdftBqMbHvaM67lJJs1zDETiQ2AQ3s9Kej1bPopPTeswETTx3Jz83WagbeTvdMMX8d4QN5msbuFMfKJyEb2PLzC5bOA5z5EzvdOiJfn9e5S7G4wU20K28hqsjjVSUe5Xc8NFsSyNEf95uKB6YHCE8aPO_mVTIsKQydraf713inFSgrIf4nSq8enBfa0mMrsCZLrRIumTmdb0KbETLbdS_ei9eHr4JXiA03OI4_5wqbpx2t6oHmMb6L5ArW1yzFkCV3KrMLVhjdRzC--xreRf4reoNYAAarE3SlNx-7E23tnHK3en8JcK_Nc2-mYtcpsl52fPs-u_slBkrDt_-z032QUbTfJ7bJAw/4k3/XPNHqn-rSdeK2y82395FxA/h1/h001.MpsNYP5vpznk3Nn-LurYeLLb2oP5VUCYqS2iJi_E0cI)**
* * *
Trump and the MAGA Republicans handed America’s public health to an anti-vaxxer conspiracy nut with zero medical training. That’s right: RFK Jr. now runs the Department of Health and Human Services - our nation’s health has been turned over to a reckless fraud.
The results? Chaos. Confusion. Cancer patients, seniors, pregnant people, and those most at risk are being denied vaccines, while a deadly virus spreads and mutates.
Lives are on the line, and MAGA doesn’t care.
As an American with a disability, I know what is at stake. Many of us can’t be vaccinated. We rely on herd immunity to survive. We vaccines are denied, the virus spreads, mutates, and puts millions of lives, including mine, at risk.
**I founded Able Dems because people with disabilities, and all vulnerable Americans, deserve leaders who will protect our health, our rights, and our communities. MAGA extremists are playing politics with our lives.**
******[Friend, this is the moment. Donate today to stop MAGA’s deadly recklessness and help elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will defend public health and protect American lives.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXO2FiuxEhBk3zsUTCYW6F8lB7-RffhngK16Xoh7-Vi8mAXTZvBaxwdbCtQWh1rQQdr_KIPOty4KESIlpqVCWOOyGrFYDup1IROXnzbOsUfcM1YR9PooLDoR7lLGWZckJzd0mL7ZKNVJ10_RuaB7ARCPpQtw9LZHxPMfJRU1g-z44f40vsHb3O8zH9S966Rz1kb9qEn4onbYYOVbn9Dx61dHxJptALrIyRlkke_ajQ3sZ9PzeYXyc6VXB4DNbtUWxXv24c-iXD4HAsWA1ysC9gLke6qvZdtl615t06MuwJ_H5N9iV0qrulJex6lt2ErsA2zfbQjQryCexbsAZl2E6mZh8vV0iURLmi0m5RJgXdCHE92QbU-VLIs6wQY9jbCYWI6cWyzMu-AXkAG7hjqOuG2Ew/4k3/XPNHqn-rSdeK2y82395FxA/h2/h001.p49TRr9gZXZZ_tjnbGgj447v2xNADA2FoPjRaNnWxRc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Able Dems is fighting to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will protect public health and defend the vulnerable. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Ruben Gallego (via Democrats.org)
subject: I never thought I’d see this kind of thing happen at home.
body:
---
Derek, I served in Iraq as a Marine at the height of the war, about 20 years ago. I signed up to defend our Constitution. To make sure this exact kind of thing never happens at home. We have never, ever had a president or a White House as anti-democratic as this one. **I never thought I’d see it, but this is authoritarianism.** We need to stand up now or risk losing the rights and liberties we were born with. We’ve got to stop this guy, hold him accountable, and make sure he’s run out of office with his tail between his legs. It’s going to take a massive amount of work. And the Democratic National Committee is ready to do that work. To fight back against Trump and his cronies, and to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will do the same. [**That’s why I’m coming to you today. Will you join me in supporting the DNC with a $3 donation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250921_4615_fr&refcode2=4615_22930333_QLFDIg&akid=4615%2E22930333%2EQLFDIg) We need to win elections in states like New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Virginia to prove to MAGA that we won’t back down. We need to keep fighting Republicans’ attempts to redistrict states across the country. And we need to take back both the House and the Senate next year. It’s going to take a massive amount of work, and we’re ready to do it. [**But we can’t without your help. Please chip in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250921_4615_fr&refcode2=4615_22930333_QLFDIg&akid=4615%2E22930333%2EQLFDIg) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-september-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250921_4615_fr&refcode2=4615_22930333_QLFDIg&akid=4615%2E22930333%2EQLFDIg)**

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Peter, circling back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter, I’m focused on fighting for my constituents. This includes working to lower costs, ensure access to affordable health care and protecting our democracy.

But with my new multi-millionaire opponent in the race, I need your help to boost my campaign.

As we face our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) fundraising deadline since my opponent entered the race, we must show the strength of our campaign.

At the end of the month our numbers will go public for all to see and it’s critical we prove we are stronger than ever and ready for the fight ahead. Will you help me close our $3,700 fundraising gap in the next 72 hours to prove our strength? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $200 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?express_lane=true&amount=200] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25]

This new opponent has the money to flood television screens and radios in our state. So I have to be ready.

I know what it takes to stand toe to toe with House Republicans and fight for working families and I’m not giving up.

My top priority is serving the interests of you and your family, but with this new opponent with deep pockets, I have to fundraise too. So, I am asking for your support today.

We’ve set a goal of closing our $3,700 fundraising gap in the next 72 hours. Will you please make a donation to help us reach our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-september-25?amount=10]
Donate Now [https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/843078/]

Thank you for your support,

Mike Thompson
